Too much Yang energy can lead to conflict or aggression, but since you’re both probably good communicators, things should  run smoothly in this match.

cc_sign_match.Sex: To be frank, you and your Rat gal both have high libidos. Together, you might blow a fuse in the bedroom. cc_sign_match.Sex: Your sexual styles might be a bit different. Do you thrive off the thrill of a wild romp? This gal might not be into the quick and dirty. Most likely. She’ll take her time and shower you with tender kisses. She’s probably a true romantic, so be careful about acting crass or vulgar until you’re sure she can handle it. The good news. She’ll typically be fine with letting you dominate, since she’s more passive by nature anyway. Can you be tender? Sensual? Feminine? If so. She’ll be eating out of the palm of your hand.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: Finally. A woman who’s just as passionate and free-thinking as you are! Your Dragon probably embodies the archetype of an old world hero – strong, valiant, and powerful. She’s quick to take action and change directions without notice, but that’s your style too. Unbridled passion? Blistering infatuation? You got it. She’ll be happy to race alongside you no matter where you’re going – and it’s likely you have the same destination in mind. Her idealism and your free spirit should make for one dazzling relationship.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: Yang on top of Yang? Oh boy. You two will take no prisoners. Yang people are typically energetic, ambitious, goal-oriented, and quick to take action. A Dragon will relate to your outgoing, assertive nature -- she’s the same way. However, since yang people tend to move quickly, be careful about burnout in this match. One of you might have to remind the other to slow down! The good news is that you’ll approach life the same way – with vigor, bravery, and purpose!
cc_sign_match.TheGood: You two can have loads of fun together, as long as you don’t butt heads. As an active, stimulating pair, there’s no end to your adventures. Socially and mentally, you’re similar: moving at lightening speed and charming everyone along the way. Since neither of you like to settle down for long, travel could become a way of life. This gal will probably keep you entertained and curious unlike any other sign. She’s your intellectual equal and partner in crime. Sounds fun to me!
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: The challenge with you two might be your fickleness. She could be the more reliable one in the relationship, and your changeable nature may stress her out. Since she probably needs a peaceful and orderly place to call home, you might have to put on your apron and play housewife once in awhile. Will you be able to  hack it? As long as there is enough variety and freedom in your relationship, things should run smoothly. Make sure your communication is in tip-top shape so you can deal with conflict effectively.
cc_sign_match.Romance: Do you feel like you’ve stepped into a fairy tale? Your Dragon’s mysticism is famous. She’s the knight in shining armor, the war hero, the Ulysses to your Penelope. Whatever she does. She’ll do it 100%. This should bode well with your personality type, and she’ll love trying to keep up with you. Bold gestures and wild sentiments are the name of the game. Have fun playing!
cc_sign_match.Sex: Not everyone can handle the blowtorch bedroom behavior of a Dragon, but you can! This gal’s magnetism is a powerful force. You both can be passionate and ardent between the sheets, but you may clash over who gets to be on top. She probably won’t hold back her emotions either, so expect plenty of grunting, moaning, and the like while you’re getting busy. But just when you think she’s being a bit crude. She’ll kiss you tenderly and tell you how beautiful you are. Your best bet? Let her take the lead and she’ll take care of your every need.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: Opposites attract, but they also create friction. If you’re paired up with a Snake gal, you’ll probably notice she’s an entirely different life form. She’s usually got a strong need for solitude and security, while you’re scampering around town in your carefree fashion. Consistency might be hard to achieve here, since she wants to know where she stands and you might have trouble committing. If you can give her plenty of reassurance and she can let you run free, it could work.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: Since you’re Yang, and she’s Yin, there could be opposing forces at work. As a Yang sign, you’re probably autonomous, enthusiastic, curious, and industrious. Yang energy people are usually go-getters who tend to be assertive. Her Yin energy probably makes her compromising, intuitive, diplomatic, and passive. With different energy natures, you two may find it a challenge to understand each other’s motives or personalities.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: There are some positive qualities in your match. You probably admire her gregarious and generous nature, while she loves your spitfire attitude. Socially, you’ll be active and fun-loving as a team. Also, there might be a strong physical attractive force between you, if only because you’re so different from each other. You both can learn a thing or two if you’re open to constructive criticism. You could stand to be a bit more sensitive to her feelings, while she could learn to be more adventurous and less judgmental.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: If you’re a typical Horse, you might cringe at the idea of holy matrimony, or even a monogamous relationship. Probably content to be alone, you simply want to remain free. However. She may be unsettled with a woman who balks at partnership. If she has indulgent or lazy tendencies, this will most likely irritate you. Are you more conservative and practical than her? If she wants your respect. She might have to give up some of those Snake-like extravagances. Your best bet? Communicate. Compromise. Be flexible and willing to change.
cc_sign_match.Romance: Your Snake woman invented the meaning of romance. She’s got enough charm and slippery moves to break hearts all over the world. You might find her style a bit over the top – she can be intense. But. She can make a girl feel like she’s the only one in the world. Lucky you! Keep her guessing, as she can have a wandering eye. If she thinks she doesn’t have you. She’ll be banging down your door until she’s sure you’re her again.
cc_sign_match.Sex: The seductive Snake is legendary for her moves! Your sexual styles may be a bit different, but you’ll probably be satisfied with her in the sack. She’s more of a slow-moving lover than a quick-to-finish type. For her, sex is usually about sensuality and connection. She likes to intertwine limbs, and the feel of skin to skin contact can arouse her instantly. The way to please her? Move slowly and seductively. Crawl and slither on top of her like one of her own kind. It won’t take long before you know the meaning of a Snake woman's seductive powers.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: So you found another of your own kind? Nothing is certain when you pair up two independent, restless animals! The good news is a Horse gal will probably understand your need for freedom more than most. She enjoys the dirt beneath her feet and the wind in her hair as much as you do. Marriage? Kids? Mortgage? It might not happen right away for you two free spirits. However, you could be OK with that. As long as you’re both content with an unconventional relationship, things will probably be lively and lovely with this gal.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: There are two yang personalities in this relationship. How will that fare for a love connection? Let’s just say there will be plenty of ambition and passion to go around. Yang energy typically makes you assertive, proactive, outgoing, and goal-oriented – just like her. This means you’ll probably have similar personalities and temperaments. However, you might have power struggles as well. If you two have enough Yin qualities to balance it out, the relationship will run more smoothly.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: What can you expect with another Horse? Double the excitement, and double the fun! You’re two peas in a pod. There could be a strong and fast bond that glues you together for life. Both high-energy risk takers and radical thinkers, you probably love being in motion and now you have a companion for the road. This match might be the envy of all your friends – you’re a witty, lively, and charming pair. Whether jetting off to Mexico for Christmas or starting a chicken farm in Tennessee, you two probably won’t run out of big ideas.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: If one of you has a more conservative streak, things could get tricky. Should you or she want to settle down, this could be the dividing factor in the relationship. Typically, you’ll both want your freedom and independence, putting your own dreams and goals over the good of the relationship. Running a home together might get messy, too, since neither of you tends to be good at remembering the details. Your biggest challenge will probably be consistency and compromise.
cc_sign_match.Romance: Oh, to be a fly on the wall during your first date. Practically anything could happen when this gal shows up on your doorstep. Maybe you’ll go skinny dipping at the local YMCA. Or perhaps you’ll go bungee jumping at the Grand Canyon. This gal’s style is one of adventure and thrills. She’ll probably want to take you on extreme outdoor excursions or to wildly crowded concerts and parties. While some would shy away from danger and chaos, you probably won’t blink an eye. My advice? Sign up for a life insurance policy before you go on that first date.
cc_sign_match.Sex: If all else fails, at least you’ll have fun between the sheets! Picture a wild stampede with plenty of surprises. You probably match her in stamina and passion, so don’t be surprised if your sexcapades last all day – or all week! Remember to come up for air. She’s probably goal-oriented in bed, just like in life. Take turns being dominant, too. The best part? After a good romp, you’ll probably want to hang out and talk. Hot sex and a solid friendship? You couldn’t ask for more.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: On the surface, a Sheep woman might not seem like your type. She’s probably a domesticated homebody with somewhat of a moody streak. If you look closer, however, you might see a diamond in the rough. This woman can usually provide you with a stable home base while not infringing on your freedom. Not only that. She’ll probably keep you on your toes with plenty of variety and her unconventional approach to life. As two free-spirited, progressive people, this could be an enduring match indeed.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: You are Yang and she is Yin. Sometimes a relationship with opposite energies is tumultuous, but this match could be harmonious. Your hard-driving ambition might complement her unusual and eccentric pursuits. With enough fast and aggressive Yang energy, things should stay exciting in love. Additionally, a good dose of her calm Yin energy can smooth over the wrinkles. Even though you have different temperaments, you can probably appreciate one another’s unique personalities.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: The typical Sheep can sometimes suffer from doubt or insecurities. With you around, however. She’ll get a huge helping of sunshine and positive energy. You’ll probably encourage her to take life less seriously, while she can help you stay grounded and calm. You two can dream up the most unusual schemes and keep each other entertained with lively conversation and philosophical debate. The best part. She’s got an independent streak, which gives you free reign to have yours.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Trouble in paradise could arise when your Sheep woman feels abandoned. It’s probably in your nature to roam, but her sensitive side might have a problem with that. The bigger challenge, however, will probably be her tendency to stuff her feelings. She may keep things to himself for some time – perhaps even until it’s too late to resolve them.  Since she typically feels a need for attention and security, you might need to be more accommodating about giving her your whereabouts while you’re off on all your adventures and give her some extra stroking when you return.
cc_sign_match.Romance: Your Sheep woman is no stranger to romance. Gentle love songs, candlelight dinners and roses are her hallmarks. You can expect plenty of affection. Of course she’ll be looking for the same in return. Valentine’s Day could be her most important holiday of the year. Nothing will be too good for you in her eyes.  You’ve got a tender lover there – enjoy. Mood is everything to her, the more romantic the better. Her approach may be slow, but just you wait until she gets warmed up! Can you say steamy?!
cc_sign_match.Sex: Your Sheep gal has her own style in the sack. If you’ve made it to bed with her, you know what I’m talking about. She’s probably got one or two strange quirks that either wildly turn you on or repel you completely. A lover of spontaneity and variety yourself, you’ll probably appreciate how kinky and unusual she is between the sheets. What’s better, however, is her innate sensitivity and kindness in lovemaking. She wants sex to be beautiful, spiritual, and fun all at the same time. And she puts in the effort to make it so. Sounds good to me!

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and a Monkey woman have areas of similar interest. Your differences, however, could prevent you from getting along very well. Both social, versatile, and outgoing, you might meet at a museum benefit, cocktail party, or other social gathering. But can you both keep your egos out of the relationship long enough for it to survive. She’s independent and practical – like you, but this could cause a butting of the heads rather than a meeting of the minds. The focus here will probably be a balancing act between two strong-willed, mentally quick individuals.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: Two Yang personalities might cause friction in this relationship. Even though your energies are similar, you’re probably just different enough to not quite understand each other. Typically, your Yang energy manifests in a free-spirited, idealistic, and adventurous personality. Your Monkey woman, however, is more of a rational thinker, planner, and fun-seeking individual. Translation? You’re both ambitious and assertive, albeit in different ways and for different reasons.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: With another social, gregarious, and active creature, you’ll probably find yourself stimulated and entertained to no end. Your woman knows how to have fun, and you’ll gladly hop in for the ride! Neither of you likes to stay in one place for too long, so don’t worry about getting bored with this gal. With your common sense and her innovative thinking skills, you two could easily run a business, travel the world, or become influential political figures together. It’s not likely you’ll run out of things to do or people to impress.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Should one of you happen to lag behind, you might be left in the dust. This gal can be somewhat self-centered, and you’re known for that fierce independence. If you part ways to pursue different things, there may not be enough reasons to join forces again. And for her parting is sorrow, that she’s not going to get over easily. While you may enjoy each other’s lively company, a lasting bond might be difficult to maintain. If one of you is more domesticated or home-oriented, there’s probably a better chance for success. Cooperation might be key if you’re going to make it work.
cc_sign_match.Romance: If you don’t make it in a long-term relationship, at least you’ll have a ball in the romance department! The reason for your initial attraction is probably your mutual love of adventure and fun. This gal can be flamboyant and knows how to impress. Sailing on Sunday? Wine tasting on Wednesday? Five-star dinner on Friday? You got it. She’s not afraid to show off her success and shower you with the best life has to offer. You may be a bit more rugged, however, so her flashy style could seem too over-the-top. In any case, you’ll probably be spoiled with her hanging around.
cc_sign_match.Sex: What’s the best way to keep your Monkey woman’s attention in the sack? Keep her guessing, of course. Her mental curiosity needs constant feeding, so mind tricks and games of cat and mouse will probably be arousing for her. She often wants what she sees as unattainable, so even if you’re in for the long haul, keep her on her toes. Sex should be playful, amusing, and fun with her – so long as neither of you gets bored.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and the exacting Rooster might not seem the likeliest of pairs. She’s got clear cut ideas about her life plan, while you’re open to detours and changes in direction. As two people with strong opinions and stubborn tendencies, you might have a hard time being flexible with each other. She may not understand your free spirit while you can’t comprehend her rigid thinking. Most likely, there will have to be plenty of mutual compromise in order for you two to get along well.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: As a Yang-Yin match up, you two probably have dissimilar personalities and ways of approaching life. As a fast, outgoing, and social Yang person, you probably prefer movement and variety. Your Rooster woman’s Yin energy probably makes her more reserved, methodical, and subtle in her temperament and personality. A good relationship usually has a balance of Yin and Yang energies. However, people with different orientations can sometimes clash. You might find this gal is too different to understand; and vice versa.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: Together, you two could make a powerful team. Your stable, methodical, and perfectionist Rooster can lend you just the qualities you may lack. In turn, you can teach her to loosen up a bit and go with the flow. Want to join forces for a common goal or project? As two power players, you could be an intimidating pair! Your grandiose ideas with her practical nature might enable success for both of you – but does it translate into your relationship? It’s kind of a toss up.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: You probably don’t do well when someone gives orders, and this woman will want to boss you around. Don’t take it personally – it’s just her way. She’ll offer her opinion on everything from the color of your hair to your chosen career path. Can you see how she’d drive you crazy? Also, your free-spirited ways might have her scratching her head. She typically doesn’t understand carelessness or frivolity, which might be part of your makeup. The verdict? You’ll probably have to be willing to discuss things with her instead of running off. In turn. She’ll have to become less rigid.
cc_sign_match.Romance: Things might be oddly compatible for you in the romance department. This woman loves the chase, and you’re probably always running. Your wild and spontaneous nature will have her completely awestruck. If she does manage to pin you down for a date. She’ll treat it like a powerful conquest. Try to be well-groomed and articulate around her – she’ll probably be quick to point out if your makeup is smudged, or you aren’t up to date on current politics. Look good, smell good, and make sure you impress her with your wit.
cc_sign_match.Sex: What can I say about her sexual preferences? A little strange, to say the least. She may be into power plays in the bedroom – always wanting the control over a helpless female. Some might accuse her of being misogynistic, but it may just be her thirst for domination in any form. Give her a taste of her own medicine if you’re tired of being the passive one in bed. Another thing? Appeal to her fetishes. It’s likely she’s got more than one strange, sexual obsession.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: As another animal in your Love Triangle group, a Dog woman is probably a good match for you. Hooray! If you’re a typical, restless Horse, you can enjoy this gal’s dependable, down-to-earth nature. She’ll probably admire your guts and gusto, while being totally content to stay in the background and hold down the fort. What’s more, you generally won’t have to give up your independence around her – she needs her alone time too. This could be a satisfying and fulfilling match for both of you.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: Both of your signs are Yang energy. Neither of you like to sit back and watch the action happen; you both want to be the one who starts it! In your own ways you’re probably driven to achieve successful careers and fulfilling lives. This woman will want to take the reins, but that shouldn’t bother you too much. You see she probably prefers heading the routine stuff and you enjoy the march into unchartered territory. Sharing the driver’s seat? Not a problem. You’ll both have plenty of opportunities to call the shots in your own comfort zone.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: You might learn a lot from this philosophical, deep-natured Dog. She’ll keep you entertained and curious with good conversation, and you’ll satisfy her sense of humor with your charisma and charm. A strong friendship is likely at first, which could develop into a long-lasting relationship or marriage. The best part of this match might be your similar need for alone time. Neither of you is likely to object when the other wants a bit of freedom. What a relief!
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: If your Dog woman gets a little moody, you might meet with her dark side. One of the challenges of this relationship could be your different ways of dealing with emotional stress. Try not to run away when things get rocky – this could alienate her quickly. Things to work on. She might need to be more candid and less withholding. You might need to be a bit more sensitive and tactful.
cc_sign_match.Romance: You might not get a whole lot of fireworks and magic with a Dog woman, but you’ll get plenty of good old fashioned romance. She’s the kind of gal who will open your car door, bring you fresh flowers at work, and be there for you when you really need her. Instead of fast and ferocious, being courted by her will probably feel slow and comfortable. And just when you’re feeling a bit bored. She’ll surprise you with something so tender and sweet you’ll remember why you fell for her in the first place.
cc_sign_match.Sex: This match might have you between the sheets – fast. There’s probably a strong physical connection in addition to your hearty friendship. She may not be the most innovative lover, but she’s probably sentimental, sweet, and tender. You might be glad to know she’ll let you be on top. In fact. She probably prefers it that way! Just be careful with her ego. This gal can bruise easily, so be aware when she’s being vulnerable in bed. When your passion meets her sensitivity, there’s a high likelihood of sexual bliss!

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: Two pleasure-seekers can always have a good time! The Pig woman is social, happy-go-lucky, and loveable – like you. You two might be the hottest couple in town, what with your gregarious nature and her innate charm. Since you both understand the meaning of compromise, you’ll probably be able to smooth over differences easily. It won’t all be rosy, however, since your lifestyles might be quite different. She’s probably a homebody while you’re a roamer. If you can meet in the middle, things might work out well.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: she’s a Yin sign, which means she’s probably easygoing, peaceful, and calm. Yang energy typically makes you the get up and go type, which might bring conflict over what constitutes a fun Saturday night. If you can admire each other’s strengths and give credit where it’s deserved, you’ll be much better off. Any relationship needs both Yin and Yang energy to stay harmonious. Try to strike a balance.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: The Pig woman can keep up with you in her own way. She’s a social creature and typically well-liked by everyone. Is your social calendar always full? It probably will be that way with her. You two love a good time and always know how to find one. Also, neither of you tend to have unrealistic ideas about relationships, which might make things easier. Good laughs, witty conversation, and sensual indulgences will probably be plentiful with your Pig woman.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: While your different natures might often mesh, they can also cause conflict. She’s probably not as free-spirited or spontaneous as you, so settling down together might be a long-standing battle. Also, both of you might throw caution to the wind just a bit too much. Parties, social functions, and vacations might keep you entertained, but who’s going to pay the bills and do the laundry? Staying practical and flexible will probably be necessary in the long run.
cc_sign_match.Romance: A woman usually remembers dating a Pig woman. She was the one who always paid attention to her feelings, noticed the little things, and seemed like the nicest, most pleasant gal she’d ever met. Sound like your woman. She typically doesn’t have a mean bone in her body – unless you injure her, and that’s another story. Oh, did I mention she’ll go out of her way to make sure you’re happy? You can usually expect the best and get it from this gal. How wonderful.
cc_sign_match.Sex: This gal can be a surprising bundle of contradictions in bed. She’s sweet, then dirty. She’s sensual, then crude. If she seems a bit silly or strange, you’re probably just witnessing her total sexual honesty. She can be a bit perverted underneath her good-natured, nice gal act. But, deep down. She probably wants long-lasting, soul-shattering love. And. She wants to experience it through sex. She’ll probably satisfy your appetite for strange and unusual sexual encounters. Just make sure to wrap your arms around her and tell her you love her after you’re done.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: While your Rat woman typically leads a busy and productive social life, you probably have a more reserved artist’s soul. Your differences are, well, glaring, so you may have to work hard at a fulfilling relationship. She’ll be off dancing at a night club, and you’ll spend the weekend at a wilderness retreat. Connecting at home might help your love grow, as your woman treats her loved ones with special concern and generosity – exactly what your worrisome heart needs. Can you find common ground between her scheming, fast-paced ways with your dreamy and emotional nature? If so, this match might work.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: As Yin and Yang, you two probably couldn’t be more different. Yin energy might make you the passive, receptive, feeling-oriented one. She, in contrast, probably has the aggressive, ambitious, and outgoing qualities associated with Yang. Since relationships need a bit of both energies to stay balanced, your match could be harmonious. It also, however, could be challenging since your temperaments may be opposite.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: Viva la good life! That’s probably a motto you both subscribe to. Her knack for money making? Your impeccable taste? A cushy future may be in the cards. Neither of you is typically aggressive or outspoken, so you can probably tend to each other’s feelings with sensitivity and tenderness. That strong, protective figure you seek is embodied in your Rat woman. And for her, you’ll probably create a serene and peaceful place she can enjoy at the end of a long day.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Have you been scolded for spending all her hard-earned cash? If not, a stern lecture may be on its way. You might have to curb your appetite for fine things, since your woman doesn’t tolerate frivolity very well. There are probably things she needs to work on too. Her logical, left-brained approach to life can probably seem cold or insensitive when you’re needing emotional support. It’s nothing personal. You two just approach life in very different ways. Be careful, too, about stuffing your feelings. Since neither of you likes to argue, things could get swept under the rug.
cc_sign_match.Romance: Your Rat woman is not a true romantic in the traditional sense of the word. However. She’s probably generous, supportive, and fun to date. She’ll probably pick a best friend or partner in crime type over an empty-headed supermodel beauty. She’ll be intrigued by your philosophical mind and classy style, but you don’t need to impress her with fancy clothes or outstanding credentials. She won’t take you on the same date twice with her innate sense of adventure, quick mind, and social nature. If you can show off your big brain and make her laugh, you’ll probably have her hooked.
cc_sign_match.Sex: Your sexual styles may be like night and day. She’s probably quick to act, aggressive, and goal-oriented between the sheets. You, on the other hand, might see sex as a spiritual portal to higher consciousness – preferring a slow and sensual style. What you may have in common, however, is a willingness to try new things. She’s always up for a thrill, and you can have an open mind when it comes to doing the deed. Keep her guessing, as she loves the chase, and there will be plenty to work with as lovers.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: In general, opposite signs in the Chinese Zodiac are drawn to each other like moths to the flame. Your stable and persevering Ox woman is a sharp contrast to your free-spirited, capricious nature. While you may be wildly attracted to your polar opposite, it’s probably wise to tread carefully. A consuming infatuation could eventually be replaced by grim realities of your differences. It might be best to take things slowly with this gal before declaring your undying love.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: As two Yin signs, there might not be enough assertive Yang energy in your relationship. She’s probably somewhat reserved, passive, and non-confrontational – like you. Trouble could pop up when both of you turn inward instead of hashing things out on the spot. On a positive note, your similar temperaments can help you understand one another better. If one of you is a bit more dominant, ambitious, and outgoing, you’ll typically have a better energy balance in the relationship.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: You can picture a cozy home, a crackling fire, and a strong shoulder to lean on with your Ox around. She’s usually the strong, silent type and will always defend your honor. With her innate sense of responsibility and duty, you can rely on her to balance your checkbook and pay the mortgage on time. In turn, you’ll probably bring out her sensitive side. She can appreciate your loving sentiments like having dinner on the table or giving her a backrub after a long day. Since you both probably prefer quiet time over the bustling social scene, you’ll have consistent company – just the way you like it.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Do you have a hard time making decisions? If so, arguments could erupt over your fickleness, since she’s a woman with a plan. In turn. Her need for schedules and routine might give you anxiety. A go-with-the-flow attitude is a foreign concept to her, so you may have to at least feign a sense of organization. This gal can have high expectations, so don’t be surprised if she doesn’t tend to your every bad mood or emotional injury. You’ll probably have to buck up and be a bit more tough-skinned. Can you hack it?
cc_sign_match.Romance: Oh boy. The most romantic sign of the Chinese Zodiac meets the least. Your fairy-tale notions about Prince Charming are probably a waste of time with your Ox. It’s not that she’s crude or unfeeling – she just expresses love in her own practical way. Why would she waste money on buying you flowers when she can rip out those weeds in the backyard and plant a rosebush. Her idea of romance probably has more to do with keeping you fed, clothed, and safe than sweeping you off your feet. But hey. At least she’s consistent!
cc_sign_match.Sex: Your Ox woman is not the most sexually spontaneous of creatures. However, below that tough exterior is a reserve of passion. Your job will be to tap into it. Know that saying that suggests the fastest way to a woman’s heart is through her stomach? Appeal to her senses with a home-cooked meal, give her a back rub, and listen while she talks about her day. Unleash the power of your feminine magic, and she’ll probably crumble under the softness of your touch. Another thing. Let her be the aggressor. It’s no use battling her sheer force.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: The sheer pull of a Tiger woman can be overwhelming. She’s got the magnetism and charm of a movie star or politician, doesn’t she? You two may initially hit it off, but a long-term match could be tricky. After sweeping you off your feet. She may balk at your demands in a real relationship. While she probably enjoys being your knight in shining armor. She also needs plenty of freedom. With a skittish and sometimes worrisome nature, you might want someone a bit more attentive. cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: This guy might be a bit withholding. Do you suspect him of having secrets? He’s probably not hiding anything, but you may feel insecure around this popular, well-loved guy. Try to give him the benefit of the doubt. He’s probably a more private person, so communicate instead of making assumptions. He might get frustrated when your rigid thinking meets his flexible nature. But, with a little understanding and respect, you two should get past any relationship hurdles.
cc_sign_match.Romance: You don’t have to worry about lack of romance with this man! He invented the meaning of charm, which, deep down, you’ll appreciate. He’ll try to woo you with candlelit dinners, deep discussions, and soul-penetrating eye contact. This man typically wants to connect, and you could be a perfect fit. Remember not to rush him along – he does things in his own time, especially romance. Since he can be secretive, he’ll probably reveal himself slowly over time. Let him go at his own pace.
cc_sign_match.Sex: There’s something about this man that makes your toes curl. It’s likely there will be a strong attraction between you two since you’re in the same Love Triangle in the Chinese Zodiac. But does it translate into sexual sparks? Oh yes! Your bedroom style is possibly a bit different than your Snake man’s, but your connection will probably be out of this world. He’s slow and sensuous. You’re physical and passionate. Sexual bliss! You generally won’t have to work too hard to be satisfied in the sack with this guy. He knows exactly what he’s doing and how to do it.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: In many ways, your Horse man may feel like your total opposite. Your personalities conflict in a number of ways. While he’s generally carefree and unrestrained, you’re probably conscientiousness and conservative. The freedom from attachment he craves is precisely the opposite of what you want: security and routine. Though different, you both can be incredibly passionate people. Whether or not the passion for each other can last, however, could be the central issue.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: The Horse is a Yang sign, while you are Yin. Relationships tend to need a balance of both energies to stay harmonious, but opposite energies can clash. Your general nature is probably more reactive and reserved than someone with Yang energy. On the flip side, he’s typically more aggressive and adventurous than you. The key here would probably be understanding each other’s different temperaments.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: Despite his independent personality, he probably wants someone to lean on. That’s good, since you’ll love being his rock. You can probably provide him with the love and security he craves, deep down. In contrast, he might be just the person to draw you out of you comfort zone. He can teach you to lighten up and live more freely, while you can show him the value of a steady, dependable partner. All in all, you each have strengths that can support the foundation of this relationship, as long as your differences don’t break it apart.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: You probably like the pleasantries of a safe and secure home, while he’s happy to float around aimlessly. Marriage might be out of the question if he isn’t willing to settle down in one place. You might not understand his need for constant diversions – it could make you feel you’re not enough. It’s not likely you’ll accompany him on his wild excursions, but he probably wants to fly solo anyway. He’ll have to give you the promise of his love before asking permission for freedom. It’s probably the only way you two will work things out.
cc_sign_match.Romance: His impulsive nature should keep things interesting if you’re dating. Don’t expect him to be a planner – he tends to fly by the seat of his pants. On the other hand, you won’t have to worry about sitting home on a Saturday night with your Horse guy. Trotting around town, you’ll hit up all the social events with style. He’ll probably take you on plenty of outdoor adventures, so make sure you show off your rugged side.
cc_sign_match.Sex: Nothing revs up his engine like action. Don’t try the same tricks twice with this guy, and do expect him to surprise you. As long as you can keep things interesting, you’ll hold his attention. The sex could be pretty sweltering with your physical passion and his energy. But, make sure you bring your intimate behavior out of the bedroom too. The thrill of doing it in unusual places and seeing your wild side will keep him from getting bored.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: In general, opposite signs in the Chinese Zodiac are drawn to each other like moths to the flame. Your stable and persevering nature is a sharp contrast to the free-spirited, capricious Sheep. While you may be wildly attracted to your polar opposite, it’s probably wise to tread carefully. A consuming infatuation could eventually be replaced by grim realities of your differences. It might be best to take things slowly with this guy before declaring your undying love.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: As two Yin signs, there might not be enough assertive Yang energy in your relationship. He’s probably somewhat reserved, passive, and non-confrontational – like you. Trouble could pop up when both of you turn inward instead of hashing things out on the spot. On a positive note, your similar temperaments can help you understand one another better. If one of you is a bit more dominant, ambitious, and outgoing, you’ll typically have a better energy balance in the relationship.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: You can picture a cozy home, a crackling fire, and your sensitive Sheep to share it with. He’s usually the loving, generous type and will always defend your honor. With your innate sense of responsibility and duty, you’ll probably take care of the practical things like balancing your checkbook and paying the mortgage on time. In turn, he’ll bring out your sensitive, lighthearted side. You can appreciate his loving sentiments like having dinner on the table or giving you a backrub after a long day. Since you both probably prefer quiet time over the bustling social scene, you’ll have consistent company – just the way you like it.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Does he have a hard time making decisions? If so, arguments could erupt over his fickleness, since you’re a woman with a plan! In turn, your need for schedules and routine might give him anxiety. A go-with-the-flow attitude is a foreign concept to you, so he’ll have to at least feign a sense of organization. This guy can have high expectations, so don’t be surprised if he gets moody or out of sorts when life doesn’t deliver what he wants. Luckily, you can probably help him stay grounded.
cc_sign_match.Romance: You’ll delight in your sensual Sheep, who’s romantic in his own unique way. He may not adhere to traditions – he tends to follow his own path – but he’ll give you plenty of reasons to smile. He’ll pick you a bouquet of wild flowers or hand-write a love note. If you’re lactose intolerant, he’ll bake you a dairy-free cake for your birthday. This guy is good at interesting, tender surprises. Although, he can be forgetful, so make sure you remind him of your anniversary – and even your dinner plans.
cc_sign_match.Sex: This holistically-minded guy will probably approach sex from a mind-body-spirit stance. He’s not just interested in getting it done quick and dirty. He wants to experience an emotional connection via a physical union. You may not be as mushy-gushy, but you can probably open up your emotional floodgates with this man. He can penetrate your heart in spite of defenses, so make sure he’s trustworthy before you hop in the sack and get attached. Another thing? He can be pretty kinky. Don’t be confused if he’s sweet and raunchy at the same time. That’s just him.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: As two people who know what they want, you may discover what you don’t want in this relationship. It can be a fair match if you’re well aware of your differences, but you may be too dissimilar for a long-term union. Your Monkey’s capricious and playful nature is in direct opposition to your serious and conservative personality. While you may want to settle down into a life of security and routine, he probably needs independence and freedom. You’ll probably have to work at a satisfying match.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: He’s a Yang sign while you are Yin. With different energy orientations you could find it hard to understand each other’s temperaments. You’re probably more passive, introverted, and easy-going. He, on the other hand, usually wants to be where the action is. This could create challenges if you can’t learn to compromise or find similar interests. He may not understand your quiet, reserved personality, while you don’t get his daring and unconventional approach to life.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: You may have the very qualities your Monkey could be lacking, and vice versa. Your seriousness and industriousness could be a good match for his sharp mental capabilities and lofty goals. If you join forces, a lot can be accomplished here. In turn, his carefree attitude could help loosen you up a bit. Since you each share strong opinions regarding just about everything, you both can learn a thing or two from the other – if you’re willing to be open-minded.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Eventually, you’ll probably want to settle down. His independent nature might make you uneasy, and he’s probably not quick to give up his freedom. If he’s not willing to listen or follow your advice, you may become tyrannical or irritatingly stubborn. Neither of you are likely to back down and bend to the other’s wishes, which should make for some interesting arguments. Since he can’t be told what to do, and you refuse to give up authority, you might not get far unless you’re both willing to compromise.
cc_sign_match.Romance: There’s no one quite like your Monkey man to make a girl feel spoiled. He may be the most generous sign in the Chinese Zodiac when it comes to romancing the object of his affection. Living in the lap of luxury? This should go over well with you! He probably won’t be stingy with his time, resources, or help, so long as you laugh at his jokes and be a good sport when he plays his little pranks. He may not be the best person to spill your feelings to – he’s probably not very mushy – gushy – but that’s fine with you.  With him around, at least you can count on plenty of romantic surprises.
cc_sign_match.Sex: Most women have fun between the sheets with a Monkey. Why wouldn’t you, after all? He’s playful, amusing, and lighthearted in bed. However, your style is probably more serious than his happy-go-lucky approach. You may not get an emotional connection with him, but he’ll typically be generous and eager to please. In fact, he can probably help you lighten up a little, while you might unearth his sensual side. Another thing? He can be wildly inventive, so don’t be surprised if he wants to try something different. Your best bet is probably to let him experiment.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and your Rooster make a nearly perfect pair. Hooray! He’s another animal in your Zodiac Love Triangle. You’re quite similar in temperaments and values, while your differences are usually complementary. You both are rather conservative in approaching life: preferring practical, tried-and-true methods to anything risky. His perfectionism meshes well with your penchant for doing things right and honorably. All in all, you two make a strong and practical team.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: Both of you are Yin signs, which means you’ll have little trouble understanding one another’s approach to life Neither of you tend to be aggressive or proactive, which is fine – you’ll both be content to create a cozy home together and live a quieter existence. In general, you can probably respect each other’s temperaments and give one another what you need.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: With your sturdy personality, you can serve as the backbone for the relationship, while his keen eye and innate resourcefulness can move things forward when it’s stagnant. You both value trustworthiness and honesty, so neither of you will ever give the other reason for jealousy or possessiveness. When in love, your normally shy, serious and reserved demeanor gives way to a deep sweetness. Enjoy!
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: One of the challenges between you may result from your mutual tendency to be rather blunt, critical or judgmental.  Both of you tend to have honest, direct natures and want things done your own way. With a mutual stubbornness, you might have to work on the art of compromise. You typically won’t back down, and he’s used to getting his way, isn’t he?! Luckily, you can probably work past these challenges regardless of your differences.
cc_sign_match.Romance: Your flamboyant Rooster stands out in a crowd. He’s the one who looks dashingly sharp, impresses you with his wit, and teases you relentlessly as a form of flirting. He tends to look for a feminine ideal – someone who looks flawless and acts impeccably. But, he’ll probably be content as long as he can get his way with you! The best way to get this guy’s attention is probably to ignore him. He’ll come beating down your door, demanding a date. The passive, aloof approach should come quite naturally to you while working wonders on him!
cc_sign_match.Sex: Your Rooster man loves to be in control. His sexual style is a bit dramatic and intense. He may be one of those guys who’ll withhold your pleasure for the sake of torture. A bit punishing and sadistic, you might not find his sweet and sensitive side right away! It’s there – but very deep down. Your best bet? Agree to play his games and he’ll reward you with the satisfaction and affection you’re looking for.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: Your Dog guy may be attracted to your Ox strength and stability but could find your domineering ways a bit too forceful for his liking. While he probably shies away from conflict or distress, he can be a bit cantankerous and moody—which you may not know how to deal with. Both of you probably share honest and trustworthy natures, but there may not be sufficient sparks to keep the heat of passion alive. If you can respect one another’s differences, however, you might be able to create a comfortable relationship.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: He is a Yang sign; you are Yin. While you both tend to be creatures of habit, you may be a bit more passive and reactive than your Dog. He will generally get worked up over things dear to his heart, but you can be coldly logical and detached—especially if you see everyone around you getting emotional. His friendly and communicative personality might become stifled by your introverted, stoic one. All in all, your different energies might take some work to balance out.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: Not many signs are as faithful and loyal as you, but your Dog probably will be. Both of you can be strongly attached to the ones you love, so there shouldn’t be much worry about infidelity in this relationship. Since he might struggle with inherent trust issues, you will be a wise investment for the long-term. Both of you adhere to high standards for yourself and others, so your relationship will probably be morally sound and predictable. Together, you can create a harmonious and orderly home life that’s cozy and comfortable for both.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: If you push around your Dog man one too many times, you may unleash that bark. Your stern lectures may come from a place of love, but he can get agitated with people who are bullies. When his outspoken and independent nature meets your rigid thinking, there might be monumental arguments or clashes in opinion. These upsets could send him into a tailspin of worry and anxiety, which you may view as childish or unnecessary.
cc_sign_match.Romance: You might not get fireworks and magic with your Dog man, but he’ll pay close attention to your needs. He’s the kind of guy who will open your car door, bring you fresh flowers at work, and be there for you when no one else is. Instead of fast and passionate, being courted by him will probably feel slow and comfortable. And just when you’re feeling a bit bored, he’ll surprise you with something so tender and sweet you’ll remember why you fell for him in the first place.
cc_sign_match.Sex: With a solid friendship, sex with your guy might be quite fulfilling. He may not be the most innovative lover, but he’s probably plenty willing to satisfy you in bed. He’s got a hearty appetite for sex, and you’ll probably take turns being in charge. Just be careful with his ego. He can bruise easily, so be gentle with his feelings and give him every reason to trust you. His traditional side and your passionate one could also result in some interesting bedroom play if you’re both willing to compromise.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and your Pig guy can be a good match, but you may be a sedentary pair. When you come together, both of your sensualist natures are heightened -- making food, leisure, lovemaking, and sleeping high priorities! There’s nothing wrong with that, but you may need a bit of spunk to keep things interesting. Your calm, grounded nature can complement his positive, pleasant one. He can help draw you out of your shell while you offer the stability and faithfulness he needs in a partner.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: Both of your signs are Yin oriented. What does that mean? You’ll generally approach life the same way. Yin energy people are usually receptive, intuitive, calm, and perhaps a bit introverted. You probably prefer to stay under the radar and observe things instead of being at the center of action. Most likely, he’s more passive, tolerant, and giving – like you. Since you’re of the same energy orientation, you stand to understand each other.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: You two can probably bring out the best in each other. You appreciate him for his selfless, devoted spirit, while he loves you for your hard-working, loyal nature. You probably won’t find much to argue about since you understand and forgive one another’s faults easily. That strong, loyal, loving figure you probably look for in a man is the essence of your Pig.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: While you love sensual pleasures as much as him, you may not appreciate him spending your hard-earned money on hot-stone massages or a $200 bottle of wine. Does he wish you were more demonstrative and emotionally available? Probably. You may be cold and logical when he needs warm and nurturing. With his tolerant and forgiving nature, however, he should be able to help you loosen up a bit. You, in turn, can be the disciplinarian when he’s being too extravagant.
cc_sign_match.Romance: While he is probably no Don Juan, he’s very in tune with the female species. He’ll court you slowly and carefully, making sure you’re trustworthy and kind. After time, you’ll notice how attentive and intuitive he is. He knows what you need, when you need it, and wants to fall in love with you passionately and wholly. His tenderness and sensitivity are matched by your passion. Just make sure you aren’t rushing into things. As two sensual creatures, you can both get swept away easily.
cc_sign_match.Sex: Your Pig guy is a curious blend of sweet and salty. He’s sensitive, but quirky – especially in the bedroom. He’ll want to wine and dine you before he takes you off on his white horse to a bed scattered with rose petals. He can be more attached to fantasies than anything else, so don’t be surprised if he gets cranky when he finds out you’re not perfect. But, he’ll forgive it quickly. If you can appeal to his sensual side, you’ll have him hooked.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: So you’ve found yourself a Rat? You and the rodent may not be two peas in a pod, mostly because you’re so similar! This guy loves being the center of attention – like you – so you may battle for the spotlight around him. The good news is you’re both warm-hearted and loving. You’ll benefit from his generosity, and he’ll admire your courage. If you want to keep him around, you’ll have to decide early who’s going to be on top and how to work out your differences.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: You’re both Yang. What does that mean? He’s action-oriented, adventurous, and outgoing – like you. He probably loves a challenge and filling up his social calendar. You’re right at home with his competitive, upbeat nature. It may seem you both want to take the wheel and drive! You’ll have plenty to keep you busy while you’re running around with him. One thing is almost certain: There shouldn’t be any shortage of energy and ambition between you two!
cc_sign_match.TheGood: Competitive, social, and needing to succeed – that could sum up this relationship. It’s not likely anyone will be bored in this match! You’ll love his spontaneous nature. He’ll have fun chasing you around from one adventure to the next. Family and friends will probably play a big role in your lives. Your home could be the hotbed for boisterous gatherings and parties. With your charisma and his charm, this is a dynamic duo indeed.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Things could feel like one big power play. Can you give up the need to be right? You might have to with this guy. He’s just as competitive as you! Be careful about spending all of his hard-earned money, too. He’s generous, but he might get irritated by your impulsive tendencies. Can you say, limit those shopping sprees?! And, he may not understand your unconventional traits. You’ll both have to work on the art of compromise in order to avoid emotional storms.
cc_sign_match.Romance: What’s it like to date this guy? I couldn’t tell you – he’s totally unpredictable! The only likely thing is you won’t have the same date twice. He may not be great at grand romantic gestures, but you’ll get plenty of physical affection. You’ll love how much he makes you laugh and will never run out of things to talk about. He’s generous, thoughtful, and smart. What more could you ask for?!
cc_sign_match.Sex: Remember how I said you’d have to decide who will be on top? This applies to your sex life as well! Things could go one of two ways. Your explosive and wild ways might clash with his high-energy approach. Or, you may create sexual fireworks. This man loves the chase, so make sure you keep him guessing. Don’t be too quick to fulfill his needs. He’s eager, so make sure you slow him down. If you ask for what you want, he’ll see your sexual pleasure as another mission to be accomplished. And, he won’t stop until he’s succeeded.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: If you’ve found yourself an Ox, you’ve probably met your match. You can learn a lot from this slower-moving, methodical creature. A polar opposite in a lot of ways, you may be on different wavelengths. Where you’re spontaneous and assertive, he’s logical and reserved. You both have strong opinions and firm beliefs. And, his iron will resonates with your hard-driving ambition and courage in the face of danger. If you can understand your differences, you might be a pair to be reckoned with!
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: He is the Yin to your Yang. This means you both have qualities that can balance each other out. You’re probably action-oriented, driven, and outgoing. He’s likely to be more passive, receptive, and reserved. This could make your differences noticeable, but you might learn a lot from each other. Typically, you’ll get him out of the house more, and he’ll remind you when to slow down.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: When the Tiger and Ox get together, things get done! Are you and your man saving whales or fighting global warming? I wouldn’t be surprised. You both probably have dedication, passion, and ambition up to your eyeballs. There will be plenty to talk about since you and he are both strongly opinionated. You might start a business together or work as a team on behalf of some important cause. Overall, you could be one powerful pair.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: A relationship with him may seem like tug-of-war at times. He’s probably the one animal in the Chinese zodiac that can beat you in battle. That’s because he’s generally more stubborn than you! Your Ox might not like it if you’re constantly running off on your own – he likes order and consistency. You, however, typically don’t like following rules. If you can learn to be flexible and reign in your wild roaming, you’ll have a better chance with him. Learning the art of warmth and affection might be what he needs to work on too.
cc_sign_match.Romance: He’ll probably buy you a warm winter coat over a dozen roses. He’s typically practical, not wildly romantic. Since you may love big gestures of affection, you could be bummed when he fails to surprise you or act spontaneous. But, this man is steady. He’ll remember your birthday and anniversary and provide a safe and secure home life. Be sure to thank him and compliment him a lot – this will encourage him to do more.
cc_sign_match.Sex: Now, here’s where things get interesting! You might think your Ox would be a snooze fest in bed, but you and he can be a good sexual match. Your sensuality and sensitivity between the sheets may break down all his carefully constructed defenses. That big, tough guy stands to be putty in your arms. Feeling freer to be himself in bed, his passion can be enormous. Here’s where your mutual steadfastness and ambition can produce results.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and your Tiger man could make a great match – if only you could stop fighting about who’s in charge! You might be instantly attracted to his magnetic personality, and he’ll recognize his own kind in you. Both of you can be warm-hearted, adventurous, and upbeat. Love your freedom? Don’t worry, cause he completely understands. As two independent Tigers, you respect each other’s need for autonomy. Get ready for a wild ride!
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: Two Yang personalities make for tons of action! Generally, you’re both quick to jump on new opportunities, love to travel, and can’t wait to get your hands on the next thing. It’s likely you’ll both want power and to be at the center of attention. You and your Tiger man will have enough zip and zest for everyone around you. He wants to conquer new territory, move mountains, and fulfill his lifelong dreams – like you.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: This guy could quickly fall under your spell, and you his. A fast and furious infatuation will probably develop here. Moving in together, getting married, or even jumping in the bed on the first date might happen. He’ll probably excite you to no end, and you’ll return the favor. Both of you are capable of being extremely generous and kind-hearted in love, so you won’t have to worry about your needs not being met. What’s better? You’ll probably read each other’s minds! He’ll inspire you to do great things, and you’ll be the fuel to his fire too.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Things could get unpredictable for you having another Tiger around. He’s probably just as fickle and spontaneous as you. Don’t know where he is on a Saturday night? Typical Tiger. It’s not that he doesn’t care, but his need for freedom might influence his actions. Since you’re independent too, it could be a challenge finding time to be with each other. Also, make sure you let him win once in a while. His competitive streak is only matched by yours.
cc_sign_match.Romance: Two Tigers equals double the fun, but double the danger! You’ll love his quick decisions and go-for-it attitude. He’ll find your bubbling energy and passion utterly irresistible. You might have strange and spontaneous dates that could lead t o some unexpected adventures. But, beware of burnout. An instant connection could be replaced by a heated argument if you disagree about something. Also, make sure you wear protective gear. You never know where this man might take you.
cc_sign_match.Sex: Did you even make it to the bedroom? You and your Tiger can get so caught up in the throes of passion you’ll do it no matter where you are. Most likely, sex will never be boring with him. He’ll have you whenever and wherever; thank you very much. And don’t forget the occasional sex vacation to an exotic destination. Bali would be nice! One thing though power plays might pop up since you both love being in charge. Make sure you take turns. He probably likes it rough, too, so keep that protective gear I mentioned close by.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: Couples get along best when one doesn’t want to eat the other. You might be tempted to chomp on your Rabbit man, if only because he’s so delectable and pretty to look at. You might be hard-hitting, boisterous, and a bit brash. He, on the other hand, is calm, quieter, and somewhat calculating. He tends to love a perfectly serene home while you’re content to live in a jungle. This delicate creature is likely to be different from you in more ways than one.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: While you’re Yang, he’s Yin. How does that fare for your relationship? You’re generally the courageous, go-getter, while he’s behind the scenes puttering away.  He probably won’t accompany you on your spur-of-the-moment travels or wild adventures – he’s too busy holding down the fort. All in all, your Rabbit guy has qualities you could stand to borrow, and vice versa.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: If you’ve snagged yourself a Rabbit, consider yourself lucky. He’s probably sweet, compassionate, refined, and classy. He’ll give and give until he can’t give anymore, and you love the attention. You’re both generous and compassionate, which means communication should be good. Also, you can probably be confident this man will put your happiness above him own.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: You might find you don’t have much in common. He’s more likely to be content to stay at home while you paint the town with your posse. Since he’ll probably be loving and sensitive to a fault, be careful about taking advantage of his kindness. Flying by the seat of his pants is really not his style, so don’t be surprised if he wants more stability and security in the relationship than you. He’ll probably need to know where he stands, so give him plenty of reassurance. Otherwise, he could withdraw since he may be the type who doesn’t easily pick himself up off the floor when knocked down..
cc_sign_match.Romance: This man loves the finer things in life – lucky you! He’ll probably take you to the nicest restaurants, buy you designer clothing, and decorate your home with expensive furniture. He’s sensitive, so he’ll pay attention to little things. He’ll probably open your car door, pull out your chair, and give you his coat when you’re cold. While he may not be up for wild and crazy dates, he’ll lavish you with beautiful things and fine food. Sounds good to me!
cc_sign_match.Sex: In contrast to your impulsive bedroom behavior, your guy is slow moving and careful in his love making. On one hand, he’s probably excellent in the foreplay department. But, you may get bored with his pace. Your best way to please this man is to show off your seductive side. He might let you dominate, but don’t overwhelm him with too much aggression. He needs to take his time. If you let him, he can be delightfully creative in the sack.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You’ll probably fall hard for the Dragon man, and for good reason! He’s powerful, enigmatic, and charming. You’re not afraid of this fire-breathing creature. In fact, you’ll probably thrive off his energy. This man won’t balk at your mood swings or tell you not to go climb Mt. Everest. He’ll just insist you buy proper outdoor gear. Though you wear masks of bravery, both of you are likely to be sensitive and warm on the inside. One thing’s for sure; he  has the energy and passion to keep up with you.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: Two Yang personalities. You’ll have plenty of excitement in this relationship! Typically, you’re both goal oriented, ambitious, and not afraid to go after what you want. It’s likely you’ll want to rule the kingdom and have the love of your minions. You two will have enough fire and raw energy to do just about anything together. And , he’ll be happy to keep up with your fast pace.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: While other men might try to keep you on a leash, he is probably amused by your free-spirited nature. And, isn’t he good at calming you down when you’re upset?! He also loves to be spontaneous. This guy will typically be one big whirlwind of energy and excitement. You’ll probably share a mutual respect and admiration for each other, since you both tend to honor one another’s strengths. The bonus? He’ll love that you’re not afraid of him.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: He may not try to hold you down, but he still wants to be in control. Things could be combustible if you don’t listen to his advice, or you both forget you’re on the same team. Despite his strong façade, this man needs emotional support. Make sure you’re not too busy with yourself to nurture and tend to him. Both of you may think your way is the best, but you’ll be better off sharing ideas collaboratively than going off in different directions.
cc_sign_match.Romance: The mythical Dragon invented romance. He doesn’t do anything without 100% effort. You’ll love his overt and sometimes embarrassing displays of affection. He’ll want to parade you around and show you off to all his friends. No doubt, your posse will be in awe at the magnetism of your coupledom. Get ready to travel to foreign lands and dabble in unusual pursuits with this man. He can persuade you to do just about anything!
cc_sign_match.Sex: Never a dull moment! You and he will probably be hot and heavy in bed. He’s a generous and emotional lover but also has a deep fire that translates into physical passion. Your intense sexual style will likely suit him well. Since he’s a very goal-oriented guy, he’ll take seriously the task of pleasing you. He has boundless energy, which means he’ll probably endure between the sheets. Just be careful – this man can have a wandering eye since he’s usually entertaining fantasies in his head.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: There’s a reason you’re attracted to the slippery Snake – he’s seductive, charming, and interesting. In the beginning, you’ll probably see him as an easy catch since he showers you with compliments and hangs on your every word. He’ll be attracted to your dynamism, and you’ll love his big brain and alluring personality. You might even enjoy it when he acts a bit jealous or over-protective. In any case, your Snake guy will catch your attention like no other.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: Yin meets Yang in this pair. Your Yang personality probably makes you outgoing, eager to achieve, and popular. His Yin energy means he’s more subtle in his approach to life. He’s probably easy-going and free-flowing – at least on the outside. He’s happy to let you come in first, especially since he’ll be busy observing things from the sidelines.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: You might be incredibly attracted to this man’s elusive charm. He’s got that secret something that keeps your Tiger senses alert. You can’t quite figure him out, and love the challenge. He’ll probably be consumed by the sheer force of your personality and will love your warm spirit. You’ll tend to make a good team if both can appreciate each other’s strengths and give credit where it’s deserved.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: As a Tiger, you typically love being Queen of the jungle. But, this urge to dominate might not go over well with your Snake. He may not outwardly retaliate, but you can be sure he’ll get revenge if you hurt him. This man needs a deep and satisfying  connection to his partner – one that you might not be up for giving right away. He could bruise your ego when he acts aloof and uncaring to cover up his insecurities. Make sure you let him shine and reassure him of your love. If not, you might have to deal with a slippery Snake backlash.
cc_sign_match.Romance: You don’t have to worry about lack of romance with him. He invented the meaning of charm, which you’ll eat up as a Tiger. He’ll try to woo you with candlelit dinners, deep discussions, and soul-penetrating eye contact. While you may want to pounce, he wants to connect. Remember not to rush him along – he does things in his own time, especially when it comes to romance. Since he can be secretive, he’ll probably surprise you by revealing himself slowly over time. Just let him go at his own pace.
cc_sign_match.Sex: There’s something about this man that revs up your Tiger purr. It’s likely there will be a strong and fast attraction between you two. But does it translate into sexual sparks? Maybe not. Your bedroom style is different than his. He’s slow and sensuous, while you tend to be frisky and feverish. If you can meet somewhere in the middle, there’s a shot at sexual bliss. Take turns varying your love-making speeds. Slow down for him if he promises to get quick and dirty for you.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: A volcanic attraction will probably erupt between you and your Horse man! This is indeed a favorable match up. You’re both ferociously free-thinking, inordinately independent, and amazingly adventurous.  Your guy may be a bit more serious than you, but he’ll help you stay grounded. As sunny and optimistic creatures, you could have an active social life together while sharing similar goals. He won’t dare encroach on your freedom – since he needs just as much room to roam -- and you’ll love him to pieces for it.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: You and your Horse guy are both Yang energy types. Neither of you want to sit back and watch the action happen – you want to be in the center of it! You’re both probably driven to  exciting careers and seek a life of adventure. This man will want to take the reigns, but you’ll be right there next to him waiting for your turn to drive. Since you’re both go-getters, expect an action-packed relationship with journeys on roads less traveled!
cc_sign_match.TheGood: No one understands your need for freedom as much as this guy. You don’t have to worry about being smothered. He probably won’t ask you to check in or demand all your time. Since he’s just as independent as you, the space in this relationship could give it plenty of room to grow. You admire each other, know each other’s boundaries, and have a lot in common. In general, one of you will always be able to be strong for the other. How wonderful!
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: If you’re a typical Tiger, you might be a bit impulsive. If so, this guy may try to curb your appetite, but you won’t like it. He’s probably just a tad more conservative than you. Try to respect his more serious nature, and he’ll be able to laugh off your spontaneous antics. Since it’s probable you’ll both lead independent lives, make sure you factor in each other. It can be easy for your and your Horse to not cross paths ‘cause you’re busy flying solo. That’s may be OK as long as it doesn’t become a habit.
cc_sign_match.Romance: Passion meets passion here! He’s the one guy that matches your boundless enthusiasm and hankering for adventure. Your first date might be an afternoon of skydiving or a weekend backpacking trip. This man loves to run free, and he’ll be happy to take you along with him. Expect plenty of romantic gestures and spontaneous trips. He probably loves sports, so get ready to accompany him and look cute in the bleachers.
cc_sign_match.Sex: Once you’ve been in bed with him, you know the name of the game: action. You and he both might get bored easily, so you’ll have to keep sex interesting here. Don’t worry. That should be an easy task for you two. Deep down, he tends to want emotional acceptance and romance. Don’t be surprised if he’s aggressive one minute and sentimental the next. Just make sure to keep him guessing. He could stray if things get dull – this man typically hates routine, in and out of the bedroom.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: As a Tiger, you tend to love undivided attention. Well, you’re in luck with a Sheep guy around. He’ll be drawn in by your charm and you’ll probably find him interesting. Together you can explore new things and dabble in unusual activities. In general, he is sensitive, creative, and somewhat of an artist type. He’ll probably appreciate your protective influence and admire your practical ambition. Since you both tend to be a tad unusual, this relationship might not look very conventional.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: He is the Yin to your Yang. What does that mean for your relationship? Let’s just say you two are different. You can be fast, aggressive, and intellectual, while he may be slow, passive and more intuitive. You tend to take the bull by the horns, and he probably wants to take the safe route. He may be a little more thoughtful and deliberate in his approach to life. You, on the other hand, tend to go with your gut and pounce on things quickly.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: Get ready to learn something new. It’s likely you both love to explore and experience different things. He’ll be happy to serve you, and you could feel good about being the stronger, more solid person in this relationship. You’re both probably individualistic and tend to be a bit on the quirky side. He’ll bring a lot of creativity and spirituality to the relationship. You’ll bring the energy, passion, and fire so characteristic of a Tiger gal.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Things might get challenging since he tends to be cautious and a dreamer while you can be a bit impulsive. You both might have to work on remembering the practical things. And who was supposed to pick up the kids from school? He was busy puttering around in the garden and you got distracted trying to beat a colleague at an important task. What else? You might find this man a bit too passive for your liking. In turn, he may think you’re kind of scary.
cc_sign_match.Romance: You might be instantly attracted to him, and he to you. Typically, he’s sensitive, refined, and dreamy. He’ll take you on dates to art museums and outdoor cathedrals. You’ll talk about religion, science, and the meaning of life. The Sheep man will flatter you with plenty of attention and probably surprise you with strange gifts. Remember that rare flower you saw at the botanical garden? He’ll pick some, head to his laboratory, turn the essence into a perfume himself, and mail it to you with a love poem. How perfect.
cc_sign_match.Sex: You’ll probably hit it off in the bedroom before anything else. In fact, sex might come first, relationship later. If you get that far, that is. He’s naturally eccentric, which makes him a little kinky. He’ll want to have you on the kitchen counter or underneath the back deck, just to know what it feels like. As a Tiger, you’ll probably love his imagination and the fact that he’s warm and sensual. He’s generous, too. If you give as much as he does, the sex will be off the charts!

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and the Monkey man are opposites on the Chinese Zodiac. That means you’ll probably find a quick mutual attraction. Both of you tend to be fun-loving, light-hearted, and enjoy trying new things. The Monkey is a thinker and problem-solver, which could help you stay grounded. Typically, you both love attention and praise, so it’s likely you’ll have a big group of admirers. All in all, you’ll probably have fun with this guy – if you can keep up with his antics and busy social life!
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: Two Yang energies, which means you approach life similarly. Instead of waiting around for things to happen, you both want to take charge. He’s generally bold, outgoing, confident, and curious – like you. There will be plenty of opportunity for adventure in this relationship, since you both tend to bore easily. You two need new people, places, and experiences to keep things interesting.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: To you, independence is probably necessary to your well-being. And this guy will give you plenty of space. Mostly it’s because he’s off doing his own thing and socializing with anyone and everyone. You’ll love that he’s a good planner – always remembering details – and he’ll admire how feisty and brave you are. You’ll probably provide the spunk and spark he needs to stay motivated, and he’ll work hard at keeping you happy. A strong intellectual connection should make things interesting as well.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: There is a story in Chinese astrology about how the Monkey loves to pull the Tiger’s tail and then run up a tree to giggle. You might tire of this guy’s quirky antics or jokes. He may not always take you seriously or will be a bit too clingy too. And he might not want to share the spotlight with you since he needs to show off a lot. You both tend to be competitive, and neither is very good at compromise. Try to work on not being a sore loser, and you’ll have a better chance to make this relationship last.
cc_sign_match.Romance: Your Monkey loves pleasure, and he’ll want to share it with you. Out of all the animals in the Zodiac, he gives the most presents. You’ll probably have more fun with him than any other guy. Diamond necklace on your second date? Yep. Trip to Italy on your third? Absolutely! He loves showing off, which is a big bonus for the women he dates. He may not be ready for marriage as early as other men, but he’ll commit to you so long as you keep him entertained.
cc_sign_match.Sex: You’ll have one fun time in the sack with a Monkey. Though he’s normally led by his big brain, he can be intuitively kinky in bed. He’s got tricks up his sleeve that even a Tiger can’t keep up with, so get ready! If he’s typical of his sign, he probably doesn’t take sex too seriously, so be careful about showing too much emotion too soon. Have fun and enjoy his light-hearted approach to love-making. He probably acts like an explorer in the bedroom. So don’t be surprised if he checks out every part of your body. Since he’s ruled by his mind, give him a sexual memory to think about and he’ll take you with him all day long.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: As a Tiger, you know who you are and what you want. Well, the Rooster man is cut from the same tree. You can both be incredibly opinionated, somewhat aggressive, and very energetic. He’s got a lot to say and will always see room for improvement in the relationship.
