cc_sign_match.Romance: While he is no Don Juan, he’s very in tune with the female species. He’ll probably court you slowly and carefully, which might baffle a quick-to-act Dragon like yourself. After time, you’ll probably notice how attentive and intuitive he is, however. He knows what you need, when you need it, and wants to fall in love with you passionately and wholly. His tenderness and vulnerability might match well with your sensuality and passion. Just make sure you don’t break his heart – he won’t be quick to recover.
cc_sign_match.Sex: Ah, a true romantic…with a bit of spunk! He’ll want to wine and dine you before he takes you off on his white horse to a bed scattered with rose petals. He can be more attached to fantasies than anything else, so don’t be surprised if he gets cranky when he finds out you’re not perfect. But, he’ll forgive it quickly. Don’t worry about coming on as the aggressor – he can handle it! Give him plenty of sensual massage. Light candles. Burn incense. Anything that will heighten his senses. You’ll be generously rewarded for your thoughtfulness.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and your Rat man can make a compatible pair – once you learn to overlook your differences, that is! This man is quick-witted, shrewd, and probably a power player. You, on the other hand, are generally cautious and reserved. His active, go-get-em nature is a stark contrast to your brooding, thoughtful demeanor. However, as two charming and magnetic personalities, this relationship could be enchanting and fulfilling for both!
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: Your Snake sign is Yin, while his is Yang. Since relationships need a bit of both energies for balance, this might work. Yin energy is associated with qualities of calm, passivity, and intuition. Yang, on the other hand, is associated with fast, aggressive, and dominant qualities. You might have different ways of relating to the world, but this could create a complementary match.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: There could be an irresistible pull between you, at first. Your charm with the Snake’s magnetism? What a combo! This guy will probably love your intelligence and critical eye, while you can appreciate his quick wit and sense of adventure. Your man might help draw you out of the lair when you’re feeling blue. You, in turn, will probably unearth his softer side. What else? Since you both are social and gregarious, you’ll probably have plenty of friends and acquaintances to run around with.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: If you’re typical of your sign, a weakness for flirtation could get you in trouble. Once he’s in love, your man can be super loyal and committed. But, you might struggle to make up your mind about the relationship. Also, his verbal sparring could be trying when you’re in need of alone time. You’ll probably have to work on compromise if you want to avoid upsets. Another thing? You might need to figure out who is boss, since neither of you do very well taking orders.
cc_sign_match.Romance: You probably love a guy with a big brain and pioneering spirit. That’s good, since your Rat is all those things and more! He may not be into surprises or bold romantic gestures. Don’t worry, though. He’ll make up for it in tenderness and affection. Also, he’s an entertaining conversationalist and will keep you on your toes with his wit. Don’t let him catch you right away, however. One thing is pretty common for all Rat men – they love the chase.
cc_sign_match.Sex: One thing that should keep this union strong is the sex! That initial spark might have you between the sheets in no time. You tend to give lots of sexual attention, which he’ll gobble right up. Who can resist your seductive charm? And him? He’s a dedicated, passionate lover. Always eager to please, this man will see your sexual satisfaction as his mission in life. Just make sure to keep him on his toes. He loves a good chase.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and your Ox guy can make a great pair! You both are part of the Zodiac Love Triangle and a natural match for each other. Though outwardly different, you share similar sensibilities. You both prefer quality and depth over quantity and flashiness. Neither of you is afraid of hard work, and you value a strong and stable home life, which he probably will provide. From the outside, this match might look a bit tame – or even dull – but on the inside, it sparkles with its own special qualities. Things between you and your Ox man can be very satisfying indeed!
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: Both of your signs are Yin, which means you’ll take a similar approach to life. As a Yin sign, you are usually more relaxed, easygoing, receptive, intuitive, and sensitive. Your man is probably a lot like you. Without Yang energy, however, your relationship might need a bit of zip and zest to stay interesting. For the most part, your similar orientations can work well together so long as you keep each other active and inspired.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: Since you tend to be charming and popular, you might help your man come out of his shell. However, you’ll still appreciate his love of home and domestic comforts. He’ll probably be drawn to your intuitive nature and philosophical mind. You two can learn a lot from each other, since you both generally have your own ways of dealing with the world. It’s also nice you both are likely to feel you can take care of yourself. He won’t lean on you nor you on him. All in all, things should be amicable, peaceful, and fulfilling in this duo.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: This guy might be a bit withholding. Do you suspect him of having secrets? He’s probably not hiding anything, but your jealousy may sometimes get the best of you. Try to give him the benefit of the doubt. He could be a private person, so communicate instead of making assumptions. You also might get frustrated when his rigid thinking meets your subjective approach. But, with a little understanding and respect, you two should get past any relationship hurdles.
cc_sign_match.Romance: Cheers to a happily ever after! You might just settle down with this stable guy. He may not be terribly romantic, but you two could create a cozy and happy home together. Underneath his tough exterior is a caring, sensitive man. He may not lavish you with expensive gifts, but he’ll change your oil and make sure you have warm blankets on the bed. Since you tend to see past the glamour and hype of a fairy tale romance, his tender affections will probably be incredibly satisfying.
cc_sign_match.Sex: Now, here’s where things get interesting! You might think your Ox would be a snooze fest in bed, but the two of you are probably a good sexual match. Your sensuality and energy between the sheets will break down his carefully constructed defenses. If you have trouble with trust, he’ll give you no reason to doubt him. With a mutual respect and warm affection for each other, the sex should be hearty and satisfying. He’s probably a bit predictable, but his raw energy is his own brand of sexy.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and your Tiger may have a challenge finding common ground to stand on. Both of you tend to be easy-going, as long as you get your way. Do you see where that could get tricky?! Your Tiger man is generally self-possessed, bold, and independent. While you have a strong sign, you probably get what you want with that famous Snake charm. This fierce and free-thinking man might be drawn to your quiet strength, but you two could be quite different in how you approach the world.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: You are Yin, while your partner is Yang. In some matches, opposite energies can work well together – providing balance and harmony to a relationship. Here, things could seem like one big contrast. As a Yin sign, you’re probably more reserved, cautious, and sensitive. His yang energy could make for an outgoing, assertive, and impulsive personality. If you can learn to borrow qualities from each other, you might help your opposite natures work together.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: There could be a strong attraction between you and your tempestuous Tiger. With his sexy charisma and your Snake charm, you’ll probably find each other irresistible. This guy can appreciate your inner sensitivity, since he’s a softie at heart. You might admire his strong spirit and fierce loyalty to the things he cares about. Together, you could be capable of influencing change with humanitarian efforts or even starting your own business.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: The challenges of this match might have to do with your differing needs. If you’re a typical Snake, you probably require a fair amount of emotional connection from your partner. To your Tiger, this request could feel like an infringement on his freedom. It’s not that he’s uncaring – he actually has a big heart – he just can’t feel tied down. You might tire of his independent streak when you’re in need of some quality time with him. The key? Work on understanding and compromise while sharing the power in the relationship.
cc_sign_match.Romance: Your man can be bold when it comes to romancing the woman he loves. No halfhearted efforts here! He’ll be the one throwing pebbles at your window in the wee hours of the morning, sending you embarrassing bouquets of flowers at work, and declaring his love on the jumbotron during a baseball game. He might make you blush. Even though it’s different than your style, his sweet sentiments will probably go over well with you. They’ll give you plenty of reassurance of his affections and reason enough to trust him.
cc_sign_match.Sex: A Tiger and Snake in bed? Hmm… this could either be interesting or scary. His lovemaking style is probably nothing like yours. Fast, furious, passionate – he’s always ready to pounce! While you have your own brand of deep sensuality, you probably move slower than him. Can you learn to compromise? He could probably benefit from taking it down a notch, while you might have fun unleashing your wild side. Go ahead. See what happens.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and your man have different ways of approaching the world. But, you might still find a close companion is this kindly creature. Socially, you tend to be opposite. You’re generally a people person with tons of charm, while he may be intimidated by your wide social circle, preferring the company of close friends. What could draw you together is a shared intuitive approach to life and a similar value system. You generally rely on a sixth sense and he’s known for being dreamily subjective about things. All in all, there could be something to explore here.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: Both of your signs are Yin oriented. What does that mean? You’ll generally approach life the same way. You will probably be the silent, strong type, while your Rabbit prefers to stay under the radar and be an observer. Most likely, he’s more passive, receptive, tolerant, and giving. Since you’re of the same energy orientation, you stand to understand each other better.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: Both of your signs operate on intuitive and philosophical levels, rather than rational. You can picture long discussions about the meaning of life, your purpose in the world, and how you can contribute to global harmony. Deep stuff! The connection here might be more emotional at first, but you’ll probably develop a close mental and physical bond – fast. You might be the front person in the relationship, but that’s probably fine with him anyway.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: You might need to watch out for insecurities in this relationship. Both of you can struggle with self-doubt. Make sure you don’t overanalyze everything and give your partner plenty of strokes. Even he adores refined and elegant surroundings, you might tire of his need for extravagant things. You’re probably thrifty but will also spend serious money on what you want – even if it seems wasteful to him. Sound right? Well he’ll just have to try not to deprive you. And he’ll have to work on not being pouty when he doesn’t get his way.
cc_sign_match.Romance: As a Snake, you probably appreciate the art of seduction more than most. You might even live for it! The dinners, the presents, the surprises – nothing makes you happier. Your Rabbit man understands this completely. In fact he loves being seduced. He can be picky about the women he dates, since he has high standards. But, as long as you’re classy, well-groomed, and intelligent, you should tickle his fancy. He’ll mull over where to take you for dinner for days on end. He’ll fuss over what suit to wear. And when he picks you up, he’ll probably be in a freshly detailed car with an immaculate bouquet of calla lilies. Sigh.
cc_sign_match.Sex: Don’t be surprised if this guy is a little squeamish in the sack. It’s not you. It’s likely he’s just a tad uncomfortable with himself and his sexuality. He could be so focused on perfecting the act that he forgets all the sensuality that should go along with it! But get him in his comfort zone and wow. Your guy probably loves good sex at least as much as you do. Remember to relax and have fun in bed. Work that famous Snake sex appeal for all its worth. He won’t know what hit him!

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: As long as you know each other’s habits and motivations, you and your Dragon can hit it off. Both attractive and sexy, you and this guy will surely turn heads. Your bold magnetism combined with his flair He probably seems like the perfect arm candy! In a good match, your differences are complementary. He admires your quiet strength, and you’ll love his outrageous flamboyance. The attraction here will probably be quick – and intensely physical!
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: You’re Yin, he’s Yang. You might not accompany this guy on his exotic excursions at the drop of a hat. You’re probably more of a thinker and a planner than a dreamer and doer. While he’s slinking around town at a fancy restaurant, you’re probably laying low at home fantasizing over a home cooked meal. Yin people are more introverted and passive. Yang energy makes him quite the opposite – outgoing and assertive.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: The way you two approach the world might fit like puzzle pieces. You tend to use a keen intuition and inner radar. He relies on his Dragon luck to jump on new opportunities. With your sixth sense and his good fortune, you’ll probably make a good team! You probably know exactly when to lend support, since you can sense his moods easily. He’ll typically make you feel loved and admired, which snuffs out a Snake’s insecurities. Another thing? You probably won’t be threatened by him, which allows him to reveal his softer side. How sweet.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: A lot of signs can have trouble keeping up with the Dragon. Practically no one but the Tiger or the Horse can match his energy level. The challenge here might be your slower pace. You may even become a bump on a log when you’re in one of your moods. He might have to hit that dinner party alone or fly solo on Friday night. Intimate, one-on-one exchanges are more your thing than a flurry of small talk with strangers. He’ll have to be careful about his temper, too. An injured Snake will retreat, but you’ll probably retaliate when he least expects it. Look out!
cc_sign_match.Romance: The mythical Dragon practically invented romance! He doesn’t do anything without 100% effort. However, his overt and sometimes embarrassing displays of affection might seem superficial to you. But, you’ll probably love his good taste and eye for style. Get ready to travel to foreign lands and dabble in unusual pursuits with this man. He can generally persuade you to do just about anything!
cc_sign_match.Sex: Never a dull moment! You both have very different sexual styles that might fit together well. He can be a generous and emotional lover, but also has a deep fire that translates into physical passion. Your quieter style will suit him well, since he loves to dominate!  Generally a goal-oriented guy, he’ll probably take seriously the task of pleasing you. He has boundless energy, which means endurance between the sheets -- if you know what I mean.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: So, you found another of your kind? Passion, drama, and sex will probably reign supreme! You might have the time of your life with another Snake, but typically a couple of challenges. Popular, charming, and intriguing – you two can share a luxurious home and an entourage of unusual friends. Since you both value stability and trust, this match up might be strengthened by similar values. Just know you’ll probably have to fight with this guy to be the center of attention – you both love the spotlight.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: As two Yin signs, you and your man can enjoy a quieter, more passive existence together. Yin energy usually makes people intuitive, receptive, subjective, and easy-going. Since there’s no Yang energy here, remember to get up and fight when it’s necessary or take action instead of deeply pondering all your decisions. In general, you two should understand each other well and have similar temperaments.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: Oh, the drama! This guy matches your charm, passion, and lusty tendencies. You might live the life of artists, entrepreneurs, or philosophers, and you can endlessly feed each other’s creativity. There should be physical fire enough to cause global warming! This man probably understands the true you, complete with faults and insecurities. But, he loves you anyway. You see the same vulnerabilities in him, and you probably work hard to protect each other from pain. What’s sweeter than that?
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Two Snakes might become lost in their own world. While you might have an overwhelming connection, it could consume you to the point of total deterioration! As two sedentary creatures, you might have to work on getting out of the house and bit more and staying in touch with the outside world. Emotional upsets could happen if you both suffer from intense mood swings or bouts of depression. Try to keep things lighthearted and don’t take things too seriously.
cc_sign_match.Romance: You don’t have to worry about lack of romance with him. He invented the meaning of charm. He’ll try to woo you with candlelit dinners, deep discussions, and soul-penetrating eye contact. Other might cower away from this kind of intimacy, but you two will probably love to connect. Remember not to rush him along – he does things in his own time, especially romance. Since he can be secretive, he’ll probably surprise you by revealing himself slowly over time. Let him go at his own pace.
cc_sign_match.Sex: The physical connection between you two will typically be overwhelming and possibly debilitating! Can you make it out of bed at all? This man matches you in the seduction department, so don’t be surprised if he blows your mind in bed. On the surface, he may appear quiet and reserved, but look out! He’s probably an incredible lover – mostly because he can intuitively know what you want, even before you do. Hour upon hour can be spent in bed, bodies entwined and souls connected.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: Ah, the pull of a Horse man. You probably saw him galloping around, looking regal, fierce, and dashingly dangerous. But, you two might see each other as completely different species. His raw energy requires constant release, which means he’s usually restless and on the go. If you’re a typical Snake who often likes to be alone with her thoughts, you may be jumping through more hoops than you’d like in this match. You’ll probably have to give him plenty of room to run free, and he’ll need to nurture your higher needs.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: Since you’re Yin, and he’s Yang, there could be opposing forces at work. As a Yang sign, he’s probably autonomous, enthusiastic, curious, and industrious. Yang energy people are usually go-getters who tend to be assertive. Your Yin energy probably makes you compromising, intuitive, diplomatic, and passive. With different energy natures, you two may find it a challenge to understand each other’s motives and personalities.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: There are some positive qualities in your match. He probably admires your magical charm, while you love his spitfire attitude. Socially, you’ll be active and captivating as a team. There might be a strong attractive force between you, if only because you’re so different from each other. You both might learn a thing or two if you can put down your pride and be willing to do things outside your comfort zone. He could stand to be more sensitive; you could benefit from a little spunk.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: What is it with your man? He never wants to settle down, does he? If he’s typical of his sign, he’s probably content to not be in a committed relationship if only to remain free. You may be unsettled with a guy who balks at partnership, and he’s not likely to change. If you have indulgent or lazy tendencies, this will typically irritate him. He could be more conservative and practical than you, which means you might have to give up extravagances. Your best bet? Communicate. Compromise. Be flexible and willing to change.
cc_sign_match.Romance: He’s got boundless enthusiasm and a hankering for adventure. Your first date might be an afternoon of skydiving or a weekend backpacking trip. The Horse man loves to run free, and he’ll be happy to take you along with him. As a Snake lady, you might prefer a quiet evening in with candles and a bottle of wine. But first, you’ll have to convince him to take off his shoes and stay a while. The good news? Expect plenty of romantic gestures and spontaneous trips. You never know where he’ll take you!
cc_sign_match.Sex: If you’ve made it to bed with a Horse, you know the name of the game: action. Things will probably be hot and heavy until you’ve exhausted yourselves. Do you have a desire for sensual, emotional lovemaking? It might be like pulling teeth with him. Deep down, this man generally wants emotional acceptance and romance. But don’t be surprised if he’s aggressive and a bit raunchy. Just make sure to keep him guessing. He could stray if things get dull – this man tends to hate routine.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and your Sheep can form a good, solid relationship that’s brimming with creativity and inspiration. With his progressive mind, esoteric tendencies, and seductive appeal, you could be one happy Snake. As a couple, you’ll probably be charming and appealing. Artistic or spiritual pursuits might draw you together, and a shared love of beauty and harmony should keep you close. Together you make a tender and classy match!
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: While too much Yin energy can sometimes cause problems, here it could work to your advantage. As Yin signs, you can probably understand one another easily. Yin people tend to approach the world intuitively and subjectively, rather than practically and logically. You’re probably dreamers and artists, rather than politicians or athletes. With your Sheep man, a shared value system and similar preferences should make you a compatible pair.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: There’s no one like your Sheep man to understand the artistic side of life. You two probably share a love of beauty, magic, and grace, which should make your relationship sparkle! He’ll probably adore your intellectual superiority and philosophical mind. And, he’ll see your possessiveness as a sign of love. If you live together, your home might be filled with exotic art and plenty of spots for cozy cuddling and lovemaking. All in all, you two have plenty in common to stay fulfilled and happy.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: If you’re a typical Snake, sometimes your words can be biting. This man might run for the hills at the first sign of conflict. He probably hates anything ugly or harsh, so be careful about retaliating if you’re upset. Another challenge could be the practicalities of daily life. Neither of you tends to be diligent about bill paying or doing the dishes. This man probably loves making a creative mess, but doesn’t always know how to clean it up. You might have to hire a live-in maid.
cc_sign_match.Romance: You probably were instantly attracted to your lover, and he to you. He’s probably creative and artistic. He’ll take you on dates to art museums and outdoor cathedrals. You’ll talk about religion, science, and the meaning of life. The Sheep man will flatter you with plenty of attention and probably surprise you with romantic gifts. Remember that rare flower you saw at the botanical garden? He’ll pick some, head to his laboratory, turn the essence into a perfume himself, and mail it to you with a love poem. How perfect.
cc_sign_match.Sex: You and this guy will probably hit it off in the bedroom, and you may never leave! He’s naturally in tune with the female species, which makes him innovative, intuitive, and creative. He’ll want to have you on the kitchen counter or underneath the back deck, just to know what it feels like. As a Snake, you might prefer slow and sensuous to strange and quirky. But, you could have incredible sexual chemistry with this man – it should be worth some awkward moments!

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and your Monkey man may have a handful of hurdles to deal with in order to get along. The saving grace might be your love of good times and mutual popularity. Though you probably shine during social interaction, you might be more reserved than your guy. It seems he’s always up for fun and games! If you’re a typical Snake, you take life and love, more seriously. Your Monkey, however, could be less focused. A little mutual understanding will probably be needed for a solid match here.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: As a Yang sign, your Monkey is generally outgoing, assertive, and full of ambition. Not that you’re a pushover, but Yin energy probably makes you a little more relaxed and quiet. A good Yin/Yan balance is necessary in any relationship, but here it may seem difficult to understand one another. With different temperaments, you might need to compromise in order to keep things harmonious.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: You’ll probably enjoy your Monkey man’s wit, mental agility, and desire to please– he’s got intelligence and kindness enough for everyone! In turn, he can appreciate your worldly wisdom and seductive appeal. Together, you could make a splashs at  all kinds of family and social functions. Another bonus? This guy probably won’t mind when you need your alone time. He’ll be happy to do his own thing until you’re ready to play again.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Your man is probably not into overt displays of emotion. If you have a flair for the dramatic, he may think you’re silly. But who is he to call anyone silly! He could easily offend you with his careless remarks or his flippant attitude. Communication could get tricky. You tend to need a deep level of trust in a relationship – and you might always be suspicious of this guy. After an initial romance or infatuation, you may find you have little in common with your playful primate.
cc_sign_match.Romance: Your Monkey man loves pleasure, and he’ll want to share it with you. Out of all the signs in the Zodiac, he gives the most presents. You’ll probably have more fun with him than any other guy if you can get past the moments of aggravation. Diamond necklace on your second date? Yep. Trip to Italy on your third? Absolutely! He loves showing off, which is a big bonus for the women he dates. He may not be ready for marriage as early as other men, but he’ll commit to you so long as you keep him entertained.
cc_sign_match.Sex: You’ll probably have one fun time in the sack with your Monkey. Though he’s normally led by his big brain, he can be sweet and tender in bed. He’s got tricks up his sleeve, so get ready! If he’s typical of his sign, he probably doesn’t take sex too seriously, so be careful about showing too much emotion too soon. Try to have fun and enjoy his light-hearted approach to love-making. Since he’s ruled by his mind, give him a library of sexual memories to keep him entertained when you’re apart.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: Cock-a-doodle-doo! That’s the call of your Rooster man, who, by the way, is a great match for you as you both are part of a Zodiac Love Triangle. You tend to have the same interests and values, which makes compatibility a breeze. Since you both like to impress at social events, you can probably expect to be at the center of action with him. As a couple, you can be sharp, witty, and captivating. Who wouldn’t want to be in your relationship?! Together, you can probably create a smooth-running, prosperous match.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: On the surface, your man may not appear very Yin. Yin people are typically more subdued, relaxed, and passive than the Rooster appears. But, since you both share Yin personalities, things might be smooth in the land of love. Neither of you tends to act brashly or impulsively, and you both value a peaceful, harmonious home. So long as you engage in an active social life, your similar personalities should match up well.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: Sure, you two probably love a good party. But, in general, you both prefer the comforts of home. Your Rooster man has a keen eye for style and class, so he’ll help keep a spotless, comfortable abode. Since you can appreciate a cozy nest, you two might do well living together earlier than some couples. Another thing? Your tendency for luck in money with your Rooster’s steely work ethic should make things financially sound.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Just when you’re settling down to have some alone time, your Rooster man might barge in and start an argument. It’s not that he’s mean-spirited; he just tends to be a nitpicker. He can fight like no other, and he’s used to being right. You might have to lay low to avoid emotional storms. Also, be careful about sexually straying in this relationship – he probably won’t tolerate infidelity. The key to this match might be for both of you to lighten up a bit and not take things so seriously.
cc_sign_match.Romance: Your Rooster guy is likely to be imaginative, energetic, and a bit sadistic. He’s that guy who loves to play games in order to keep the control in a relationship. Since you need utmost trust in a partner, you might get fed up with his mind tricks. He, on the other hand, will see you as the perfect conquest. He loves adventure and hates routine. With him, the key is to look good, smell good, and be hard to catch. He places a lot of importance on appearances, so make sure you look the part if you want him to woo you.
cc_sign_match.Sex: Oh, where to begin. He is a bit strange when it comes to sex. He’s not as emotionally available and sensuous as you – at least on the surface. He’s probably got one or two weird fetishes that could even border on psychotic. If he’s a typical Rooster, he probably has some sort of strange fascination with inflicting pain during the act and making sure he’s in control. This might not bode well with you, since you usually see sex as a spiritual and emotional union. Your best bet? Don’t let him call all the shots. And do force him to be vulnerable once in a while.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: So you picked up a Dog? How’d you do it? Although you two can probably have a satisfying partnership, he can sometimes take forever to make up his mind. Your bond may provide you both with strength and security, which are high priorities for each of you. He tends to be loyal, trustworthy, and supportive. Since you both prefer the calm and quiet of home to the raucousness of life, you might be domestically delighted with your Dog man.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: As a Yin-Yang match, you may have opposite habits. You probably value order and peace more than most – with harmony and stability in your relationships being important. Yin people tend to be receptive, passive, and accepting. Your Dog could provide enough Yang energy to keep things active and energized. His energy is probably assertive, outgoing, and proactive. There might be a good balance with both Yin and Yang energy in this match.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: It’s strange – you two are not very similar but also not very different in nature. Somehow, this probably works perfectly! You’re two signs that both tend to need alone time. He wants space to deal with his changing moods, and you need it to recharge your batteries. You’ll probably have a cozy home you enjoy together while still maintaining separate lives. You don’t have to worry about trust in this match – the typical Dog man won’t give you any reason to doubt him. Music to your ears? Thought so.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: If both of you have retreated in solitude, who will pick the kids up from school? After a fight, who’s going to apologize first? You two can both be passive-aggressive, so makes sure you don’t sweep problems under the rug or forget the important things. Since your Dog is generally trusting to a fault, make sure you respect his loyalty. If he witnesses flirtatious behavior or catches you in a lie, you’ll probably wound him for life. Your best bet is could be to stay in constant communication with each other – make sure nothing slips through the cracks.
cc_sign_match.Romance: This guy can take a while to warm up to you. He might be a little pessimistic and picky, but underneath is a loving and loyal companion. Don’t expect huge romantic gestures, but do expect plenty of affection. You’ll love how eager he is to please. He’ll likely want to cook you dinner at home, give you a foot rub, and then draw you a bubble bath after a long day at work. Since you occasionally come home worn out from absorbing the world’s negative energy, he might be everything your Snake heart could ask for.
cc_sign_match.Sex: He’s got no hidden neuroses about wanting to dominate in bed. In fact, he prefers if you’re the one on top. Are you up for it?! He may not be the most imaginative lover, but he’s tender, sweet, and very in tune with your needs. He’ll make love to you and then bring you breakfast in bed. He’ll let you penetrate his soul once he truly trusts you won’t hurt him. The strong friendship and affection you share with this guy should translate into powerful, meaningful sex.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and your Pig have enough in common that your coupledom could be destined for success. It can be a fair match, as long as you truly understand each other. As opposite signs in the Chinese Zodiac, you’re probably drawn to one another like moths to the flame, but you could get burned! Your man enjoys  a good time, and has a devoted nature. There should be plenty of laughing, bantering, and entertaining guests together.  With some work, things might be satisfying for you both. The question is how long will it last?
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: Since you share a Yin energy orientation, you and your Pig guy could be on the same wavelength. While neither of you have weak personalities, he probably approach life in a more easy-going, receptive way. Generally, you both tend to react to situations rather than try to stir up action. This shared approach could bode well for your relationship, as long as your similarities don’t cause a butting of heads.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: Sensual delights will probably drive this relationship. Laughter, food, music, sex, travel – you’ll typically have a ball. You probably adore the Pig’s quirky sense of humor, innate compassion, and bright mind. He, in turn, can feel more grounded and stable in your powerful presence. You won’t have to worry about trusting a Pig man, since he tends to be faithful no matter what. In general, you two have a lot in common that lends to fun, connection, and prosperity in love.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Communication might get tricky when your candid Pig wants to talk freely about his feelings. It’s not that you’re incapable, but you might struggle with his let’s hash it out and move on approach. You probably need more time and space to process things, so make sure to let him know when you want to fly solo for a bit. Don’t take advantage of his trusting nature, either. This guy, in all his earnest goodness, is likely to suffer greatly if he’s hurt.
cc_sign_match.Romance: While he is no Don Juan, he’s very in tune with the female species. He’ll court you slowly and carefully, which you’ll probably adore. After time, you’ll notice how attentive and intuitive he is. He knows what you need, when you need it, and wants to fall in love with you passionately and wholly. His tenderness and vulnerability might match well with your sensuality and underlying passion. Just make sure you don’t break his heart – he won’t be quick to recover.
cc_sign_match.Sex: To be frank, sex should be off the charts! He’s generally a true romantic. He’ll want to wine and dine you before he takes you off on his white horse to a bed scattered with rose petals. He can be more attached to fantasies than anything else, so don’t be surprised if he gets cranky when he finds out you’re not perfect. But, he’ll forgive it quickly. Give him plenty of sensual massage. Light candles. Burn incense. Anything that will heighten his senses. You’ll be generously rewarded for your thoughtfulness between the sheets.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: Uh oh. Trouble usually lands when opposite signs in the Chinese Zodiac come together. While you share some similar qualities, your differences may be too much to sustain a long-term relationship. You’re both movers and shakers, albeit in different ways. A free-flowing, bohemian, independent lifestyle probably suits you, while he’s more social and success-seeking in his adventures. You two might not be able to appreciate each other’s personalities enough to make love last. A strong spark at first, maybe, but it could fizzle out fast.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: Two Yang signs here. Sometimes that can work, although your match might be marked by friction. Too much Yang energy can be like fireworks in a tin can! This energy orientation probably makes you somewhat impulsive, goal oriented, and even a bit aggressive. His Yang personality probably gives him plenty of spunk, ambition, and a dose of impatience. Put those together, and you might have two people battling it out for the steering wheel! If one of you has enough Yin qualities – patience, reserve, and diplomacy – it will probably fare better for your relationship.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: This guy could complement you since his strengths are typically your weaknesses, and vice versa. He can take care of practical things you probably don’t enjoy, like balancing your checkbook or fixing things around the house. Your idealism might inspire him to accomplish his lofty goals and provide you with a comfortable life. Mentally , you two will probably enjoy a stimulating intellectual connection – there won’t be a shortage of communication here. If you can honor one another’s strengths and forgive weaknesses, you might have a shot.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: You probably hate being tied down, but he may want the security of a commitment. If you enjoy picking up and taking off at a moment’s notice, don’t expect this guy to join you. He’s generally more content to create a stable nest than live the life of a gypsy. Are you fiercely independent? If so, the two of you may bicker over your impulsiveness or unconventional tendencies. Most likely, he sees the big picture, while you focus on the immediate future. To make things work, he has to give you freedom to roam and you have to convince him you’ll always come back after you’re done wandering.
cc_sign_match.Romance: This guy’s romantic style may not appeal much to your get it on style. He probably likes flashy displays of affection and gestures that show off his wealth. However, you can appreciate his adventurous spirit. With a Rat, you never know where he’ll take you, but you can be pretty sure it won’t be the same place twice! He’s probably not into excessive makeup and doesn’t care whether you’re dressed in designer clothing. As long as you can wow him with your intellect and witty sense of humor, he’ll probably be charmed.
cc_sign_match.Sex: If there isn’t potential for a love match, at least you can count on some sparks in the bedroom! In fact, your relationship might start off on a sexual note before you even have the first date. Opposite signs in the Zodiac tend to have sexual magnetism to each other. Your Rat man is high-energy and eager to please. Since he tends to love the chase, you’ll feed his arousal just by being your independent self. A woman he can’t capture? This will probably baffle and motivate him. Once he finally pins you down, let him take the lead. He’ll want to conquer your body like an expedition on Everest.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: Even though the Rat is your Zodiac opposite, an Ox man may be just as different. Your personalities are opposing in many ways. While you’re generally carefree and unrestrained, he is probably conscientiousness and conservative. The freedom from attachment you crave is precisely the opposite of what he wants: security and routine. Though different, you both can be incredibly passionate people. Whether or not the passion for each other can last, however, will probably be the central issue.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: Your Ox man is a Yin sign, while you are Yang. Relationships tend to need a balance of both energies to stay harmonious, but opposite energies can clash. His general nature is probably more reserved, receptive, and peaceful than someone with Yang energy. On the flip side, you’re typically more aggressive, outspoken, and adventurous than him. The key here will probably be understanding each other’s different temperaments.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: Despite your independent personality, you probably want someone to lean on. That’s good, since he’ll love being your rock. He can probably provide you with the love and security you crave, deep down. In contrast, you might be just the person to draw him out of his comfort zone. You can teach him to lighten up and live more freely, while he can show you the value of a steady, dependable partner. All in all, you each have strengths that can support the foundation of this relationship, as long as your differences don’t break it apart.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Your Ox likes the pleasantries of a safe and secure home, while you’re probably happy to float around aimlessly. Marriage might be out of the question if you aren’t willing to settle down in one place. He might not understand your need for constant diversions – it could make him feel he’s not enough. It’s not likely he’ll accompany you on your wild excursions, but you probably want to fly solo anyway. Give him the promise of your love and then ask for permission to be free. It’s probably the only way you two will work things out.
cc_sign_match.Romance: Don’t expect wildly romantic sentiments from him. While you might see spontaneous gestures of affection as the very essence of love, he’s typically too practical for that. So what can you look forward to? He’ll pick you up on time. He’ll open your car door, pull out your chair, and pay for dinner. He’ll fix your broken dishwasher and make you soup when you’re sick. As long as you can appreciate his subdued, yet sweet style, you’ll be totally taken care of.
cc_sign_match.Sex: Underneath the quiet, brooding exterior of your Ox is a well of passion. It might take some time to tap into. Sometimes, he can struggle with the separation between love and sex, either confusing the two or finding it hard to join them together. Your job? Make him see you as his faithful girlfriend and naughty sex kitten all at the same time. Let him catch you easily and allow him to do his thing. If you can unleash his sexual zeal, you’ll be in for plenty of passion.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: A volcanic attraction will probably erupt between you and your Tiger man! This is indeed a favorable match since you’re both part of the Zodiac Love Triangle of Horse-Tiger-Dog. You two are free-thinking, independent, and adventurous.  You may be a tad more serious than him, but you’ll probably help him stay grounded. As sunny and optimistic creatures, you could have an active social life together while sharing similar goals as individuals. He won’t dare encroach on your freedom – since he needs just as much room to roam -- and you’ll love him to pieces for it.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: Both of your signs are Yang energy. Neither of you want to sit back and watch the action happen – you want to be in the center of it! You’re both probably driven to exciting careers and seek a life of adventure. This man will want to take the reigns, but you’ll be right there next to him waiting for your turn to drive! Since you’re both go-getters, expect an action-packed relationship with journeys on roads less traveled.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: No one understands your need for freedom as much as a Tiger. You don’t have to worry about being smothered. He probably won’t ask you to check in or demand all your time. Since he’s just as independent as you, the space in this relationship could give it plenty of room to grow. You admire each other, know each other’s boundaries, and have a lot in common. In general, one of you will always be able to be strong for the other. How wonderful!
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: If you’re a typical Horse, you might be a bit impulsive. The downside? This guy may be just as unpredictable! If you two can’t respect each other’s similar natures or both want to be in control, you might clash. Since it’s probable you each lead independent lives, make sure you factor in time to be together. It can be easy for you and your Tiger to not cross paths ‘cause you’re busy flying solo. That may be OK as long as it doesn’t become a habit.
cc_sign_match.Romance: Passion meets passion here! He’s the one guy that matches your boundless enthusiasm and hankering for adventure. Your first date might be an afternoon of skydiving or a weekend backpacking trip. This man loves to run free and he’ll be happy to take you along with him. Expect plenty of romantic gestures and spontaneous trips. He probably loves something that feeds his stalking tendencies, like duck hunting or paintballing. Are you up for it? I thought so!
cc_sign_match.Sex: Once you’ve been in bed with him, you know the name of the game: enthusiasm! You and he both might get bored easily, so you’ll have to keep sex interesting here. Don’t worry. That should be an easy task for you two. Deep down, he tends to want emotional acceptance and romance. But don’t be surprised if he’s aggressive one minute and sentimental the next. Just make sure to keep him guessing. He could stray if things get dull – this man typically hates routine, both in and out of the bedroom. Also, make him work for it. Tigers love to stalk their pray.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and a Rabbit man may have to put work into maintaining a satisfying match. Very different by nature, you two seem to diverge all over the place. You’re probably assertive, outspoken, and a wee bit aggressive, while he might be laid-back, reserved, and somewhat timid. This guy is usually nice to have around – he’s smart, loving, classy, and refined. But he prefers the comforts of home and you probably want more adventure than he can provide. Making adjustments will likely be the name of the game with this relationship.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: You’re a Yang sign, which means you’re completely opposite from him as a Yin energy person. Some of the qualities associated with Yang are fast, aggressive, hot, and dominant. Sound like you? I thought so! He, on the other hand, is probably not the aggressor type. Yin energy people are usually go-with-the-flow personalities who take things slowly and carefully. They don’t often pursue, but they get what they want by patiently waiting for it.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: The good news? His powers of compassion makes him an amazing listener and communicator. He probably has an innate ability to understand your deepest insecurities and inner conflicts. You will generally appreciate his tenderness and affections, as long as he doesn’t smother you. Your outgoing personality also might help draw him out a bit. When he’s sitting at home on a Saturday night, you can motivate him to get off the couch. He, in turn, might benefit from running around in your influential circle and meeting new people.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: You might never hear the end of it if you skip town without telling him. Careful not to step on his delicate paws with your heavy hooves. Though you’re probably loving and warm-hearted, your restless nature could conflict with his calm and contained personality. Since he’s someone who generally thrives on constant communication, it might be hurtful if you take off on a two-week vacation without him. You could have to work on consistency with him in order to stay close.
cc_sign_match.Romance: This man loves the finer things in life – lucky you! He’ll probably take you to the nicest restaurants, buy you designer clothing, and decorate your home with expensive furniture. If you’re a rugged and adventurous Horse, he may only go camping with you if there’s a comfy air mattress and good wine to drink by the fire. He’s sensitive, so he’ll pay attention to little things. He’ll open your car door, pull out your chair, and give you his coat when you’re cold. While he may not be up for wild and crazy dates, he’ll lavish you with beautiful things and fine food. Sounds good to me!
cc_sign_match.Sex: Your sexual styles might be a bit different. Do you thrive off the thrill of a wild romp? This guy might not be into the quick and dirty. Most likely, he’ll take his time and shower you with tender kisses. He’s probably a true romantic, so be careful about acting crass or vulgar until you’re sure he can handle it. The good news? He’ll typically be fine with letting you dominate, since he’s more passive by nature anyway. Can you be tender? Sensual? Feminine? If so, he’ll be eating out of the palm of your hand.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: Finally. A man who’s just as passionate and free-thinking as you are! Your Dragon probably embodies the archetype of an old world hero – strong, valiant, and powerful. He’s quick to take action and change directions without notice, but that’s your style too. Unbridled passion? Blistering infatuation? You got it. He’ll be happy to race alongside you no matter where you’re going – and it’s likely you have the same destination in mind! His idealism and your free spirit should make for one dazzling relationship.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: Yang on top of Yang? Oh boy. You two will take no prisoners. Yang people are typically energetic, ambitious, goal-oriented, and quick to take action. A Dragon will relate to your outgoing, assertive nature -- he’s the same way. However, since yang people tend to move quickly, be careful about burnout in this match. One of you might have to remind the other to slow down! The good news is that you’ll approach life the same way – with vigor, bravery, and purpose!
cc_sign_match.TheGood: You two can have loads of fun together, as long as you don’t butt heads. As an active, stimulating pair, there’s no end to your adventures. Socially and mentally, you’re similar: moving at lightening speed and charming everyone along the way. Since neither of you like to settle down for long, travel could become a way of life. This guy will probably keep you entertained and curious unlike any other sign. He’s your intellectual equal and partner in crime. Sounds fun to me!
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: The challenge with you two might be your fickleness. He could be the more reliable one in the relationship, and your changeable nature may stress him out. Since he probably needs a peaceful and orderly place to call home, you might have to put on your apron and play housewife once in awhile. Will you be able to  hack it? As long as there is enough variety and freedom in your relationship, things should run smoothly. Make sure your communication is in tip-top shape so you can deal with conflict effectively.
cc_sign_match.Romance: Do you feel like you’ve stepped into a fairy tale? Your Dragon’s mysticism is famous. He’s the knight in shining armor, the war hero, the Ulysses to your Penelope. Whatever he does, he’ll do it 100%. This should bode well with your personality type, and he’ll love trying to keep up with you. Bold gestures and wild sentiments are the name of the game. Have fun playing!
cc_sign_match.Sex: Not everyone can handle the blowtorch bedroom behavior of a Dragon, but you can! This guy’s magnetism is a powerful force. You both can be passionate and ardent between the sheets, but you may clash over who gets to be on top. He probably won’t hold back his emotions either, so expect plenty of grunting, moaning, and the like while you’re getting busy. But just when you think he’s being a bit crude, he’ll kiss you tenderly and tell you how beautiful you are. Your best bet? Let him take the lead and he’ll take care of your every need.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: Opposites attract, but they also create friction. If you’re paired up with a Snake guy, you’ll probably notice he’s an entirely different life form. He’s usually got a strong need for solitude and security, while you’re scampering around town in your carefree fashion. Consistency might be hard to achieve here, since he wants to know where he stands and you might have trouble committing. If you can give him plenty of reassurance and he can let you run free, it could work.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: Since you’re Yang, and he’s Yin, there could be opposing forces at work. As a Yang sign, you’re probably autonomous, enthusiastic, curious, and industrious. Yang energy people are usually go-getters who tend to be assertive. His Yin energy probably makes him compromising, intuitive, diplomatic, and passive. With different energy natures, you two may find it a challenge to understand each other’s motives or personalities.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: There are some positive qualities in your match. You probably admire his gregarious and generous nature, while he loves your spitfire attitude. Socially, you’ll be active and fun-loving as a team. Also, there might be a strong physical attractive force between you, if only because you’re so different from each other. You both can learn a thing or two if you’re open to constructive criticism. You could stand to be a bit more sensitive to his feelings, while he could learn to be more adventurous and less judgmental.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: If you’re a typical Horse, you might cringe at the idea of holy matrimony, or even a monogamous relationship. Probably content to be alone, you simply want to remain free. However, he may be unsettled with a woman who balks at partnership. If he has indulgent or lazy tendencies, this will most likely irritate you. Are you more conservative and practical than him? If he wants your respect, he might have to give up some of those Snake-like extravagances. Your best bet? Communicate. Compromise. Be flexible and willing to change.
cc_sign_match.Romance: Your Snake man invented the meaning of romance. He’s got enough charm and slippery moves to break hearts all over the world. You might find his style a bit over the top – he can be intense. But, he can make a girl feel like she’s the only one in the world. Lucky you! Keep him guessing, as he can have a wandering eye. If he thinks he doesn’t have you, he’ll be banging down your door until he’s sure you’re his again.
cc_sign_match.Sex: The seductive Snake is legendary for his moves! Your sexual styles may be a bit different, but you’ll probably be satisfied with him in the sack. He’s more of a slow-moving lover than a quick-to-finish type. For him, sex is usually about sensuality and connection. He likes to intertwine limbs, and the feel of skin to skin contact can arouse him instantly. The way to please him? Move slowly and seductively. Crawl and slither on top of him like one of his own kind. It won’t take long before you know the meaning of a Snake man's seductive powers.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: So you found another of your own kind? Nothing is certain when you pair up two independent, restless animals! The good news is a Horse guy will probably understand your need for freedom more than most. He enjoys the dirt beneath his feet and the wind in his hair as much as you do. Marriage? Kids? Mortgage? It might not happen right away for you two free spirits. However, you could be OK with that. As long as you’re both content with an unconventional relationship, things will probably be lively and lovely with this guy.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: There are two yang personalities in this relationship. How will that fare for a love connection? Let’s just say there will be plenty of ambition and passion to go around. Yang energy typically makes you assertive, proactive, outgoing, and goal-oriented – just like him. This means you’ll probably have similar personalities and temperaments. However, you might have power struggles as well. If you two have enough Yin qualities to balance it out, the relationship will run more smoothly.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: What can you expect with another Horse? Double the excitement, and double the fun! You’re two peas in a pod. There could be a strong and fast bond that glues you together for life. Both high-energy risk takers and radical thinkers, you probably love being in motion and now you have a companion for the road. This match might be the envy of all your friends – you’re a witty, lively, and charming pair. Whether jetting off to Mexico for Christmas or starting a chicken farm in Tennessee, you two probably won’t run out of big ideas.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: If one of you has a more conservative streak, things could get tricky. Should you or he want to settle down, this could be the dividing factor in the relationship. Typically, you’ll both want your freedom and independence, putting your own dreams and goals over the good of the relationship. Running a home together might get messy, too, since neither of you tends to be good at remembering the details. Your biggest challenge will probably be consistency and compromise.
cc_sign_match.Romance: Oh, to be a fly on the wall during your first date. Practically anything could happen when this guy shows up on your doorstep. Maybe you’ll go skinny dipping at the local YMCA. Or perhaps you’ll go bungee jumping at the Grand Canyon. This guy’s style is one of adventure and thrills. He’ll probably want to take you on extreme outdoor excursions or to wildly crowded concerts and parties. While some would shy away from danger and chaos, you probably won’t blink an eye. My advice? Sign up for a life insurance policy before you go on that first date.
cc_sign_match.Sex: If all else fails, at least you’ll have fun between the sheets! Picture a wild stampede with plenty of surprises. You probably match him in stamina and passion, so don’t be surprised if your sexcapades last all day – or all week! Remember to come up for air! He’s probably goal-oriented in bed, just like in life. Take turns being dominant, too. The best part? After a good romp, you’ll probably want to hang out and talk. Hot sex and a solid friendship? You couldn’t ask for more.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: On the surface, a Sheep man might not seem like your type. He’s probably a domesticated homebody with somewhat of a moody streak. If you look closer, however, you might see a diamond in the rough. This man can usually provide you with a stable home base while not infringing on your freedom. Not only that, he’ll probably keep you on your toes with plenty of variety and his unconventional approach to life. As two free-spirited, progressive people, this could be an enduring match indeed.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: You are Yang and he is Yin. Sometimes a relationship with opposite energies is tumultuous, but this match could be harmonious. Your hard-driving ambition might complement his unusual and eccentric pursuits. With enough fast and aggressive Yang energy, things should stay exciting in love. Additionally, a good dose of his calm Yin energy can smooth over the wrinkles. Even though you have different temperaments, you can probably appreciate one another’s unique personalities.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: The typical Sheep can sometimes suffer from doubt or insecurities. With you around, however, he’ll get a huge helping of sunshine and positive energy. You’ll probably encourage him to take life less seriously, while he can help you stay grounded and calm. You two can dream up the most unusual schemes and keep each other entertained with lively conversation and philosophical debate. The best part? He’s got an independent streak, which gives you free reign to have yours.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Trouble in paradise could arise when your Sheep man feels abandoned. It’s probably in your nature to roam, but his sensitive side might have a problem with that. The bigger challenge, however, will probably be his tendency to stuff his feelings. He may keep things to himself for some time – perhaps even until it’s too late to resolve them.  Since he typically feels a need for attention and security, you might need to be more accommodating about giving him your whereabouts while you’re off on all your adventures and give him some extra stroking when you return.
cc_sign_match.Romance: Your Sheep man is no stranger to romance. Gentle love songs, candlelight dinners and roses are his hallmarks. You can expect plenty of affection. Of course he’ll be looking for the same in return. Valentine’s Day could be his most important holiday of the year. Nothing will be too good for you in his eyes.  You’ve got a tender lover there – enjoy. Mood is everything to him, the more romantic the better. His approach may be slow, but just you wait until he gets warmed up! Can you say steamy?!
cc_sign_match.Sex: Your Sheep guy has his own style in the sack. If you’ve made it to bed with him, you know what I’m talking about. He’s probably got one or two strange quirks that either wildly turn you on or repel you completely. A lover of spontaneity and variety yourself, you’ll probably appreciate how kinky and unusual he is between the sheets. What’s better, however, is his innate sensitivity and kindness in lovemaking. He wants sex to be beautiful, spiritual, and fun all at the same time. And he puts in the effort to make it so. Sounds good to me!

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and a Monkey man have areas of similar interest. Your differences, however, could prevent you from getting along very well. Both social, versatile, and outgoing, you might meet at a museum benefit, cocktail party, or other social gathering. But can you both keep your egos out of the relationship long enough for it to survive? He’s independent and practical – like you, but this could cause a butting of the heads rather than a meeting of the minds. The focus here will probably be a balancing act between two strong-willed, mentally quick individuals.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: Two Yang personalities might cause friction in this relationship. Even though your energies are similar, you’re probably just different enough to not quite understand each other. Typically, your Yang energy manifests in a free-spirited, idealistic, and adventurous personality. Your Monkey man, however, is more of a rational thinker, planner, and fun-seeking individual. Translation? You’re both ambitious and assertive, albeit in different ways and for different reasons.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: With another social, gregarious, and active creature, you’ll probably find yourself stimulated and entertained to no end. Your man knows how to have fun, and you’ll gladly hop in for the ride! Neither of you likes to stay in one place for too long, so don’t worry about getting bored with this guy. With your common sense and his innovative thinking skills, you two could easily run a business, travel the world, or become influential political figures together. It’s not likely you’ll run out of things to do or people to impress.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Should one of you happen to lag behind, you might be left in the dust. This guy can be somewhat self-centered, and you’re known for that fierce independence. If you part ways to pursue different things, there may not be enough reasons to join forces again. And for him parting is sorrow, that he’s not going to get over easily. While you may enjoy each other’s lively company, a lasting bond might be difficult to maintain. If one of you is more domesticated or home-oriented, there’s probably a better chance for success. Cooperation might be key if you’re going to make it work.
cc_sign_match.Romance: If you don’t make it in a long-term relationship, at least you’ll have a ball in the romance department! The reason for your initial attraction is probably your mutual love of adventure and fun. This guy can be flamboyant and knows how to impress. Sailing on Sunday? Wine tasting on Wednesday? Five-star dinner on Friday? You got it. He’s not afraid to show off his success and shower you with the best life has to offer. You may be a bit more rugged, however, so his flashy style could seem too over-the-top. In any case, you’ll probably be spoiled with him hanging around.
cc_sign_match.Sex: What’s the best way to keep your Monkey man’s attention in the sack? Keep him guessing, of course! His mental curiosity needs constant feeding, so mind tricks and games of cat and mouse will probably be arousing for him. He often wants what he sees as unattainable, so even if you’re in for the long haul, keep him on his toes. Sex should be playful, amusing, and fun with him – so long as neither of you gets bored.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and the exacting Rooster might not seem the likeliest of pairs. He’s got clear cut ideas about his life plan, while you’re open to detours and changes in direction. As two people with strong opinions and stubborn tendencies, you might have a hard time being flexible with each other. He may not understand your free spirit while you can’t comprehend his rigid thinking. Most likely, there will have to be plenty of mutual compromise in order for you two to get along well.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: As a Yang-Yin match up, you two probably have dissimilar personalities and ways of approaching life. As a fast, outgoing, and social Yang person, you probably prefer movement and variety. Your Rooster man’s Yin energy probably makes him more reserved, methodical, and subtle in his temperament and personality. A good relationship usually has a balance of Yin and Yang energies. However, people with different orientations can sometimes clash. You might find this guy is too different to understand; and vice versa.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: Together, you two could make a powerful team. Your stable, methodical, and perfectionist Rooster can lend you just the qualities you may lack. In turn, you can teach him to loosen up a bit and go with the flow. Want to join forces for a common goal or project? As two power players, you could be an intimidating pair! Your grandiose ideas with his practical nature might enable success for both of you – but does it translate into your relationship? It’s kind of a toss up.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: You probably don’t do well when someone gives orders, and this man will want to boss you around. Don’t take it personally – it’s just his way. He’ll offer his opinion on everything from the color of your hair to your chosen career path. Can you see how he’d drive you crazy? Also, your free-spirited ways might have him scratching his head. He typically doesn’t understand carelessness or frivolity, which might be part of your makeup. The verdict? You’ll probably have to be willing to discuss things with him instead of running off. In turn, he’ll have to become less rigid.
cc_sign_match.Romance: Things might be oddly compatible for you in the romance department. This man loves the chase, and you’re probably always running. Your wild and spontaneous nature will have him completely awestruck. If he does manage to pin you down for a date, he’ll treat it like a powerful conquest. Try to be well-groomed and articulate around him – he’ll probably be quick to point out if your makeup is smudged, or you aren’t up to date on current politics. Look good, smell good, and make sure you impress him with your wit.
cc_sign_match.Sex: What can I say about his sexual preferences? A little strange, to say the least. He may be into power plays in the bedroom – always wanting the control over a helpless female. Some might accuse him of being misogynistic, but it may just be his thirst for domination in any form. Give him a taste of his own medicine if you’re tired of being the passive one in bed. Another thing? Appeal to his fetishes. It’s likely he’s got more than one strange, sexual obsession.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: As another animal in your Love Triangle group, a Dog man is probably a good match for you. Hooray! If you’re a typical, restless Horse, you can enjoy this guy’s dependable, down-to-earth nature. He’ll probably admire your guts and gusto, while being totally content to stay in the background and hold down the fort. What’s more, you generally won’t have to give up your independence around him – he needs his alone time too. This could be a satisfying and fulfilling match for both of you.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: Both of your signs are Yang energy. Neither of you like to sit back and watch the action happen; you both want to be the one who starts it! In your own ways you’re probably driven to achieve successful careers and fulfilling lives. This man will want to take the reins, but that shouldn’t bother you too much. You see he probably prefers heading the routine stuff and you enjoy the march into unchartered territory. Sharing the driver’s seat? Not a problem. You’ll both have plenty of opportunities to call the shots in your own comfort zone.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: You might learn a lot from this philosophical, deep-natured Dog. He’ll keep you entertained and curious with good conversation, and you’ll satisfy his sense of humor with your charisma and charm. A strong friendship is likely at first, which could develop into a long-lasting relationship or marriage. The best part of this match might be your similar need for alone time. Neither of you is likely to object when the other wants a bit of freedom. What a relief!
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: If your Dog man gets a little moody, you might meet with his dark side. One of the challenges of this relationship could be your different ways of dealing with emotional stress. Try not to run away when things get rocky – this could alienate him quickly. Things to work on? He might need to be more candid and less withholding. You might need to be a bit more sensitive and tactful.
cc_sign_match.Romance: You might not get a whole lot of fireworks and magic with a Dog man, but you’ll get plenty of good old fashioned romance. He’s the kind of guy who will open your car door, bring you fresh flowers at work, and be there for you when you really need him. Instead of fast and ferocious, being courted by him will probably feel slow and comfortable. And just when you’re feeling a bit bored, he’ll surprise you with something so tender and sweet you’ll remember why you fell for him in the first place.
cc_sign_match.Sex: This match might have you between the sheets – fast. There’s probably a strong physical connection in addition to your hearty friendship. He may not be the most innovative lover, but he’s probably sentimental, sweet, and tender. You might be glad to know he’ll let you be on top. In fact, he probably prefers it that way! Just be careful with his ego. This guy can bruise easily, so be aware when he’s being vulnerable in bed. When your passion meets his sensitivity, there’s a high likelihood of sexual bliss!

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: Two pleasure-seekers can always have a good time! The Pig man is social, happy-go-lucky, and loveable – like you. You two might be the hottest couple in town, what with your gregarious nature and his innate charm. Since you both understand the meaning of compromise, you’ll probably be able to smooth over differences easily. It won’t all be rosy, however, since your lifestyles might be quite different. He’s probably a homebody while you’re a roamer. If you can meet in the middle, things might work out well.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: He’s a Yin sign, which means he’s probably easygoing, peaceful, and calm. Yang energy typically makes you the get up and go type, which might bring conflict over what constitutes a fun Saturday night. If you can admire each other’s strengths and give credit where it’s deserved, you’ll be much better off. Any relationship needs both Yin and Yang energy to stay harmonious. Try to strike a balance.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: The Pig man can keep up with you in his own way. He’s a social creature and typically well-liked by everyone. Is your social calendar always full? It probably will be that way with him. You two love a good time and always know how to find one. Also, neither of you tend to have unrealistic ideas about relationships, which might make things easier. Good laughs, witty conversation, and sensual indulgences will probably be plentiful with your Pig man.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: While your different natures might often mesh, they can also cause conflict. He’s probably not as free-spirited or spontaneous as you, so settling down together might be a long-standing battle. Also, both of you might throw caution to the wind just a bit too much. Parties, social functions, and vacations might keep you entertained, but who’s going to pay the bills and do the laundry? Staying practical and flexible will probably be necessary in the long run.
cc_sign_match.Romance: A woman usually remembers dating a Pig man. He was the one who always paid attention to her feelings, noticed the little things, and seemed like the nicest, most pleasant guy she’d ever met. Sound like your man? He typically doesn’t have a mean bone in his body – unless you injure him, and that’s another story. Oh, did I mention he’ll go out of his way to make sure you’re happy? You can usually expect the best and get it from this guy. How wonderful.
cc_sign_match.Sex: This guy can be a surprising bundle of contradictions in bed. He’s sweet, then dirty. He’s sensual, then crude. If he seems a bit silly or strange, you’re probably just witnessing his total sexual honesty. He can be a bit perverted underneath his good-natured, nice guy act. But, deep down, he probably wants long-lasting, soul-shattering love. And, he wants to experience it through sex. He’ll probably satisfy your appetite for strange and unusual sexual encounters. Just make sure to wrap your arms around him and tell him you love him after you’re done.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: While your Rat man typically leads a busy and productive social life, you probably have a more reserved artist’s soul. Your differences are, well, glaring, so you may have to work hard at a fulfilling relationship. He’ll be off dancing at a night club, and you’ll spend the weekend at a wilderness retreat. Connecting at home might help your love grow, as your man treats his loved ones with special concern and generosity – exactly what your worrisome heart needs. Can you find common ground between his scheming, fast-paced ways with your dreamy and emotional nature? If so, this match might work.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: As Yin and Yang, you two probably couldn’t be more different. Yin energy might make you the passive, receptive, feeling-oriented one. He, in contrast, probably has the aggressive, ambitious, and outgoing qualities associated with Yang. Since relationships need a bit of both energies to stay balanced, your match could be harmonious. It also, however, could be challenging since your temperaments may be opposite.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: Viva la good life! That’s probably a motto you both subscribe to. His knack for money making? Your impeccable taste? A cushy future may be in the cards. Neither of you is typically aggressive or outspoken, so you can probably tend to each other’s feelings with sensitivity and tenderness. That strong, protective figure you seek is embodied in your Rat man. And for him, you’ll probably create a serene and peaceful place he can enjoy at the end of a long day.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Have you been scolded for spending all his hard-earned cash? If not, a stern lecture may be on its way. You might have to curb your appetite for fine things, since your man doesn’t tolerate frivolity very well. There are probably things he needs to work on too. His logical, left-brained approach to life can probably seem cold or insensitive when you’re needing emotional support. It’s nothing personal. You two just approach life in very different ways. Be careful, too, about stuffing your feelings. Since neither of you likes to argue, things could get swept under the rug.
cc_sign_match.Romance: Your Rat man is not a true romantic in the traditional sense of the word. However, he’s probably generous, supportive, and fun to date. He’ll probably pick a best friend or partner in crime type over an empty-headed supermodel beauty. He’ll be intrigued by your philosophical mind and classy style, but you don’t need to impress him with fancy clothes or outstanding credentials. He won’t take you on the same date twice with his innate sense of adventure, quick mind, and social nature. If you can show off your big brain and make him laugh, you’ll probably have him hooked.
cc_sign_match.Sex: Your sexual styles may be like night and day. He’s probably quick to act, aggressive, and goal-oriented between the sheets. You, on the other hand, might see sex as a spiritual portal to higher consciousness – preferring a slow and sensual style. What you may have in common, however, is a willingness to try new things. He’s always up for a thrill, and you can have an open mind when it comes to doing the deed. Keep him guessing, as he loves the chase, and there will be plenty to work with as lovers.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: In general, opposite signs in the Chinese Zodiac are drawn to each other like moths to the flame. Your stable and persevering Ox man is a sharp contrast to your free-spirited, capricious nature. While you may be wildly attracted to your polar opposite, it’s probably wise to tread carefully. A consuming infatuation could eventually be replaced by grim realities of your differences. It might be best to take things slowly with this guy before declaring your undying love.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: As two Yin signs, there might not be enough assertive Yang energy in your relationship. He’s probably somewhat reserved, passive, and non-confrontational – like you. Trouble could pop up when both of you turn inward instead of hashing things out on the spot. On a positive note, your similar temperaments can help you understand one another better. If one of you is a bit more dominant, ambitious, and outgoing, you’ll typically have a better energy balance in the relationship.
