cc_sign_match.TheGood: You can picture a cozy home, a crackling fire, and a strong shoulder to lean on with your Ox around. He’s usually the strong, silent type and will always defend your honor. With his innate sense of responsibility and duty, you can rely on him to balance your checkbook and pay the mortgage on time. In turn, you’ll probably bring out his sensitive side. He can appreciate your loving sentiments like having dinner on the table or giving him a backrub after a long day. Since you both probably prefer quiet time over the bustling social scene, you’ll have consistent company – just the way you like it.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Do you have a hard time making decisions? If so, arguments could erupt over your fickleness, since he’s a man with a plan. In turn, his need for schedules and routine might give you anxiety. A go-with-the-flow attitude is a foreign concept to him, so you may have to at least feign a sense of organization. This guy can have high expectations, so don’t be surprised if he doesn’t tend to your every bad mood or emotional injury. You’ll probably have to buck up and be a bit more tough-skinned. Can you hack it?
cc_sign_match.Romance: Oh boy. The most romantic sign of the Chinese Zodiac meets the least. Your fairy-tale notions about Prince Charming are probably a waste of time with your Ox. It’s not that he’s crude or unfeeling – he just expresses love in his own practical way. Why would he waste money on buying you flowers when he can rip out those weeds in the backyard and plant a rosebush? His idea of romance probably has more to do with keeping you fed, clothed, and safe than sweeping you off your feet. But hey. At least he’s consistent!
cc_sign_match.Sex: Your Ox man is not the most sexually spontaneous of creatures. However, below that tough exterior is a reserve of passion. Your job will be to tap into it. Know that saying that suggests the fastest way to a man’s heart is through his stomach? Appeal to his senses with a home-cooked meal, give him a back rub, and listen while he talks about his day. Unleash the power of your feminine magic, and he’ll probably crumble under the softness of your touch. Another thing. Let him be the aggressor. It’s no use battling his sheer force.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: The sheer pull of a Tiger man can be overwhelming. He’s got the magnetism and charm of a movie star or politician, doesn’t he? You two may initially hit it off, but a long-term match could be tricky. After sweeping you off your feet, he may balk at your demands in a real relationship. While he probably enjoys being your knight in shining armor, he also needs plenty of freedom. With a skittish and sometimes worrisome nature, you might want someone a bit more attentive. If you can keep life interesting with travel or adventure, you two might have a better shot at staying close.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: You are the Yin to his Yang. What does that mean for your relationship? Let’s just say you two are different. He can be fast, aggressive, and intellectual, while you may be slow, passive and more intuitive. He tends to take the bull by the horns, and you probably want to saunter along next to it. Get it? You’re probably a little more thoughtful and deliberate in your approach to life. He, on the other hand, tends to go with his gut and pounce on things as quickly as they come. You might have to work at understanding each other’s different personalities in order to avoid arguments.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: Get ready to think outside the box and color outside the lines. It’s likely you both love to explore and experience new things. You’ll typically be happy to serve him and he’ll feel good about being the stronger, more dominant person in this relationship. Shared values like individualism and freedom might draw you together. You bring creativity, spirituality, and an artistic flair to the relationship, while he offers the energy, passion, and fire so characteristic of a Tiger man.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Things might get challenging! You may be a bit of a dreamer, and he can be a tad impulsive. Having trouble remembering the practical things? You might be too busy puttering around in the garden and he’s constantly distracted by his work goals or business ventures. Another thing? He may get tired of your passive approach or lack of resolve. In turn, you might find his unpredictable temper or impulsive ways a bit frightening.
cc_sign_match.Romance: Your Tiger man is somewhat of a Casanova, no? This guy probably believes in chivalry and old-fashioned romance – with a touch of spontaneity. No one will appreciate his grand sentimental gestures more than you. He’s usually quick to fall in love, but just as quick to fall out, so be on your toes while you’re dating. Give him a reason to chase you – he’s probably got a heightened stalking instinct. You’ll generally enjoy plenty of travel, adventure, and fun. With a Tiger, anything is possible!
cc_sign_match.Sex: As two generous, warm-hearted lovers, your sex life might be satisfying and sensual. He’s not afraid to take the lead, and you’re probably more than willing to let him. There should be plenty of passion, but don’t expect him to hang around and cuddle after you’re done making love. He’s always jetting off to the next adventure, even if it’s just washing his car or making you breakfast. Give him plenty of space to run and he’ll come bounding back to bed eventually.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: Found yourself a Rabbit? This match should be breeze ! As two animals from the same Love Triangle group – Sheep, Rabbit, Pig -- you can probably form a deep, long lasting connection. You typically have several similarities, and even your differences are likely to be complementary. Both of you are dreamy, artistic souls who probably rely more on emotion and intuition than on logic to navigate your way in life. With a shared sense of compassion and kindness, you can make one another feel well-loved and appreciated. Fantastic!
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: You and the Rabbit are both Yin signs -- passive, receptive, and highly intuitive. Yin energy people tend to deal with change easily and go with the flow. Since you’re both Yin, it might be easier to understand each other. But, you could need to work on creating structure and stability in your relationship. The good qualities of Yin allow you both to be creative, tolerant, and peaceful. You may not be born leaders, but you adapt easily and can create harmony out of conflict.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: Don’t be surprised if this man can read your mind and your moods like his own; he’s totally on your wavelength. You two will probably have plenty to rejoice over: common interests, similar dispositions, and maybe even the same set of morals and values. He’ll love the sense of security you give him. You’ll love how amusing and interesting he is. The fact that he’s generally organized and structured will be good for you, while you can help diffuse his anxieties and insecurities. The verdict? Two peas in a pod!
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: If you’ve got a tendency for unusual or unconventional behavior, your Rabbit man might disapprove. While you might balk at societal norms, he appreciates order and structure. If he can let you be your quirky self, you’ll probably have a more harmonious match. Try to compromise by keeping the house clean and filling it with classy, beautiful things. Another thing to remember. While you both might be homebodies, make sure you get out of the house enough to keep the relationship interesting.
cc_sign_match.Romance: Good taste? Class? Elegance? Sophistication? Your Rabbit man probably has them all, and then some. He’s likely to spoil you with the finer things in life, and you’ll be a happy recipient. He’s a romantic – like you – so his sentimental gestures will resonate with your sappy side. What can you expect? Vacations at five-star resorts, expensive linens, and a refrigerator full of gourmet foods! Show your continued appreciation, and he’ll be happy to keep giving.
cc_sign_match.Sex: You and your Rabbit man will probably hit it off in the bedroom, but only after you’ve become great friends. You could have incredible sexual chemistry and enough of it to keep you immobilized in bed all day! As two home-loving creatures, you’ll probably spend hours in soul-gazing, limb-locking embraces. He’s a romantic lover and will probably be generous with his time and energy. You’ll return the favor, which should make for total satisfaction between the sheets. Enjoy!

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and your Dragon aren’t the likeliest of pairs; you may have to work at a happy union. Perhaps you’ll have a lot in common, but your temperaments are vastly different. Both preferring to have your own way, you might butt heads every now and then. While you’re probably reserved and quiet-natured, he can be brash and bold. If you two can accept each other’s differences and use them to your advantage, you’ll have a better chance of success.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: As a Yin sign, you’re probably more reserved and quiet than your Yang Dragon. If he’s typical of his sign, he probably embodies the very essence of Yang – boisterous, assertive, fiery, and outgoing. A good balance of both energies is the best thing for a successful relationship, but your opposing natures might clash. You may move at conflicting paces and interact with the world differently. This match will probably need plenty of compromise and understanding to work.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: If you’re somewhat of a worrier, his sunny and strong disposition can keep you upbeat and positive. You, more than most, can appreciate having a solid presence to lean on. He’ll delight in your knack for creating domestic tranquility and a happy home. Providing a warm and loving space for you two to share, he can be your rock and you his safety net. If you’re a fan of affectionate strokes and compliments to feel secure in a relationship, you’re bound to appreciate his honest and loving sentiments.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Things could get sticky if your Dragon lets his temper get the best of him. He’ll probably have to be careful about blaming or criticizing you – as you won’t soon forget it. There also might be an issue if he’s being bossy, so only ask for his advice is you really want it. You might get frustrated with his power plays and need to be adored. You like the attention on you, thanks! If you can respect each other’s differences, your personalities can be more complementary than clashing.
cc_sign_match.Romance: One area that might be sparkling is the romance department! If you’re a typical Sheep, you probably love to be in love – and he’s no different. He practically invented the meaning of the word, and he won’t run out of ways to show his affections. Fond of grand gestures and bold moves, he’ll probably be the one delivering flowers to your work or surprising you with tickets to the Bahamas on your birthday. He loves to succeed in making a woman feel special, and who wouldn’t enjoy the attention!?
cc_sign_match.Sex: Underneath that scaly exterior is a sensitive soul. Your Dragon has insecurities and worries that might only come out when he’s being vulnerable in bed. He’s probably a fantastic, lover, however. With enough passion and heat for any woman, he’ll typically be sensitive, lustful, and romantic in bed. You probably won’t have any problem letting him be in charge, and he’ll love stepping up to the challenge. One thing is almost certain – you won’t forget a romp with this fire-breathing creature.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and your Snake can form a good, solid relationship that’s brimming with creativity and inspiration. With his progressive mind, sharp sense of humor, and seductive appeal, you could be one happy Sheep. As a couple, you’ll probably be charming and appealing as the pair your friends go to for advice or help. Artistic or spiritual pursuits might draw you together, and a shared love of beauty and harmony should keep you close. Together you make a tender and altruistic match!
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: While too much Yin energy can sometimes cause problems, here it could work to your advantage. As Yin signs, you can probably understand one another easily. Yin people tend to approach the world intuitively and subjectively, rather than practically and logically. You’re probably dreamers or artist types who can go with the flow. A shared value system and similar preferences should make you a compatible pair.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: There’s no one like your Snake man to understand the sensual side of life. You two share a love of beauty, magic, and grace, which should make your relationship sparkle! You’ll probably adore his intellectual superiority and philosophical mind. He’ll admire your creative spark and individuality. If you live together, your home will probably be filled with fabulous art and plenty of spots for cozy cuddling and lovemaking. All in all, you two have plenty in common to stay fulfilled and happy.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Are your Snake’s words sometimes a bit biting? He’s probably got a razor sharp tongue, and you usually run for the hills at the first sign of conflict. His brazen style might not suit you -- could downright offend you. Another challenge could be the practicalities of daily life. Neither of you tend to be diligent about bill paying or doing the dishes. This man probably loves making a creative mess, but doesn’t always know how to clean it up. My advice? You might have to hire a live in maid or a professional organizer to keep your lives in order.
cc_sign_match.Romance: This guy is legendary for his slick moves, so he may lay it on thick! In fact, he’s probably got more sex appeal than any other sign in the Zodiac. He may be the outwardly flashy type or more subtle in his approach. Either way, he’ll probably pull you in slowly and quietly until he’s ready for the kill. His intensity won’t scare you, however – you’re both probably looking for that all-enveloping, consuming kind of love. You just might find it with him.
cc_sign_match.Sex: Your Snake man sees sex as more of a dance than a sport. He likes to intertwine limbs, stare into your eyes, and penetrate your soul if he can. He wants to get inside you in more ways than one! As sexual partners, you’ll probably share the same slow moving, sensual approach to the act. No race to the finish line here! Scented candles, silk sheets, and soft music will probably be a normal part of your bedroom behavior. Just make sure you get out of bed once in a while. With him, you may never want to leave!

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: As two free-spirited, progressive people, this could be an enduring match indeed. You’re different creatures, but in complementary ways. He needs a fair amount of freedom, but will probably be a loving and generous mate. You’ll keep him stimulated and interested with your keen intellect and unusual style. Even if you have different temperaments, you can probably influence one another in positive ways. Travel, interesting conversation, and a hearty friendship should keep you two close.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: You are Yin, and he is Yang. Sometimes a relationship with opposite energies is tumultuous, but this match could be just the opposite. His hard-driving ambition might complement your unusual and eccentric pursuits. With his fast and aggressive Yang energy, things should stay exciting in love. Additionally, a good dose of your calm Yin energy can smooth over the wrinkles. Even though you have different ways of approaching life, you can probably appreciate one another’s differences.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: If you tend to struggle with doubt or insecurities, you may breathe easier with your Horse around. He can usually deliver anyone a huge helping of sunshine and positive energy. He’ll probably encourage you to take life less seriously, while you can help him stay grounded and calm. You two can dream up the most unusual schemes and keep each other entertained with witty conversation and philosophical debate. The best part? He’s got a strong independent streak, which gives you free reign to have your own, much needed alone time.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Trouble in paradise could arise when you feel abandoned. It’s probably in his nature to roam, and your sensitive side might have a problem with that. The bigger challenge, however, will probably be your tendency to stuff feelings instead of talking about them. You may keep things to yourself for some time – perhaps even until it’s too late to resolve them.  In turn, he might have to learn to be more accommodating of your feelings when it comes to his unpredictable side.
cc_sign_match.Romance: You and your Horse are probably adventurous spirits, so dating should be a blast. Maybe you have a shared love of the outdoors? A common passion for foreign films? Whatever it is, you’ll probably move at a fast pace with him around. His changeable, spontaneous nature could be overwhelming, so make him spend a few nights in, too. As long as you delight him with your intellect and feed his short attention span, you can have just as much fun on the couch as you would out and about.
cc_sign_match.Sex: What can you expect with a Horse in bed? Plenty of fun between the sheets! Picture a wild stampede with surprises around every corner. You might not match him in stamina and passion, but you’ll make up for it with your sensuality and passion. He’s probably goal-oriented in bed, just like in life. Let him take the reigns – you might enjoy his domineering demeanor during sex. The best part? After a good romp, you’ll probably want to hang out, talk, or go see a movie. Hot sex and a solid friendship? You couldn’t ask for more.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: So you found another of your kind? Good news! You two Sheep can enjoy the kind of romantic bliss fairy tales are made of. He’s typically a sensitive, intuitive, and loving soul – like you. Since both of you are probably compassionate and understanding, you can tolerate each other’s weaknesses with love. You can look forward to a warm and cozy home, a deep friendship, and a heaping dose of romance. Sounds good to me!
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: As two Yin signs, you and your Sheep man will probably share similar temperaments. Yin qualities are associated with traits like receptivity, passivity, and introversion. In contrast to high-energy, assertive Yang people, you and your man are probably slower-moving and tend to go with the flow. The challenge of a double Yin match could be finding stamina or ambition when you’re both unmotivated. However, your similar personalities should help you understand one another easily.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: There’s no one like another Sheep to understand your quirks. As another progressive thinker and hopeless dreamer, he’ll probably support your unconventional lifestyle and embrace your unique personality. Together you can share a quiet coupledom – possibly as artists, teachers, or writers – that transcends the petty and highlights the very meaning of idealism. You’ll probably support and encourage one another as friends, while sharing a passionate connection as lovers.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Two dreamers can have trouble tending to the practical things. While it’s likely you both love a serene and luxurious home life, when was the last time either of you mopped the kitchen floor? Took out the garbage? Washed the sheets? Also, what will happen when you both need moral support at the same time? You might have to take turns being strong for each other to avoid an emotional meltdown in the relationship.
cc_sign_match.Romance: Since you and your Sheep are part of the Love Triangle, Sheep-Rabbit-Pig, he’ll probably sweep you off your feet! This guy is a true romantic – like you – so dust off your glass slippers and get ready to hop on that white horse. There’s probably no end to his thoughtful sentiments, whether it’s remembering your favorite flowers, making you breakfast in bed, or writing you a love poem that he sends in the mail. Are there two creatures who believe in love as much as you? It’s almost certain you’ll find it in each other.
cc_sign_match.Sex: If you’ve been searching for your sexual soulmate, you just might find it in your Sheep man. This guy has the same romantic, sensual notions about lovemaking as you. Not only that, your innate compatibility as friends should make for a solid connection between the sheets. He’s probably a soft and sensitive lover, which is totally your cup of tea. You both love indulgence and decadence, so make sure you’ve got some massage oil and sexy lingerie lying around when he comes over. If you’re radiating femininity and sensuality, he won’t be able to take his hands off you.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and your Monkey can have fun together, but eventually his devil-may-care attitude will probably cause you too much worry. He’s typically a mental-oriented, logical sign, while you approach life from an intuitive and subjective perspective. With different temperaments and probably conflicting values, you might not forge the most solid relationship. He’s probably more concerned with money and status and may not appreciate your whimsical, artistic nature. It might be fun at first, but this guy may not be able to make you happy in the long run.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: Your Monkey man is a Yang sign, which is probably a sharp contrast to your Yin personality. He may be more of a mover and shaker, while you’re content to stay at home. Since you each bring different energies to the relationship, it may be hard to find consistency or compatibility with him. Yang people tend to be dominant, assertive, and sometimes even reckless, which might cause you anxiety. In turn, he may decide your passive and quiet Yin personality is a bit boring.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: Your initial connection might be at a social group, business meeting, or art gallery – you’re both curious creatures with hungry minds. This man will probably be happy to fly you around the world in his private jet, shower you with presents, and treat you like a princess. Who doesn’t want that? You’ll appreciate his brilliant mind and he’ll be amused by your free-spirited ways. Another plus? With your Monkey man, you can almost be certain you’ll meet interesting and influential people who can probably help further your career or professional life.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Eventually, you’ll probably want to settle down. This guy, however, needs a whole lot of independence and freedom. In fact, he may be the type to commit or marry much later in life. He usually wants desperately what he can’t have, and you’re not really into playing mind games by acting aloof. Another bummer? He may not take your hopes and dreams seriously – his practical nature doesn’t agree with your bleeding heart idealism. To make this match work, you’ll probably have to live separate lives and be able to tolerate each other’s differences.
cc_sign_match.Romance: There’s no one quite like your Monkey man to make a girl feel spoiled. He may be the most generous sign in the Chinese Zodiac when it comes to romancing the object of his affection. Living in the lap of luxury? This should go over well with you! He probably won’t be stingy with his time, resources, or help, so long as you act classy and refined around his posse. He may not be the best person to spill your feelings to – he’s probably not very mushy – gushy – but at least you can count on plenty of romantic surprises.
cc_sign_match.Sex: Most women have fun between the sheets with a Monkey. Why wouldn’t you, after all? He’s playful, amusing, and lighthearted in bed. However, your style is probably more serious than his happy-go-lucky approach. You may not get the emotional or spiritual connection with him, but he’ll typically be generous and eager to please. In fact, he can probably help you lighten up a little, while you might unearth his sensual side. Another thing? He can be wildly inventive, so don’t be surprised if he wants to try something different. Your best bet is probably to let him experiment!

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: Your and your Rooster will probably have to figure out who’s in charge if you’re going to have a successful relationship. While you thrive on individualism and doing things your own way, this man is typically a control freak. Since you probably avoid conflict at all costs, you might become emotionally absent – what with his knack for nagging and all. Method, logic, and structure are his style, which may not suit your free-spirited nature. All in all, you’ll probably have to work out your differences early in order to be a happy couple.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: You’re both Yin signs, but with different temperaments. He’s probably calculating, reserved, and introverted. You might be passive, receptive, and quiet-natured. This relationship may be a bit lacking in that assertive and passionate Yang energy, which keeps things interesting and exciting. If one of you is more energetic and outgoing than the other, you’ll probably have a better balance of energies here.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: Your Rooster man is usually good at protecting those he loves, and you’ll probably feel safe and secure under his watch. His ambition and drive is easy to admire, especially since you may sometimes have trouble keeping your feet on the ground. Tenderness? Affection? You’ll offer him a good amount of both, which can help him access his more emotional side. As a pair that enjoys lively discussion, there might be a good deal of interesting conversation and debate when you two sit down to dinner.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: His cold and calculating tendencies might seem utterly foreign to you. He probably won’t soften the blow or cater to your feelings like a Dog or a Pig guy. Telling it like it is, he may even look for reasons to bicker and criticize. In turn, he may not tolerate your changing moods or sensitive side well. He’d probably prefer a stronger, more callous companion with whom he can banter and push around. If he injures you one too many times, it’s likely you’ll pack up and leave.
cc_sign_match.Romance: The flamboyant Rooster stands out in a crowd. He’s the one who looks dashingly sharp, impresses you with his wit, and teases you relentlessly as a form of flirting. He tends to look for a feminine ideal – someone who looks flawless and acts impeccably. But, he’ll probably be content as long as he can get his way with you! The best way to get this guy’s attention is probably to ignore him. He’ll come beating down your door, demanding a date. The passive, coy approach should come quite naturally to you while working wonders on him!
cc_sign_match.Sex: Your Rooster man loves to be in control. His sexual style is a bit dramatic and intense. He may be one of those guys who’ll withhold your pleasure for the sake of torture. A bit punishing and sadistic, you might not find his sweet and sensitive side right away! It’s there – but very deep down. Your best bet? Agree to play his games and he’ll reward you with the satisfaction and affection you’re looking for.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You two could be a bit of a mismatch, but may be able to work on a happy union. The main differences between you are your energy levels and interests. Your Dog is a get-up-and-go type while you’re content to live within the depths of your imagination. He tends to thrive on physical activity, while you don’t mind being listless or stationary. The good news is that you both appreciate a well-kempt, snuggly home. Where others wouldn’t appreciate your domestic talents, your Dog does. If you two can find common interests enough to stay bonded, this match can work.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: Your man is a Yang sign, which means he’s probably a bit more energetic and outgoing than you. His yang energy will typically make him active, ambitious, and even somewhat restless. In fact, he may be prone to anxiety or worry because of his overactive mind. Your Yin energy might help balance things out, since you bring a calming, peaceful energy to the relationship. While your opposing natures could clash, they may also provide the harmony needed for a balanced match.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: If your personalities seem quite different, you’ll at least know how to handle each other with kindness. Underneath your Dog man’s logical nature is a sensitive soul. Also, you two probably value similar things – beauty, peace, faithfulness, and loyalty. He may become your pillar of strength, while you can calm his nerves with that soothing Sheep nature. As long as your man can be tolerant and supportive when your willies set in, you can probably navigate things with grace and ease.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Do you have different ideas about what constitutes a fun Friday night? I thought so. Your Dog man may need more social interaction than you require. Conflicting interests could cause challenges if you can’t find enough in common. Another thing? His direct and logical manner of dealing with you could feel abrasive at times. And, since you can both be prone to mood swings, things could get ugly if you want your needs met at the same time.
cc_sign_match.Romance: Even if your Dog man isn’t a die-hard romantic, you’ll probably appreciate his sweet-natured sentiments. He’s the guy who offers you the last seat left on the subway, makes you a sandwich to take to work in the morning, and picks up your dry cleaning without being asked. He may not be over-the-top with romantic gestures, but he’ll probably do the things that really matter. Plus, you can almost guarantee this guy will be loyal. His faithfulness is famous. If he seems slow to warm up to you, be patient. He can be a bit mistrusting at first, but if you prove your worth he’ll stay by your side in the long run.
cc_sign_match.Sex: Your Dog man will generally want to be your friend before he hops in the sack with you. He can be terribly suspicious of women, so he’ll want to make sure you won’t hurt him first. As a lover, he can be generous and fastidious. He’ll probably focus on your pleasure first and his own later. He can be sweet and seductive, but don’t give it up right away. The courting period is important to him, so make sure you let him chase you a bit before hunkering down between the sheets.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: The Pig man is part of your Love Triangle group. This means he might be a friend, lover, and soul mate all rolled into one! You two should get along fantastically in a sensual and simple manner. Both are genuinely concerned with the well-being of the other, and each of you is a warm and generous-hearted creature. This man will probably appreciate your quirks and bring a few of his own into the relationship, but it will typically add flavor to this already delicious match. All in all, you can make each other feel safe, secure, and adored.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: Both of you are Yin signs. In some cases, this could make love a snooze, but your Pig will generally have a hearty and lively nature. His Yin energy makes him tolerant, peace-loving, and well-liked because of his happy-go-lucky nature. Your Yin energy brings a sensual, creative spin to the relationship, which can heighten your spiritual and emotional connection. Since you both tend to be passive and receptive, you’ll probably have an easy time communicating and resolving conflict.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: Your Pig man will generally give his best to you, and you to him. Generosity? Passion? Sensitivity? He’s probably got them all, and then some. He understands your delicate nature and wouldn’t do anything to deliberately rattle you. You can appreciate his kindness and silly sense of humor like no other. As two people who thrive in sensually stimulating environments, your home will probably be the mecca for entertaining family and friends with decadent food, lovely furnishings, and positive vibrations.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Are you both dreamers? If so, you could find it difficult to focus on the practical side of life. A messy home, forgotten appointments, or unachieved goals might ensue if you aren’t careful. Your Pig man is usually hard working, so make sure you don’t distract him from his career. In turn, he’ll have to not indulge your every emotional whim. The biggest obstacles here might just be a result of too much indulgence. Careful not to drain your bank account on the finer things in life!
cc_sign_match.Romance: Mr. Pig is a romantic at heart, which should sit well with you! Roses for your anniversary? Fine dining on your birthday? He’ll deliver all that and more. He may be a bit traditional in his approach, but he’s also got a fun-loving, somewhat quirky personality. Don’t be surprised if he takes you to an elegant restaurant one night and a hole-in-the-wall Chinese place the next. Since he tends to get along with everyone, he’ll probably have friends and lovers all over town. But, he’s really looking for a woman with the heart of gold to settle down with. And, you’re probably it!
cc_sign_match.Sex: Sex with a Pig man could be exactly what you’re looking for. He’s sensual, romantic, and generous. Since you two will probably hit it off as friends before anything else, a union between the sheets should be all the more special. The best way to please this guy is through his senses. Feed him, bathe him, and give him silky sheets to roll around in. Throw in some scented candles and soft music, and you’ll bring out the best he has to offer – and you won’t be disappointed!

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: Fun? Energetic? Stimulating? A relationship with your Rat man should be all that and more! You two can make quite the duo, especially in social settings where you’re free to show off. This man probably matches you in wit and ambition, which should make for an adventurous and exciting union. There may be a bit of good-natured competition since you both love the limelight, but it will only add to the fun! As one of the animals in your Love Triangle, Rat-Dragon-Monkey, this might be a match made in heaven.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: As two Yang signs, you probably approach life with vigor, passion, and purpose. With plenty of ambition and drive, Yang energy people are usually the ones going after life in a predatory-like manner. They tend to be outgoing, assertive, and high-energy. Since relationships need a balance of Yin and Yang energies, it will probably work best if one of you has some peace-loving, receptive Yin qualities too. However, since you have similar dispositions, you’ll probably find it easy to understand one another.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: Not everyone can keep up with your Monkey antics, but a Rat man should happily join you. As two powerful, intelligent, and popular creatures, you two might be the envied couple in your circle of friends. Are you ready to travel the world? Start a business? Learn hang-gliding? Better get prepared, since there’s virtually no limit to what can be accomplished in this match. Most likely, you’ll respect each other’s independence while still joining forces as a couple. Wonderful!
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Your Rat man might need to watch his jealous or possessive tendencies, especially if he’s going to keep you around. If you’re a typical Monkey, you probably hate being tied down – and if he tries to control you, you’ll only run further. For you, make sure to give him plenty of strokes and don’t one up him in front of his friends. If the competition heats up, you both might be tempted to come in first place at the expense of your relationship. So don’t let your ambitious natures ruin a good relationship.
cc_sign_match.Romance: Adventure? Play? Constant stimulation? Your Rat man’s romantic approach should be music to your ears. This guy typically wants a bosom buddy in a woman – someone to befriend, have fun together, and eventually settle down with. He’ll probably be delighted you’re up for anything, since he likes variation in love. Your quick mind and intellect should keep him on his toes, and he typically won’t be threatened by a smart woman. When it comes down to it, he generally wants to find his equal. Good news, since you’re probably it!
cc_sign_match.Sex: Since he probably loves the chase, you’ll be the perfect conquest. If you can amuse and admire him, he’ll be running after you forever. This guy is quick to act when he’s feeling randy, which is probably fine by you. The bedroom will probably feel more like a jungle gym when the two of you are between the sheets. Make sure you don’t give in too easily, however. He might be so consumed with passion that he puts his own needs ahead of yours. If you can prolong his torture, he’ll be eager to please you in return for the release.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: As two people who know what they want, you may discover what you don’t want in this relationship. It can be a fair match if you’re well aware of your differences, but you may be too dissimilar for a long-term union. Your capricious and playful nature is in direct opposition to his serious and conservative personality. While your Ox man may want to settle down into a life of security and routine, you probably need independence and freedom.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: You’re a Yang sign while your man is Yin. With different energy orientations you could find it hard to understand each other’s temperaments. He’s probably more passive, introverted, and easy-going. You, on the other hand, usually want to be where the action is. This could create challenges if you can’t learn to compromise or find similar interests. You may not understand his quiet, reserved personality, while he doesn’t get your daring and unconventional approach to life.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: Your Ox man may have the very qualities you could be lacking. His seriousness and industriousness could be a good match for your mental capabilities and professional goals. If you join forces, a lot can be accomplished here. In turn, your carefree attitude could help loosen him up a bit. Since you each share strong opinions regarding just about everything, you both can learn a thing or two from the other – if you’re willing to be open-minded.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Eventually, he’ll probably want to settle down. Your independent nature might make him uneasy, and you’re probably not quick to give up your freedom. If you’re not willing to listen or follow his advice, he may become tyrannical or irritatingly stubborn. Neither of you are likely to back down and bend to the other’s wishes, which should make for some interesting arguments. Since you can’t be told what to do, and he refuses to give up authority, you might not get far unless you’re both willing to compromise.
cc_sign_match.Romance: Your Ox man has a bad reputation for being unromantic. It’s not that he’s incapable, but the frivolities of romance probably seem ridiculous to him. He may not understand why you want flowers when they’ll die in week, or how important it is to hear his voice on the phone when you’ll see him at the end of the day anyway. Don’t go looking for a storybook romance here. This guy typically shows his love with acts of service. Got a broken light bulb? Forgot your umbrella on a rainy day? He’ll head to the hardware store and bring your raincoat on your lunch break. That’s his own way of saying he cares.
cc_sign_match.Sex: Underneath the stoic nature of your Ox guy is a well of passion. It may take a while to tap into, but once you do, brace yourself. He can be generous and sensitive as a lover, once you break down the steel walls of his defense mechanisms. He probably likes to dominate, so let him take the lead. Most often, he’ll want to get down to business and get on with his day. Challenge him to stay for round two. Your playful, sprightly nature might be just the thing to help him take sex less seriously.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and your Tiger man are opposites on the Chinese Zodiac. That means you’ll probably find a quick, mutual attraction! Both of you tend to be fun-loving, light-hearted, and enjoy trying new things. This guy is a doer and a dreamer with a whole lot of heart and passion. In general, you both love attention and praise, so it’s likely you’ll have a big group of admirers. All in all, you’ll probably have fun with this guy – if you can keep up with his antics and busy social life! Be careful about the opposites attract phenomenon, however. A fast attraction could end just as quickly.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: Two Yang energies here, which means you approach life similarly. Instead of waiting around for things to happen, you both want to take charge. Your Tiger man is generally bold, outgoing, confident, and curious – like you. There should be plenty of opportunity for adventure in this relationship, since you both tend to bore easily. You two need a variety of new people, places, and experiences to keep things interesting. Without some calming Yin energy, however, you might burn out quickly.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: To you, alone time for thinking and tinkering is probably necessary to your well-being. This guy will give you plenty of space. Mostly it’s because he’s off doing his own thing and socializing with anyone and everyone. You’ll probably love his outgoing and gregarious nature– always whisking you off to parties and social events – and he’ll admire how feisty and fun you are. You’ll probably provide the spunk and spark he needs to stay motivated, and he’ll work hard at keeping you happy. A strong intellectual connection should make things interesting as well.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: There is a story in Chinese astrology about how the Monkey loves to pull the Tiger’s tail and then run up a tree to giggle. He might tire of your devil-may-care antics when he’s ready to get serious. You may see his bleeding-heart passion as exhausting or even irritating. And, you might not want to share the spotlight with him – he loves attention just as much as you. You both tend to be competitive but neither very good at compromise. Try to work on not being a sore loser, and you’ll have a better chance to make this relationship last.
cc_sign_match.Romance: No need to worry about getting bored with your Tiger man around! He’s a hopeless romantic with plenty of exciting schemes. He may come on strong, but will probably be just as quick to lose interest. Make sure you keep him guessing and hopelessly on his toes. He’s independent, so don’t expect all his time, but do expect a wild ride! You two should have a blast at parties, social gatherings, and spur-of-the-moment trips. If you don’t hear from him for a while, don’t worry. He’s probably just off plotting his next course of action and will reemerge with even more vigor and passion.
cc_sign_match.Sex: It’s doubtful any woman has accused her Tiger man of being boring in bed. All the enthusiasm and heart he has in life should transfer over easily between the sheets. You two playful souls might be quick to hop in the sack, and will probably delight each other with equal amounts of energy and fun. This guy is usually a warm, aggressive, and open-hearted lover, so don’t be surprised if he comes on strong without warning!

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and the Rabbit are opposite in nature, so this relationship might take a fair amount of work. His powers of compassion and your problem solving skills might be needed to help smooth over differences. If you’re a typical Monkey, you probably love fun and games but may not always know when to take things seriously. His consistent and organized ways might conflict with your playful attitude. However, you both tend to be mental creatures, meaning you could share a good cerebral connection.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: You are Yang; he’s Yin. You two probably approach life in different ways. Instead of waiting around for things to happen, you probably take charge. As someone who is bold, outgoing, and curious, you like to be in the center of action. He, on the other hand, tends to take life at a slower pace and may be a bit introverted. Can you strike the balance between your opposing energies? Maybe. But, it could take a fair amount of compassion and understanding.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: For your Rabbit, order and peace are necessary to his well being. To your credit, you’ll probably be happy to buy him an expensive day planner and luxury linens for the bed. He’ll love that you’re a good planner – always remembering details – and you’ll admire how together and classy he is. After all, it makes you look good! In turn, he’ll probably provide the emotional support you need to stay motivated, and you’ll work hard at keeping him satisfied. A strong intellectual connection should make things interesting as well.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Your quirky antics or jokes may not sit well with the serious Rabbit. He may want understanding and empathy over entertainment and fun. Also, he could be a bit too clingy, which might have you heading for the hills! Since you’re usually thirsty for new adventures, it could be tiresome for him to spend so much time alone. He probably won’t understand why you’d rather go to a nightclub with friends than spend the evening in, watching movies. If you can focus on the strengths of your relationship, you’ll have a better shot.
cc_sign_match.Romance: The Rabbit man is good at romance, but he can be a bit fussy over the details. He typically wants everything to perfect, so make sure you’re dressed in designer clothes and well-groomed. This is the guy who will splurge on a five-course dinner just for fun, get you tickets to an A-list gala, and fly you to the most exotic and luxurious vacation destinations. He loves the finer things in life, and what woman doesn’t want to be pampered! Careful with his heart, however. He’ll usually fall in love quickly and hopelessly, so make sure you return the feelings before leading him on.
cc_sign_match.Sex: This guy will want everything to be perfect in the bedroom too. He’s probably not much of an aggressor, so you may have to take the lead. As a romantic, sensitive guy, he’ll probably know just what to do to make you happy. He may take sex a bit more serious than you, so don’t hop into the sack until you’re sure he’s the one. With an intuitive and sensual approach, he might be just the man to unleash your sentimental side.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: Woohoo! You and the Dragon make a fun, rambunctious match.  Another animal in your Love Triangle; you two should have a smashing time. With a whole lot in common – energy, optimism, and courage – it’s easy to see why you get along. Perhaps you’ll be regulars at the hippest party spots? Host your own talk show together? Travel the world? Anything is possible in this match up! Both of you are fun loving and easy going. Since your Dragon man is a risk taker, there should be plenty of surprises. Get ready for one wild time!
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: You and he are both Yang. This should get interesting! Since your energies are similar, you might understand each other well. As a Yang person, you’re bound to be assertive, high-energy, and goal-oriented – like him! As movers and shakers, you two want to be at the center of the action. Since it’s likely you’re both competitive, you might need a bit of calming Yin energy to keep things peaceful. However, your similar Yang energies should make for one exciting relationship.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: Don’t you love a guy with a sense of adventure?! Your Dragon man is always looking for the next mountain to climb or ship to sail. Play time should be a central focus with you two. Whether it’s travel, shared hobbies, or just a similar sense of humor, you probably won’t run out of good times. This guy can keep up with you. Also, you’ll probably admire his powerful persona and genuine charm. He’ll be delighted by your spunky personality and intelligence. As two innovative risk takers, you’ll probably leap into one hot romance!
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: If you live together, don’t be surprised if your home resembles a jungle. You might be too busy having fun to take care of the little things. Dishes in the sink? Unmade bed? Dirty laundry everywhere? I’m not surprised. Since your Dragon probably prefers a nice place to come home to, an unkempt home could get under his skin. You may need to improve your organizational skills so little things don’t fall through the cracks. Also, make sure you live from your heart and not just your brain – your aloof and logical attitude could be biting when he’s looking for emotional support.
cc_sign_match.Romance: Your Dragon man’s romantic style should suit you well -- he’s got more tricks up his sleeve than most. This guy is the King of bold and outrageous gestures, so there won’t be any guessing games when it comes to his feelings for you. Public declarations of his love will probably be routine. In general, everything he does will be with 100% effort, so if you’re wishy-washy he may see it as an insult. He’s good at dreaming up adventurous dates and keeping you entertained, which is not an easy task for some!
cc_sign_match.Sex: To be perfectly blunt, sex could be off the charts with you two!  Animals in their own Love Triangle tend to hit it off in the bedroom. Your Dragon man’s sexual magnetism is a force to be reckoned with, but you’ll probably enjoy the challenge. In bed, he’s likely to be a powerful but sensitive lover. He typically loves the flamboyant and flashy, so pull out a sexy costume or lacy lingerie, and he’ll be helpless to resist you. Once you’ve got him between the sheets, you’ll probably see how this fierce creature is just one big softie underneath the scales.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and the Snake man may have a handful of hurdles to deal with in order to get along. The saving grace might be your love of good times and mutual popularity. Though he probably loves social interaction and the attention of his friends, your Snake might be more reserved and introverted than you. You, on the other hand, are usually always up for fun and games! If he’s typical of his sign, he probably takes life, love, and his pursuits seriously, while you tend to be more carefree. A little mutual understanding and compromise will probably be needed for a solid match here.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: As a Yang sign, you’re generally outgoing, assertive, and full of ambition. Not that he’s a pushover, but Yin energy probably makes your Snake a little more relaxed and quiet. A good Yin/Yang balance is necessary in any relationship, but here it may seem difficult to understand one another. With dissimilar temperaments, you might need to compromise when it comes to making decisions in this relationship.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: This guy will probably enjoy your Monkey pep and spark. After all, you’ve got enthusiasm enough for everyone! In turn, you can appreciate his worldly wisdom and seductive appeal. Together, you could make waves as a team of do gooders, always helping friends and family or attending charity functions. Another bonus? This guy probably won’t mind when you need your alone time. Since he needs to crawl back in his hole from time to time, he’ll be happy to do his own thing until you’re ready to play again.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Your Snake man’s flair for the dramatic might clash with your down-to-earth practicality. But don’t be quick to call him silly -- you could easily offend him with your endless jokes or flippant attitude. Also, communication could get tricky. He generally needs a deep level of trust in a relationship – and might always be suspicious of your activities or male friends. After an initial romance or infatuation, you may find you have little in common with this slippery creature.
cc_sign_match.Romance: The Snake guy is a born seducer. He’s usually the one who turns heads in a crowded room or was voted Most Likely to Break Hearts in high school. He typically doesn’t have to try hard to get his way, but he’ll stalk you for as long as he has to before making the kill. Your independent and aloof nature will probably intrigue him – he’s not used to being ignored! Keep your distance until you’re sure he’s worth the plunge. A relationship with him can be dramatic and intense.
cc_sign_match.Sex: Prepare to be eaten alive in the bedroom! He’s a slow but methodical lover whose passion can be fierce and overwhelming. In contrast to an Ox or Horse, your Snake man sees sex as a physical, emotional, and spiritual union. He wants to connect on a mind-body-spirit level. He needs to get inside you in more ways than one. Don’t hop into the sack with him unless you’re prepared to surrender your soul. Unlike your sexual style, he won’t take the act lightly.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and your Horse man might just be too similar to get along very well. Both social, versatile, and outgoing, you might meet at a museum benefit, cocktail party, or other social gathering. But can you both keep your egos out of the relationship long enough for it to survive? He’s independent and practical – like you, but this could cause a butting of the heads rather than a meeting of the minds. The focus here will probably be a balancing act between two strong-willed, mentally sharp individuals.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: Two Yang personalities might cause friction in this relationship. Even though your energies are similar, you’re probably just different enough to not quite understand each other. Typically, his Yang energy manifests in a free-spirited, idealistic, and adventurous personality. You, however, are more of a rational thinker, planner, and pleasure-seeking individual. Translation? You’re both ambitious and assertive, albeit in different ways and for different reasons.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: With another social, gregarious, and active creature, you’ll probably find yourself stimulated and entertained to no end. The Horse man knows how to have fun, and you’ll gladly hop in for the ride! Neither of you likes to stay in one place for too long, so don’t worry about getting bored with this guy. With his common sense and your innovative thinking skills, you two could easily run a business, travel the world, or become influential political figures together. It’s not likely you’ll run out of things to do or people to impress.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Should one of you happen to lag behind, you might be left in the dust. This guy can be somewhat self-centered, and you’re known for that fierce independence. If you part ways to pursue different things, there may not be enough reasons to join forces again. While you may enjoy each other’s lively company, a lasting bond might be difficult to maintain. If one of you is more domesticated or home-oriented, there’s probably a better chance for success. Cooperation might be key if you’re going to make it work.
cc_sign_match.Romance: Love at first sight is probably bound to happen here! You won’t have to worry about sitting home on a Saturday night with your Horse. Trotting around town, you’ll hit up all the social events with style. He’ll probably take you on plenty of outdoor adventures, so make sure you show off your rugged side. This match should be the envy of other couples – you’re witty, charming, fun, and smart, plus you have a blast together. Have fun!
cc_sign_match.Sex: Nothing revs up his engine like variety. Don’t try the same tricks twice with this guy, and expect him to surprise you. As long as you can keep things interesting, you’ll keep his attention. That should be an easy task for you – Monkeys aren’t usually blamed for being boring. The sex could be sweltering with your creativity and his energy. But, make sure you bring your intimate behavior out of the bedroom. The thrill of doing it in unusual places will keep him from getting bored.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and your Sheep can have fun together, but eventually your devil-may-care attitude will probably cause him too much worry. While you’re typically a mental-oriented, logical sign, he tends to approach life from an intuitive and subjective perspective. With different temperaments and probably conflicting values, you might not forge the most solid relationship. You’re probably more concerned with money and status and may not appreciate his whimsical, artistic lifestyle. It might be fun at first, but this guy may not be able to make you happy in the long run.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: You’re a Yang sign, which is probably a sharp contrast to his Yin personality. You may be more of a mover and shaker, while he’s content to stay at home. Since you each bring different energies to the relationship, it may be hard to find consistency or compatibility with him. Yang people tend to be dominant, assertive, and sometimes even reckless, which might cause him anxiety. In turn, you may decide his passive and quiet Yin personality is a bit boring.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: Your initial connection might be at a social group, business meeting, or art gallery – you’re both curious creatures with hungry minds. This man will probably be happy to adore you with attention, shower you with presents, and treat you like a princess. Who doesn’t want that? You’ll appreciate his brilliant mind and he’ll be amused by your free-spirited ways. Another plus? With your Sheep man, you can almost be certain you’ll meet interesting and creative people who can probably help further your career or professional life.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Eventually, he’ll probably want to settle down. You, however, need a whole lot of independence and freedom. In fact, you may be the type to commit or marry much later in life. Do you usually want desperately what he can’t have? He may not really into playing mind games by acting aloof. Another bummer? You may not take his hopes and dreams seriously – your practical nature doesn’t agree with his bleeding heart idealism. To make this match work, you’ll probably have to live separate lives and be able to tolerate each other’s differences.
cc_sign_match.Romance: You’ll delight in a loving Sheep. He’s romantic in a unique way. He may not adhere to traditions like Valentine’s Day – he tends to follow his own path – but he’ll give you plenty of reasons to smile. He’ll pick you a bouquet of wild flowers or hand-write a love note. If you’re lactose intolerant, he’ll bake you a dairy-free cake for your birthday. This guy is good at interesting, tender surprises. Although, he can be forgetful, so make sure you remind him of your anniversary – and even your dinner plans.
cc_sign_match.Sex: This holistically-minded guy will probably approach sex from a mind-body-spirit stance. He’s not just interested in getting it done quick and dirty. He wants to experience an emotional connection via a physical union. Um, isn’t that every woman’s dream lover?! Toss your shield aside, cause he’ll penetrate your heart in spite of defenses. Another thing? He can be pretty kinky. Don’t be confused if he’s mushy-gushy and raunchy at the same time. That’s just him.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: What do you get when you pair up two Monkeys? Adventure, excitement, and plenty of play dates! As one of your own kind, your Monkey man understands you better than most. He’s probably an independent, free-thinking, creative type – like you. You two will probably have a ball together while approaching life with curiosity and purpose. The best part? Since you both value your independence, neither of you will feel the need to tie the other down. Expect plenty of surprises and adventures here!
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: As two Yang signs, you know how to party! Yang energy infuses this match with a whole lot of ambition, passion, and fun. You might need a bit of Yin energy to calm things down, but you’ll understand one another since you share similar personalities. There might be a bit of friendly competition, but it shouldn’t keep you both from succeeding.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: Not everyone understands your fiercely independent ways, but your Monkey man will. He needs his alone time too, so you might lead separate lives while still having a fulfilling relationship. You’re both innovative thinkers, so maybe you’ll start a business together or become influential leaders in your community. Your house will probably be the hotspot destination for parties and social events, and travel will probably be a constant on your agenda. Sounds fun to me!
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: You two might compete for the spotlight, especially if you work in the same field or have the same interests. It’s possible you’ll have to decide early on who’s in charge. Challenges could crop up when one of you needs emotional support as well. As two logical, practical creatures, your strong suit may not be tenderness. Make sure you have a healthy give and take when it comes to listening to each other’s problems and offering support.
cc_sign_match.Romance: Everything is pretty rosy in the romance department! In case you haven’t heard, your Monkey man is known for his generous nature. He loves giving presents, and you probably love getting them! Bold gestures are generally his style. Did he give you a diamond necklace on your first date? Take you on a private jet? This guy typically likes to show off, especially if he’s trying to impress a woman. Some women could find this pompous, but you probably appreciate bold expressions of love. He may not want to get serious quickly, but at least he’ll keep you entertained and pampered!
cc_sign_match.Sex: Picture two tiger cubs rolling around with each other, claws out. That’s you and your Monkey man. He probably sees sex as more of a game than anything else. Plenty of hair pulling, giggling, and wrestling should be part of your romp sessions. He might let you dominate him too, as long as you don’t get too rough. With your special breed of tenderness, this guy could easily open his heart to you between the sheets. All in all, you two should have plenty of kinky sexual sparks.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and your Rooster guy have such different sensibilities that a smooth relationship would almost be surprising. If you’re typical of your signs, you both insist on being in control, but in different ways. He claims his dominion by nagging others into perfection. You, on the other hand, hold to your position on top by being the loudest, taking the biggest risks and generally making yourself very noticeable. He may find your extreme personality to be just a bit excessive, and you could find him to be less than fun.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: Your Rooster is a Yin sign. While he may be somewhat of a flashy and social being, he’s probably more introverted than you think. As a Yang sign, you two will typically clash due to your dissimilar temperaments. You may find it difficult to understand one another’s motivations or personalities. Since it’s not likely you’ll approach the world the same way, this match will probably take a fair amount of compromise and dedication.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: As two social and outgoing creatures, you might meet at a party or some other public place. You may find a witty and entertaining companion in your Rooster – he’s probably known for his quick wit and conversational skills. If he’s of the less stubborn variety, you may be able to help him loosen up a bit. With your carefree attitude and his conservative nature, you both could stand to learn a thing or two from the other.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Your Rooster sees the world in terms of details, all of which could stand some improvement. He may get tired of your gallivanting and give you advice about how to live your life. You, on the other hand, might become irritated with his nagging. With that independent streak of yours, he probably won’t get too far if he tries to change your ways.  In fact, you may be tempted to ditch him entirely if he infringes on your freedom. Honesty and open communication will be necessary for avoiding upsets.
cc_sign_match.Romance: Your Rooster is a power player in the romance department. This man loves the chase, and you’re probably always running. Your wild and spontaneous nature will motivate him to pin you down! If he does manage to catch you down for a date, he’ll treat it like a conquest. Try to be well-groomed and articulate around him – he’ll probably be quick to point out if your makeup is smudged or you aren’t up to date on current politics. Look good, smell good, and make sure you impress him with your wit.
cc_sign_match.Sex: What can I say about his sexual preferences? A little strange, to say the least. He may be into power plays in the bedroom – wanting to control and dominate the female species. Some might accuse him of being misogynistic, but it may just be his thirst for power in any form. Keep him guessing and you’ll ensure things stay interesting in bed. Another thing? Appeal to his fetishes. It’s likely he’s got more than one unusual sexual obsession.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and your Dog have some fundamental differences in your natures, but your similarly high energy levels and love of activity could make for an easy relationship. Since you’re always ready for a new adventure, he’ll love being your running mate, so to speak. This guy has a more serious heart and soul. Sometimes he may need to run off and be alone to nurse a sudden mood swing, but you’re probably so busy with your own pursuits that it shouldn’t be a problem.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: Two Yang signs know how to have a good time! While you share the same energy orientation, you probably have different ways of expressing it. Your personality is probably fun-loving, active, and ambitious, while your Dog guy is social, hard-working, and athletic. You both tend to be on the go, which means you’ll have plenty of adventures and excitement in this relationship. Your Dog’s more subdued nature might be a good complement to your restless energy. Most likely, your personalities should be a good match.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: As long as your Dog man knows he can trust you, things should be smooth sailing. This should be a fun, upbeat and lighthearted relationship centered on social outings and fun. What makes it work is probably your mutual need for independence. Neither of you should have a problem doing your own thing, and your relationship is probably strengthened by the space. He can provide loyalty and kindness while you bring vigor and excitement to the relationship.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: If you’re a typical Monkey, that gregarious and curious nature could mean you may have an inclination to stray romantically. Your Dog has high moral standards and has trouble trusting people as it is, so he may not stand for anything less than loyalty. Should he find a reason to mistrust you, he may shut down emotionally and the relationship will probably be over. You, on the other hand, may tire of his mood swings and tendency to be pessimistic. A little sensitivity and a solid foundation for trust should be all that’s needed.
cc_sign_match.Romance: You might not get fireworks and magic with a Dog man, but you’ll get plenty of good old fashioned romance. He’s the kind of guy who will open your car door, bring you fresh flowers at work, and be there for you when you really need him. Instead of fast and ferocious, being courted by him will probably feel slow and comfortable. And just when you’re feeling a bit bored, he’ll surprise you with something so tender and sweet you’ll remember why you fell for him in the first place.
cc_sign_match.Sex: This match might have you between the sheets – fast. There’s probably a strong physical connection in addition to your hearty friendship. He may not be the most innovative lover, but he’s probably sentimental, sweet, and tender. You might be glad to know he’ll let you be on top. In fact, he probably prefers it that way! Just be careful with his ego. This guy can bruise easily, so be gentle with his feelings and give him every reason to trust you. When your passion meets his sensitivity, there’s a high likelihood of sexual bliss!

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and the Pig can have a lot of fun together. Both are generally happy, positive types, and you two are sensualists! He loves fine foods, luxurious surroundings, lovemaking, and simple pleasures. You’ll probably complement his sensual side well with your love of party atmospheres and exciting travels. You both tend to live for the pursuit of pleasure, and your Pig man should be a loving, loyal companion with plenty of sparkle and humor to keep you entertained.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: As a Yin sign, your Pig man is probably opposite in nature to your assertive, high-energy, fast-paced personality. However, your different temperaments might actually complement each other. He’s known for being easy-going and well-liked by just about everyone, and his passive, receptive nature could be good for smoothing over communication upsets and keeping the relationship in harmony. He may be more of a homebody than a social butterfly, but your energies can work well together with some understanding and compassion.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: There’s no one like your Pig when it comes to generosity and tenderness. He’s usually happy to give everything to the one he loves, and you’ll appreciate his warm-hearted nature. You’ll probably share a similar sense of humor, delighting in the silly or quirky things in life. Plus, you both love pleasure more than most, which means fun and happiness will be a priority in this relationship. This guy is usually tolerant, a good communicator, and eager to please. Lucky you!
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Your Pig man may be a bit too lethargic or home-loving for your tastes. Badgering him to go out and socialize won’t do any good – he’s content to stay at home with close friends and family. Since you’ll typically run off without him if he’s not interested, he may tire of your different lifestyles. This man usually values connection and emotional sustenance, which you can’t give if you aren’t around. The key with you two is probably compromise. Agree to spend Friday night in if he’s willing to spend Saturday night painting the town.
cc_sign_match.Romance: While he is probably no Don Juan, he’s very in tune with the female species. He’ll court you slowly and carefully, making sure you’re trustworthy and kind. After time, you’ll notice how attentive and intuitive he is. He knows what you need, when you need it, and wants to fall in love with you passionately and wholly. His tenderness and sensitivity might match well with your playfulness and passion. Just make sure you don’t break his heart – he won’t be quick to recover.
cc_sign_match.Sex: Ah… a true romantic. He’ll want to wine and dine you before he takes you off on his white horse to a bed scattered with rose petals. He can be more attached to fantasies than anything else, so don’t be surprised if he gets cranky when he finds out you’re not perfect. But, he’ll forgive it quickly. Give him plenty of sensual massage. Light candles. Burn incense. Anything that will heighten his senses. If you can appeal to his sensual side, you’ll probably be generously rewarded.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and your Rat can be a good pair if you can learn to understand one another's motivations. This clever, quick-witted guy is a schemer whose shrewd mind may not measure up to your honest, straightforward ways. You probably like to stick to traditional, tried-and-true routes in life and may disapprove of your Rat's looser, more creative approach. However, you can probably appreciate his generous gestures and he your steadfastness. This man can be a trustworthy, energetic companion for you.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: Your Rat is a Yang sign, which means he approaches life with energy, passion, and purpose! As a Yin energy person, you’re probably more subdued and reserved than your outgoing mate, but bring an orderly, peaceful energy to the relationship. Since it’s usually good to have a Yin/Yang balance, your opposing energies might actually work to your advantage. The problem could be you probably have trouble understanding each other’s motivations and personalities.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: While he’s probably not as exacting as you, your Rat man has a serious side and knows how to treat loved ones well. He’s typically generous, upbeat, and eager to please. You can admire his ingenuity in business or his career, and he’ll appreciate your orderly mind and ability to manage a household. You two can probably go far as a team, whether as lovers, spouses, or even business partners.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Are you a typical Rooster perfectionist? If so, be careful about falling into the habit of nagging your Rat to shape up and get serious. He tends to do things his own way – a true innovator and entrepreneur – so you’ll probably stifle his desire for you if you nag too much. He’ll have to watch his actions, however, since you typically won’t tolerate unfaithfulness or sticky behavior. As long as you understand one another’s differences, you can probably get past any challenges.
cc_sign_match.Romance: Adventure? Play? Constant stimulation? Your Rat man’s romantic approach is energetic and ambitious. This guy typically wants a bosom buddy in a woman – someone to befriend, have fun with, and eventually settle down with. He’ll probably be delighted by your quick wit and intelligence since he’s got an overactive mind. You’ll keep him on his toes, and he typically won’t be threatened by a smart and opinionated woman. When it comes down to it, he generally wants to find his equal. The good news is you might be it!
cc_sign_match.Sex: He probably loves the chase, so behave like a potential conquest. If you can amuse and admire him, he’ll be running after you forever. This guy is quick to act when he’s feeling randy, which is probably fine by you. The bedroom will feel more like a jungle gym when the two of you are between the sheets. Make sure you don’t give in too easily, however. He might be so consumed with passion that he puts his own needs ahead of yours. If you can prolong his torture, he’ll be eager to please you in return for the release.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and your Ox make a nearly perfect pair. Hooray! He’s another animal in your Zodiac Love Triangle. You’re quite similar in temperaments and values while your differences are usually complementary. Both are rather conservative in approaching life: preferring practical, tried-and-true methods to anything risky. Your perfectionism meshes well with your guy's penchant for doing things right the first time. All in all, you two make a strong and practical team.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: Both of you are Yin signs, which means you’ll have little trouble understanding one another’s approach to life Neither of you are aggressive or extremely active, which is fine – you’ll both be content to create a cozy home together and live a quieter existence. In general, you can probably respect each other’s temperaments and give one another what you need.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: Your sturdy Ox can serve as the backbone for the relationship, while your keen eye and innate resourcefulness can move things forward when it’s stagnant. You both value trustworthiness and honesty, so neither will ever give the other reason for jealousy or possessiveness. When in love, your Ox's normally shy, serious and reserved demeanor gives way to a deep sweetness. Enjoy!
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: One of the challenges between you may result from your mutual tendency to be rather blunt, critical or judgmental.  Both of you tend to have honest, direct natures and want things done your own way. With a mutual stubbornness, you might have to work on the art of compromise. Your Ox typically won’t back down, and you’re used to getting your way, aren’t you?! Luckily, you can probably work past these challenges regardless of your differences.
cc_sign_match.Romance: Your Ox man has a bad reputation for being unromantic. It’s not that he’s incapable, but the frivolities of romance probably seem ridiculous to him. He may not understand why you want flowers when they die in week, or how important it is to hear his voice on the phone when you’ll see him at the end of the day anyway. Don’t go looking for a storybook romance here. This guy typically shows his love with acts of service. Got a broken light bulb? Forgot your umbrella on a rainy day? He’ll head to the hardware store and bring you raincoat on your lunch break. That’s his own way of saying he cares.
cc_sign_match.Sex: Underneath the stoic nature of your Ox guy is a well of passion. It may take a while to tap into, but once you do, brace yourself. He can be generous and sensitive as a lover, once you break down the steel walls of his defense mechanisms. He probably likes to dominate, so let him take the lead. Most often, he’ll want to get down to business and get on with his day. Challenge him to stay for round two. Your kinky, sprightly nature might be just the thing to help him unwind a bit in the sack.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: As a Rooster, you know who you are and what you want. Well, the Tiger man is cut from the same tree. You can both be incredibly opinionated, somewhat aggressive, and very energetic. You’ve got a lot to say and will always see room for improvement in the relationship. He’ll probably love that you make for a worthy opponent and can keep up with him. Since you both tend to be blunt, you can be sure there won’t be any hidden agendas here. The Tiger tells it like it is, and you sure don’t sugar coat things either!
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: You are Yin, he is Yang. What does that mean for your relationship? Let’s just say that you two are different. He’s probably fast, aggressive, and intellectual, while you’re slower, methodical and more intuitive. While he tends to take the bull by the horns, you may be less adventurous. You might be a little more thoughtful and deliberate in your approach to life. He, on the other hand, tends to go with his gut and pounce on things quickly. If you can understand one another’s differences, you’ll probably have a better shot at a happy union.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: He’ll probably be drawn to your sharp wit, impressive intellect, and eye for details. You love that he knows who he is and isn’t afraid to be himself. Since you’re both people who are forthright and honest, you can probably count on clear communication and no mind games. Deep down, you probably admire his free spirit and wish you could be more spontaneous. The good news is you can live vicariously through him. All in all, you’re both noble souls with a strong set of morals and values.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: No one hates being told what to do more than you, right? Well, this guy can’t help himself – he’ll offer unsolicited advice because he thinks he knows best. He likes to be in charge, but you don’t want to follow anyone’s rules! This could annoy him since he sees his gestures to help are typically sincere. In general, you’re used to being respected for your point of view, and he’s used to doing things his own way. What a combo!
