cc_sign_match.Romance: No need to worry about getting bored with your Tiger man around! He’s a hopeless romantic with plenty of exciting schemes. He may come on strong, but will probably be just as quick to lose interest. Make sure you keep him guessing and hopelessly on his toes. He’s independent, so don’t expect all his time, but do expect a wild ride! You two should have a blast at parties, social gatherings, and spur-of-the-moment trips. If you don’t hear from him for a while, don’t worry. He’s probably just off plotting his next course of action and will reemerge with even more vigor and passion.
cc_sign_match.Sex: It’s doubtful any woman has accused her Tiger man of being boring in bed. All the enthusiasm and heart he has in life should transfer over easily between the sheets. You two flamboyant personalities might be quick to hop in the sack and will probably delight each other with equal amounts of energy and passion. This guy is usually a warm, aggressive, and open-hearted lover, so don’t be surprised if he comes on strong without warning!

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and the Rabbit may have to work hard to understand each other. With very opposite natures, your differences could be glaring! Your guy probably tends to approach life subjectively and can struggle with the practical side of things. You, on the other hand view the world in exacting terms and details. While he’s dreaming of a European vacation, you’re the one crunching numbers to find the cheapest plane tickets. Best bet? Give this relationship some time before you jump into anything serious.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: You two are both Yin signs, which means you share similar dispositions but also might clash because of it. Yin people are thought to be more passive, tolerant, easy-going, observant, and mellow. You both probably watch life go by carefully, rather than jumping in the middle of it. Neither of you tend to be aggressive, domineering, or overly active. It’s just not your style. Since there is a lot of Yin energy here, make sure you have a bit of Yang in this match to keep things active and stimulating.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: Your Rabbit man will probably be attracted to your air of nobility and class. After all, you’ve got the look as well as the goods to back it up. This guy will usually fall for a nicely groomed, classy, and put-together woman, and you fit the bill perfectly! Both of you adhere to the idea that a good thing can always be made better. So, your relationship might benefit from your eye for perfection and his knack for order. Together, you two can run a tight ship!
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: As a Rabbit, he probably loves making money. But what’s better than making money? Spending it! You, however, probably won’t tolerate careless shopping sprees. Maybe you’ll think he’s frivolous, but he might think you’re too rigid. Since you probably know how to nag, he may get exhausted trying to please you. Also, his sensitive nature could get bruised by your occasional criticism. You might have to work on showing a softer side in order to keep him happy. He, in turn, doesn’t need to take everything so personally.
cc_sign_match.Romance: With a Rabbit man around, you probably won’t be lacking romance. He’s one of the most feminine signs in the Chinese Zodiac, which means he’s totally in tune with the female species. He understands the importance of flowers on your birthday, romantic plans for Valentines Day, and remembering your anniversary. In general, he’ll be happy to fuss over you, which should feed your Rooster fetish for attention! If he buys you the wrong size sweater or the food is bad on your second date, just keep it to yourself. He could see criticism as a personal insult.
cc_sign_match.Sex: This man’s sexual style might be a bit passive. He’s generally a dreamy, thoughtful, and slow-handed lover, and may not take the reins unless you ask him to. He can sometimes be silently critical of a woman’s physical appearance, so try to be well groomed and fit to please this guy. The good news is that he’s imaginative, creative, and sensitive in the sack. With you two, however, there may not be enough sparks to have mind-blowing sex. One of you may have to be more domineering in order to keep the passion high. Bet you’re up to it.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and the Dragon can makes things work – you’ll just have to appreciate one another’s differences. If your man is a typical Dragon, he’s probably fiery, exciting, and maybe a bit impulsive. You, however, are generally practical and conservative. In a happy match, he can show you a good time while you can keep him grounded. You probably understand his need for power, and he can appreciate your noble nature. There may not be fireworks, but this match can be satisfying with some effort.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: You’re Yin while your partner is Yang, which means you two approach life differently. You probably love the creature comforts of home and domestic life, while he’s got an unquenchable thirst for conquering the world. You tend to be more passive, receptive, and intuitive. He’s active, bold, forthright, and thrives on a challenge. A relationship needs both Yin and Yang energies for balance, so it’s possible you’ll complement each other with your differences.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: If you want a dominant, loyal, and loving partner, this guy is your man. You can probably provide the kind of organized, functioning home he needs to succeed, while you benefit from his strong and protective influence. Also, your relatively callous exterior won’t fool him. He can appreciate your spunk and your softness at the same time – a tough feat for many guys! While you’re typically not a party animal, you can enjoy a night out on the town with him. Afterwards, he’ll be happy to come home to the comfortable nest you created with your keen eye and classy touch.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Despite your tendency for strong opinions, you probably don’t want to draw attention to yourself. With his love of the flamboyant and outrageous, this could create friction. And, since you might have a tendency to be nit-picky about social norms, his unkempt tresses or outrageous temper might not fly. Since he’s probably not fond of controlling types, he could get irritated – and fast. If you want to make it work, you’ll probably have to compromise. Let him be right to avoid a confrontation. In turn, he’ll need to buckle down a bit for you.
cc_sign_match.Romance: The mythical Dragon man invented romance! He doesn’t do anything without 100% effort. However, his overt and sometimes embarrassing displays of affection might ruffle your Rooster feathers. But, you’ll probably love his good taste and eye for style. Get ready to travel to foreign lands and dabble in unusual pursuits with this guy. He can generally persuade you to do just about anything! Try to be open-minded in this relationship. That control freak in you won’t stand a chance dating a Dragon.
cc_sign_match.Sex: Never a dull moment with him! You and he have very different sexual styles that actually might fit together well. He can be a generous and emotional lover, but also has strong physical yearnings that could make him wild and aggressive. Since you may be more passive in bed, your quieter style could suit him. Another thing? He loves to dominate! Since he’s generally a goal-oriented guy, he’ll probably take seriously the task of pleasing you. That boundless energy gives him plenty of endurance between the sheets.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: Your slippery Snake is a great match for you! As another animal in your Zodiac Love Triangle, you’re kindred creatures with plenty in common. You two tend to have the same interests and values, which makes compatibility a breeze. Since you both have a social side, you can probably expect to be at the center of action with him. As a couple, you can be sharp, witty, and lively. Who wouldn’t want to be in your relationship?! Together, you can probably create a smooth-running, prosperous match.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: Your Snake is Yin – like you. Yin people are typically more subdued, relaxed, and passive than Yang personalities. Since you share the same energy orientation, things might be smooth in the land of love. Neither of you tends to act brashly or impulsively, and you both value a peaceful, harmonious home. So long as you engage in an active social life, your similar personalities should match up well.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: Oh, goody! You and the Rabbit are like two peas in a pod. This man gets a lot of pleasure from spoiling his loved ones, and you’re no exception. Since you probably need an emotionally strong companion, you’ll delight in his protection and guidance. You’ll probably make each other feel very well-loved and cared for. Since you’re both forgiving, honorable, and sensual, there could be a bond forged here that lasts a long time. He’ll work hard at making you happy, and you’ll give plenty of love in return.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: You two are both Yin signs, which means you probably share similar dispositions and approach life with the same morals and values. Yin people are thought to be more passive, tolerant, easy-going, observant, and mellow. He’s probably watching life go by carefully, rather than jumping in the middle of it – like you. Neither of you tend to get aggressive or dominant. You both want peace and harmony in your relationships.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: Where to start?! Your Rabbit man seems to complement you in all the right ways. He gives you the love and protection you crave. He helps you stay grounded and focused. He understands your flaws and loves you anyway. What more could you ask for? In return, you probably calm his nerves and shower him with affection. As two luxury-loving sensualists, you two will probably buy a little Italian villa in the Sicilian countryside and live happily ever after.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: A challenge in this relationship – one of few – could be money. With his love of the finer things and your habit for indulgence, you might run out of cash before you know it. Keep a lid on your savings and make sure to track a good budget. He might find some of your grandiose ideas a bit zany, while you may think he’s too uptight. However, disagreements should be easy to work out since you’re both compassionate and understanding creatures.
cc_sign_match.Romance: As a Pig, you probably appreciate the art of seduction more than most. The dinners, the presents, the surprises – nothing makes you happier. Lucky you, since your Rabbit man understands this completely. He can be picky about the women he dates – he does have high standards. But, as long as you’re classy, well-groomed, and intelligent, you should tickle his fancy. He’ll mull over where to take you for dinner for days on end. He’ll fuss over what suit to wear and what type of flowers to bring. He wants to makes things perfect, and you’ll appreciate the consideration.
cc_sign_match.Sex: You and your Rabbit will probably share a sensual, heartfelt connection between the sheets. Since you’re both romantics, lovemaking will be more about the merging of souls than purely a physical act. He may bring his perfectionist tendencies to the bedroom, so make sure you’re clean, you smell good, and look delicious. He may not be the most inventive lover, but he’ll typically be sweet, well-mannered, and generous. And that’s probably enough for you.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You might feel like you’ve discovered a rare species with a Dragon man! He may seem like everything you could possibly want – strong, protective, generous, and loyal. You’ll probably be fine letting him lead, and he adores being respected and worshipped. You tend to have just enough in common but also several differences – a good balance for any couple. He will probably provide you with enough stimulation and  adventure, but also that tender love you’re looking for. The best of both worlds!
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: With other signs, a Yang/Yin match up can be disastrous. But, you and your Dragon probably complement each other where you’re different.  As a Yin sign, you’re typically more sensitive, intuitive, and passive. Yang energy can make him the opposite – bold, fiery, and active. If the relationship is working, you’ll balance each other out. Even though you approach life differently, there’s mutual respect here.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: There should be plenty of extravagances in this relationship! Good food, luxurious vacations, fine furniture – you both love opulence. This guy will like that you won’t try to over-power him or compete. You’ll generally share in his successes, praise him, and turn a blind eye to his faults. He’ll provide plenty of excitement and passion to the relationship, keeping you entertained with his charming sense of humor and unique personality.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: You can be a bit decadent, so he may have to nag you to get out of bed or turn off the TV. Since he can get lost in his wild fantasies and ambitions, he might need some grounding from your sensible nature. He can injure you with his occasional brash manners, but you’ll generally forgive easily. If he doesn’t want to deal with a cranky Pig, he’ll have to make sure he’s sweet and generous. As long as you feel adored and he feels respected, things should be fine.
cc_sign_match.Romance: The mythical Dragon practically invented romance! He doesn’t do anything without 100% effort. However, his overt and sometimes embarrassing displays of affection might seem superficial to you. But, you’ll probably love his good taste and eye for style. Get ready to travel to foreign lands and dabble in unusual pursuits with this man. He can generally persuade you to do just about anything!
cc_sign_match.Sex: Never a dull moment! You both have very different sexual styles that might fit together well. He can be a generous and emotional lover, but also has a deep fire that translates into physical passion. Your quieter style will suit him well, since he loves to dominate!  Generally a goal-oriented guy, he’ll probably take seriously the task of pleasing you. He has boundless energy, which means endurance between the sheets. With his magnetism and your sensuality, you two could ignite serious sparks.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and your Snake have enough in common that your coupledom would seem destined for success. It can be a fair match, as long as you truly understand each other. As opposite signs in the Chinese Zodiac, you’re probably drawn to one another like moths to the flame, but you could get burned! Your man is powerfully charming, intelligent, and has a wicked sense of humor. The two of you can probably spend long periods of time together – laughing, bantering, and entertaining guests.  With some work, things might be satisfying for you both. The question is how long will it last?
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: Since you share a Yin energy orientation, you and your Snake should be on the same wavelength. While neither of you have weak personalities, you probably approach life in an easy-going, receptive way. Generally, you both see things subjectively and navigate challenges without fighting or getting aggressive. This shared approach could bode well for your relationship, as long as your similarities don’t cause a butting of heads.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: Sensual delights will probably drive this relationships. Laughter, food, music, sex, travel – you’ll typically have a ball. He’ll probably adore your quirky sense of humor, innate compassion, and bright mind. You, in turn, can feel more grounded and stable in his powerful presence. He won’t have to worry about trusting you – an issue many Snakes have -- since you tend to be faithful no matter what. In general, you two have a lot in common that lends to fun, connection, and prosperity in love.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Communication might get tricky when you want to talk freely about your feelings. It’s not that he’s incapable, but your Snake might struggle with your “let’s hash it out and move on” approach. He probably needs more time and space to process things, so make sure to give him the chance when he wants to fly solo for a bit. He better not take advantage of your trusting nature, either. In all your earnest goodness, you can be biting and cruel if you’re hurt in love.
cc_sign_match.Romance: You don’t have to worry about lack of romance with this man! He invented the meaning of charm, which should delight you silly. He’ll try to woo you with candlelit dinners, deep discussions, and soul-penetrating eye contact. This man typically wants to connect, and you could be a perfect fit. Remember not to rush him along – he does things in his own time, especially romance. Since he can be secretive, he’ll probably surprise you by revealing himself slowly over time. Let him go at his own pace.
cc_sign_match.Sex: There’s something about this man that makes your toes curl. It’s likely there will be a strong attraction between you two since you’re opposites on the Zodiac. But does it translate into sexual sparks? Oh yes! Your bedroom style is possibly a bit different than your Snake man’s, but your connection will probably be out of this world. He’s slow and sensuous. You’re romantic and tender. Ahh…sexual bliss. You generally won’t have to work too hard to be satisfied in the sack with this guy. He knows exactly what he’s doing and how to do it.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: Two pleasure-seekers can always have a good time! The Horse man is social, happy-go-lucky, and friendly – like you. You two might be the hottest couple in town, what with his gregarious nature and your sweet charm. Since you both understand the meaning of compromise, you’ll probably be able to smooth over differences easily. It won’t all be rosy, however, since your lifestyles might be quite different. You’re probably a homebody while he’s a roamer. If you can meet in the middle, things might work out well.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: As a Yin sign, you’re probably easygoing, peaceful, and calm. Yang energy typically makes him the get up and go type, which might bring conflict over what constitutes a fun Saturday night. If you can admire each other’s strengths and give credit where it’s deserved, you’ll be much better off. Any relationship needs both Yin and Yang energy to stay harmonious. Try to strike the balance.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: You can probably keep up with your Horse man in your own way. He’s a social person and typically well-liked by everyone. Is your calendar always full? It probably will be with him. You two love a good time and always know how to find one. Also, neither of you tend to have unrealistic ideas about relationships, which might make things easier. Some good laughs, witty conversation, and sensual indulgences will probably be plentiful with your Horse man.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: While your different natures might be complementary, they can also cause conflict. You’re probably not as free-spirited or spontaneous as him, so settling down together might be a long-standing battle. Also, both of you might throw caution to the wind just a bit too much. Parties, social functions, and vacations might keep you entertained, but who’s going to pay the bills and do the laundry? Staying practical and flexible will probably be necessary in the long run.
cc_sign_match.Romance: With his impulsive nature and your romantic tendencies, love at first sight is probably bound to happen. You won’t have to worry about sitting home on a Saturday night with your Horse guy. Trotting around town, you’ll hit up all the social events with style. He’ll probably take you on plenty of outdoor adventures, so make sure you show off your rugged side. This match should be the envy of other couples – you’re witty, charming, fun, and smart, plus you have a blast together. Have fun!
cc_sign_match.Sex: Nothing revs up his engine like variety. Don’t try the same tricks twice with this guy, and do expect him to surprise you. As long as you can keep things interesting, you’ll hold his attention. That should be an easy task for you – Pigs are usually a little kinky. The sex could be pretty sweltering with your sensuality and his energy. But, make sure you bring your intimate behavior out of the bedroom too. The thrill of doing it in unusual places will keep him from getting bored.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: The Sheep man is part of your Love Triangle group. This means he’s probably a friend, lover, and soul mate  all rolled into one! You two should get along fantastically in a sensual and simple manner. Both are genuinely concerned with the well-being of the other, and each of you is a warm and generous-hearted creature. This man will probably appreciate your quirks and bring a few of his own into the relationship, but it will add flavor to this already delicious match. All in all, you can make each other feel safe, secure, and adored.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: Both of you are Yin signs. In some cases, this could make love a snooze, but your Sheep will generally have an interesting and lively personality. His Yin energy makes him tolerant, peace-loving, and well-liked because of his happy-go-lucky nature. Your Yin energy brings a sensual, creative spin to the relationship, which can heighten your spiritual and emotional connection. Since you both tend to be passive and receptive, you’ll probably have an easy time communicating and resolving conflict.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: Your Sheep man will generally give his best to you, and you to him. Generosity? Passion? Sensitivity? He’s probably got them all, and then some. He understands your delicate nature and wouldn’t do anything to deliberately rattle you. You can appreciate his kindness and silly sense of humor like no other. As two people who thrive in sensually stimulating environments, your home will probably be the mecca for entertaining family and friends with decadent food, lovely furnishings, and positive vibrations.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Are you both dreamers? If so, you could find it difficult to focus on the practical side of life. A messy home, forgotten appointments, or unachieved goals might pile up if you aren’t careful. Your Sheep man can be a tad scatterbrained, so make sure you stay on top of the important stuff. In turn, he’ll have to be supportive of your emotional ups and downs. The biggest obstacles might be the result of too much indulgence. Careful not to drain your bank account on the finer things in life!
cc_sign_match.Romance: You’ll delight in a loving Sheep, who’s romantic in his own unique way. He may not adhere to traditions – he tends to follow his own path – but he’ll give you plenty of reasons to smile. He’ll pick you a bouquet of wild flowers or hand-write a love note. If you’re lactose intolerant, he’ll bake you a dairy-free cake for your birthday. This guy is good at interesting, tender surprises. Although, he can be forgetful, so make sure you remind him of your anniversary – and even your dinner plans.
cc_sign_match.Sex: This holistically-minded guy will probably approach sex from a mind-body-spirit stance. He’s not just interested in getting it done quick and dirty. He wants to experience an emotional connection via a physical union. As a sensitive Pig, you’ll probably think he’s your sexual soul mate. He can penetrate your heart in spite of defenses, so make sure he’s trustworthy before you hop in the sack and get attached. Another thing? He can be pretty kinky. Don’t be confused if he’s mushy-gushy and raunchy at the same time. That’s just him.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and the Monkey can have a lot of fun together. Both are generally happy , positive types – not to mention sensualists! While you love fine foods, luxurious surroundings, and simple pleasures, he’s drawn to party atmospheres and exciting travels. What a combo! You both tend to live for the pursuit of pleasure, and your Monkey man should be a loving, delightful companion with plenty of sparkle and humor to keep you entertained.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: As a Yin sign, you’re probably opposite in nature to your assertive, high-energy, fast-paced Monkey. However, your different temperaments might actually complement each other. While you’re known for being easy-going and peace-keeping, he’s probably a bit more strong-willed and spunky. You may have different habits and ways of approaching conflict, but your energies can work well together with some understanding and compassion.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: There’s no one like your Monkey when it comes to generosity and fun! He’s usually happy to give everything to the one he loves, and you’ll appreciate his warm-hearted nature. You’ll probably share a similar sense of humor, delighting in the silly or quirky things in life. Plus, you both love pleasure more than most, which means luxury and happiness will be a priority in this relationship. This guy is usually smart, a good communicator, and eager to please. Lucky you!
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: You may be a bit too lethargic or home-loving for a Monkey’s taste. While you’re probably content to stay at home with close friends and family, he loves the high-energy of social situations and parties. Since he’ll typically leave without you if you’re not interested in going out , you may tire of his different lifestyle. As someone who usually values connection and emotional sustenance, you’ll get drained if he’s not around to give it. The key with you two is probably compromise. Agree to spend Friday out if he’s willing to spend Saturday night in.
cc_sign_match.Romance: There’s no one quite like your Monkey man to make a girl feel spoiled. He may be the most generous sign in the Chinese Zodiac when it comes to romancing the object of his affection. Living in the lap of luxury? This should go over well with you! He probably won’t be stingy with his time, resources, or help, so long as you act classy and refined around his posse. He may not be the best person to spill your feelings to – he’s probably not very mushy – gushy – but at least you can count on plenty of romantic surprises.
cc_sign_match.Sex: Most women have fun between the sheets with a Monkey. Why wouldn’t you, after all? He’s playful, amusing, and lighthearted in bed. However, your style is probably more serious than his happy-go-lucky approach. You may not get the emotional or spiritual connection with him, but he’ll typically be generous and eager to please. In fact, he can probably help you lighten up a little, while you might unearth his sensual side. Another thing? He can be wildly inventive, so don’t be surprised if he wants to try something different. Your best bet is probably to let him experiment!

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and your Rooster guy may need some mutual understanding to get along smoothly since your differences aren't entirely complementary. With your peace-loving nature, you might find him to be a bit cantankerous. And, as someone who is usually practical and conservative, he may not understand your free-spirited, indulgent ways. Despite all this, however, you can probably forge a strong bond if you respect each other’s different natures. You  can act as the strong leader, while your Pig man will probably be happy to follow.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: You’re both Yin signs, but maybe in different ways. You are probably somewhat of a people pleaser who can easily go with the flow. His Yin energy typically makes him more passive and introverted. While you may have similar temperaments, you might fare better if one of you is a more assertive, active type. Watch out for passive-aggressive behavior and make sure you’re being forthright with each other when dealing with conflict.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: You tend to be a dedicated, generous partner, which can bode well with his loyal, serious nature. If you two are in a relationship, your affable and giving personality will probably be the reason for your compatibility. This guy loves praise and power, which you’ll easily give him. Another good thing is your mutual ability for hard work. Together, you two can build something great if you can each appreciate one another’s differences.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Your Rooster may mistake your sensual nature for laziness. Since it’s not likely he tolerates idleness or frivolity very well, he might get irritated with your love of pleasure. On the surface, you’ll probably be understanding and receptive to his complaints or nagging, but enough criticism will eventually make you snap. If he blames or badger you one too many times, look out. Both of you can be vindictive when you feel threatened or injured.
cc_sign_match.Romance: The flamboyant Rooster stands out in a crowd. He’s the one who looks dashingly sharp, impresses you with his wit, and teases you relentlessly as a form of flirting. He tends to look for a feminine ideal – someone who looks flawless and acts impeccably. But, he’ll probably be content as long as he can get his way with you! The best way to get this guy’s attention is probably to ignore him. He’ll come beating down your door, demanding a date. The passive, coy approach should come quite naturally to you while working wonders on him!
cc_sign_match.Sex: Your Rooster man loves to be in control. His sexual style is a bit dramatic and intense. He may be one of those guys who’ll withhold your pleasure for the sake of torture. A bit punishing and sadistic, you might not find his sweet and sensitive side right away! It’s there – but very deep down. Your best bet? Agree to play his games and he’ll reward you with the satisfaction and affection you’re looking for.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: Though you may have dissimilar personalities, you’ll probably find it easy to get along with your Dog man. Then again, you get along with everyone! You two both tend to be agreeable, loyal, and willing to compromise when necessary. He might have a more passive  personality than you, but will keep you entertained with his active mind. You can offer the faithfulness and nurturing he seeks in a mate. As long as you both remain tolerant, committed, and sensitive to one another, this match could be fulfilling for both.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: He is Yang and you are Yin. Sometimes a relationship with opposite energies is tumultuous, but this match could be harmonious. Your receptive and agreeable nature can complement his opinionated, logical one. With enough fast and aggressive Yang energy, things should stay exciting in love. Additionally, a good dose of your calm Yin energy can smooth over the wrinkles. Even though you have different ways of approaching life, you can probably appreciate one another’s strengths and weaknesses.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: You two are some of the calmer animals in the Zodiac. You both prefer a quiet, tranquil home environment over rowdy social events. Your house will probably be everyone’s favorite destination for dinner parties, summer barbeques, and holiday gatherings. You can do wonders to lift his spirits when he’s down, and he’ll provide the kind of rational thinking you need when life seems overwhelming. All in all, your differences are probably complementary, and your similarities should make your match warm and supportive.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: What makes your relationship work might make it difficult as well. Your Dog guy may be serious more than you like, and he might think you like to play too much. Another area of friction might be your different temperaments—he tends to be logical and reserved, while you are subjective and gush forth your emotions. You can both be outspoken if you’re provoked, so be careful about hurling insults or wounding each other with words during the occasional misunderstanding.
cc_sign_match.Romance: You might not get fireworks and magic with a Dog man, but he’ll pay close attention to your needs. He’s the kind of guy who will open your car door, bring you fresh flowers at work, and be there for you when no one else is. Instead of fast and passionate, being courted by him will probably feel slow and comfortable. And just when you’re feeling a bit bored, he’ll surprise you with something so tender and sweet you’ll remember why you fell for him in the first place.
cc_sign_match.Sex: With a solid friendship, sex with your Dog man might be quite fulfilling. He may not be the most innovative lover, but he’s probably plenty willing to satisfy you in bed. He’s got a hearty appetite for sex, and you’ll probably take turns being in charge. Just be careful with his ego. This guy can bruise easily, so be gentle with his feelings and give him every reason to trust you. His traditional side may clash with your kinky one, but it could also result in some interesting bedroom play if you’re both willing to compromise.

cc_sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: Two Pigs in a pod? Things could get tricky! The main challenge in this match will probably revolve around your similar natures. As two emotional, pleasure-seeking, and sensitive souls, you may have trouble finding direction and organization together. Most likely, one of you will have to be more serious and logical than the other to make it work. Though you might be attracted to one another because of shared interests or values, a long-lasting connection could be hard to maintain.
cc_sign_match.YinYangDescription: You’re both Yin signs, which means you’ll have similar habits and traits. This might bring you closer but it could also be your demise. Since you both are more passive, non-confrontational, and subjective than Yang people, you may have trouble making decisions or dealing with conflict. Things could get swept under the rug because neither of you want to deal with them. You’ll probably do better if one of you has a stronger, more forceful personality.
cc_sign_match.TheGood: No one can enjoy creature comforts more than another Pig! You two will probably live a life of sensual pleasure, while still working hard toward your own dreams and goals. As compassionate, loving souls, your bond might resemble a fairy tale romance – you each idealize love and will generally give everything to a partner. You’ll probably be a popular pair, always entertaining friends and coming to the rescue of everyone in your circle.
cc_sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Forgive the pun, but is your home a pig sty? You two might need to hire a housekeeper. While you’re at it, get a professional organizer, nanny, and live-in cook. That is, unless one of you happens to have organizational skills. Structure and routine may be lost in the lives of you and your Pig. Also, your mutual need for emotional support could cause tension when you’re both cranky. You’ll probably have to work hard at staying grounded, focused, and logical in order to maintain the relationship.
cc_sign_match.Romance: While he is probably no Don Juan, he’s very in tune with the female species. He’ll court you slowly and carefully, making sure you’re trustworthy and kind. After time, you’ll notice how attentive and intuitive he is. He knows what you need, when you need it, and wants to fall in love with you passionately and wholly. His tenderness and sensitivity might are matched by yours. Just make sure you aren’t rushing into things. As two romantics, you can both get swept away easily.
cc_sign_match.Sex: Your Pig guy is a curious blend of sweet and salty. He’s sensitive, but quirky – especially in the bedroom. He’ll want to wine and dine you before he takes you off on his white horse to a bed scattered with rose petals. He can be more attached to fantasies than anything else, so don’t be surprised if he gets cranky when he finds out you’re not perfect. But, he’ll forgive it quickly. If you can appeal to his sensual side, you’ll have him hooked.

cc_soul_mate.SoulMateDescription: Potential soul mates! Shared values. Sentimental and vulnerable when it comes to dealing with each other. You'll probably have a strong bond that gives you both what you need. Don't expect everything to go smoothly between you. Some lessons are hard learned.  You'll know your partner is your soul mate if it seems you're always learning something from each other. And, these experiences should bring you closer together.
cc_soul_mate.NotSoulMateDescription: You're probably not soul mates.  Not to worry. It's actually normal to have a soul mate that's a best friend, family member, or someone other than your partner. An Ox person may be playing a significant role in your life right now! And, might be one in your future. Pay attention to any that cross your path -- and the lessons they may be there to teach you.

cc_soul_mate.SoulMateDescription: Good news! You are candidates for a soul mate match. Both sensitive, hard-working, and devoted to your loved ones. You’ll provide the stability and support for your Rat partner’s ideas and ambitions. In return, you’ll have someone who understands you. You'll know your partner is your soul mate if it seems you're always learning something from each other. And these experiences should bring you closer together.
cc_soul_mate.NotSoulMateDescription: Well, you’re probably not soul mates. Don’t fret; that’s normal. The person you spend your lifetime with may not be your soul mate. Look around you and see what role Rat sign people are playing in your life. That’s where you’re most likely to find what you seek. If a Rat hasn’t made an appearance in your life yet, you might meet one sometime soon! This person could teach you important lessons.

cc_soul_mate.SoulMateDescription: Could be your soul mate. You're connected by a warm, generous, and open-hearted energy.  Life-giving and sustaining for both. Expect mutual growth as you work through things in your very different styles.  You'll know your partner is your soul mate if it seems you're always learning something from each other. And these experiences should bring you closer together.
cc_soul_mate.NotSoulMateDescription: Well, you may not be soul mates, but that doesn't mean you're not meant to be together and learn from one another. A Pig person may eventually appear in your life to teach you something important. Pay attention to what this person offers you in terms of your own growth as an individual. One more thing. Your soul mate could turn out to be a friend, someone at work, or even your child. So be alert.

cc_soul_mate.SoulMateDescription: Candidates for a soul mate match! It's possible you've traveled through space and time to be with each other -- over and over again. Share a deep spiritual and emotional connection? It'll feed and nourish you both. Mutual growth may be the main reason for your connection.  You'll know your partner is your soul mate if it seems you're always learning from each other. These experiences should bring you closer together.
cc_soul_mate.NotSoulMateDescription: You may not be soul mates, but that doesn't have to be a bad thing. It's actually normal to not share a soul mate connection with your partner. Are there Dog people in your life that play an important role? Look around and see what kind of influence they have on your life. Don't know one yet? Trust me; one will be coming into your life any time. Remember, could be a friend or even your child. It' all about mutual growth.

cc_soul_mate.SoulMateDescription: Good candidates for a soul mate match! Together you give one another just what each needs to thrive. Although you probably lead independent lives, you rely on each other in a unique and sensitive way. You'll both become better people as you grow together.  You'll know your partner is your soul mate if it seems you're always learning something from each other. And these experiences should bring you closer.
cc_soul_mate.NotSoulMateDescription: You're probably not soul mates, but don't worry. Your soul mate connection may instead be with someone who's a family member or friend. Rooster may already be playing an important role in your life. Take a good look around. See what they might be here to teach you. Don't see any. Well don't be surprised if one comes into your life soon.

cc_soul_mate.SoulMateDescription: You are quite possibly soul mates! There's probably a strong, consuming attraction here characterized by a feeling you can't live without the other. Even if you stray from each other, you'll probably end up back together in the end. You probably have important goals you need to accomplish together.  You'll know your partner is your soul mate if it seems you're always learning something from each other.
cc_soul_mate.NotSoulMateDescription: Well, you’re probably not soul mates. Don’t fret; that's normal. The person you spend your lifetime with may not be your soul mate. Look around you and see what role Monkey sign people are playing in your life. That’s where you’re most likely to find what you seek. If a Monkey hasn’t made an appearance in your life yet, you might meet one sometime soon! This person could teach you an important lesson -- perhaps one you've been needing to learn for a while.

cc_soul_mate.SoulMateDescription: You are potential soul mates. This match is the essence of opposites attract. You each give what the other lacks. Your energies probably blend together perfectly, creating a give and take that fosters love and understanding. You tend to believe in and support each other completely.  You'll know your partner is your soul mate if it seems you're always learning something from each other.
cc_soul_mate.NotSoulMateDescription: You're probably not soul mates, but don't worry. Your soul mate connection may be with someone who's a family member or friend instead. You should know Sheep sign people are or will be playing an important role in your life. Take notice of them and what they might be here to teach you.

cc_soul_mate.SoulMateDescription: You are potential soul mates. This match is the essence of opposites attract. You probably each give what the other lacks. Your energies could blend together perfectly, creating a give and take that fosters love and understanding. You two tend to believe in one another and support each other completely.  You'll know your partner is your soul mate if it seems you're always learning something from each other.
cc_soul_mate.NotSoulMateDescription: You're probably not soul mates, but don't worry. Your soul mate connection may be with someone who's a family member or friend instead. Also, Horse sign people may be playing an important role in your life. Take notice of them and what they might be here to teach you.

cc_soul_mate.SoulMateDescription: You  are quite possibly soul mates! There's probably a strong, consuming attraction here characterized by a feeling you can't live without each other. Even if you drift apart, you'll always be in each other's thoughts and may even end up back together in the end. You two probably have important goals you need to accomplish together.  You'll know your partner is your soul mate if it seems you're always learning something from each other.
cc_soul_mate.NotSoulMateDescription: Well, you’re probably not soul mates. Don’t fret; that’s normal. The person you spend your lifetime with may not be your soul mate. Look around you and see what role Snake sign people are playing in your life. That’s where you’re most likely to find what you seek. If a Snake hasn’t made an appearance in your life yet, you might meet one sometime soon! This person could teach you an important lesson -- perhaps one you've been needing to learn for a while.

cc_soul_mate.SoulMateDescription: You are candidates for a soul mate match! Together, you give one another precisely what each needs to thrive. Although you may lead independent lives, you rely on each other in a unique and sensitive way. You each can help the other to evolve as an individual in the parameters of you relationship.  You'll know your partner is your soul mate if it seems you're always learning something from each other.
cc_soul_mate.NotSoulMateDescription: You're probably not soul mates, but don't worry. Your soul mate connection may be with someone who's a family member or friend instead. Also, you should know Dragon sign people may be playing an important role in your life right now. Take notice of them and what they might be here to teach you. No? Don't be surprised if one shows up soon.

cc_soul_mate.SoulMateDescription: You are candidates for a soul mate match! It's possible you've traveled through space and time to be with each other -- over and over again. You probably share a deep spiritual and emotional connection that feeds and nourishes you both. Helping each other grow will probably be the main reason for your connection.  You'll know your partner is your soul mate if it seems you're always learning something from each other.
cc_soul_mate.NotSoulMateDescription: You may not be soul mates, but that doesn't have to be a bad thing. It's actually normal to not share a soul mate connection with your partner. Are there Rabbit sign people in your life that play important roles? Look around and see what kind of influence they have on your life, if any. Don't know one yet? You'll probably meet one soon, so be alert.

cc_soul_mate.SoulMateDescription: Your partner has a good chance of being your soul mate. You two are connected by a warm, generous, and open-hearted energy that's life-giving and sustaining for you both. You tend to reflect each other's weaknesses and nurture each other's strengths, allowing for growth as individuals. You can probably live, work, and play together in harmony.  You'll know your partner is your soul mate if it seems you're always learning something from each other.
cc_soul_mate.NotSoulMateDescription: Well, you may not be soul mates, but that doesn't mean you're not meant to be together and learn from one another. It's likely a Tiger person will appear in your life to teach you something important. This could be a friend, someone at work, or even your child. Pay attention to what this person might offer you in terms of your own growth.

cc_soul_mate.SoulMateDescription: Potential soul mates! Shared values. Sentimental and vulnerable when it comes to dealing with each other. You'll probably have a strong bond that gives you both what you need. Don't expect everything to go smoothly between you. Some lessons are hard learned.  You'll know your partner is your soul mate if it seems you're always learning something from each other. And, these experiences should bring you closer together.
cc_soul_mate.NotSoulMateDescription: You're probably not soul mates.  Not to worry. It's actually normal to have a soul mate that's a best friend, family member, or someone other than your partner. An Ox person may be playing a significant role in your life right now! And, might be one in your future. Pay attention to any that cross your path -- and the lessons they may be there to teach you.

cc_soul_mate.SoulMateDescription: Good news! You are candidates for a soul mate match. Both sensitive, hard-working, and devoted to your loved ones. You’ll provide the stability and support for your Rat partner’s ideas and ambitions. In return, you’ll have someone who understands you. You'll know your partner is your soul mate if it seems you're always learning something from each other. And these experiences should bring you closer together.

Look around you and see what role Rat sign people are playing in your life. That’s where you’re most likely to find what you seek. If a Rat hasn’t made an appearance in your life yet, you might meet one sometime soon! This person could teach you important lessons.

And these experiences should bring you closer together.
cc_soul_mate.NotSoulMateDescription: Well, you may not be soul mates, but that doesn't mean you're not meant to be together and learn from one another. A Pig person may eventually appear in your life to teach you something important. Pay attention to what this person offers you in terms of your own growth as an individual. One more thing. Your soul mate could turn out to be a friend, someone at work, or even your child. So be alert.

Trust me; one will be coming into your life any time. Remember, could be a friend or even your child. It' all about mutual growth.

cc_element_strength.Conclusion: With a good balance of Wood in your relationship, you and your partner probably compromise easily. Understanding, empathy, and flexibility all make your love match work. Hooray! It’s likely you’re both good-hearted and generous with your love. You’re willing to bend when necessary and cooperate to make things work.

With a lot of Fire in your match, there should be plenty of charisma, excitement, and  adventure to keep you two entertained. The love sparks should be plentiful, and you'll have enough passion to keep things interesting for a long time. You two are probably original, dynamic, and innovative as individuals and lovers.

Since Earth represents stability, there is a good chance you can work through all your differences by just continuing to plod on. As a practical team, you two know what's important and place a high emphasis on staying grounded and connected.  You might be more in touch with nature than other couples as well, preferring a more simple and non-materialistic life to a wild and flashy one.

With a good balance of Metal, your match has that fighting spirit which keeps love alive! Together, you can probably persevere through your obstacles and stay driven to achieve your personal and professional goals as a team. There should be plenty of  strength and fortitude to keep your connection solid, even when things get rough.

With a good balance of Water in your match, you two should make a flexible, communicative pair. You both probably place a lot of value on your interpersonal relationships, which means your love should flourish under the close care and attention you give it. You can probably deal with changes or obstacles with ease and grace.
